entries.englishNotes: Winchester is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. It is similar to the Regular Shotgun, and has a higher fire rate, lower reload time, and less spread, but less max ammo. Notes: The Winchester is wielded by Blue Shotgun Kin. The quote "Better Than A Box Of Roses" is a reference to a scene in the movie Terminator 2: Judgement Day, where the Terminator pulls a Winchester out of a box full of roses. When reloading the Winchester, the player will spin the weapon backwards around the trigger hand. This is in imitation of what the Terminator does in the movie.
entries.chineseNotes: 温彻斯特霰弹枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。它与常规霰弹枪相似，但射速更高、装弹更快、散布更小，最大弹药量也更少。备注：蓝色霰弹枪子弹怪会使用这把武器。引语“比一盒玫瑰更好”出自电影《终结者2：审判日》中的一个场景，终结者从装满玫瑰的盒子里抽出一把温彻斯特霰弹枪。装弹时，玩家会让枪绕着持扳机的手向后旋转，模仿了电影里终结者的动作。

entries.englishNotes: Thompson Sub-Machinegun is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: ETG The Thompson Sub-Machinegun is wielded by Hollowpoints. "Myeah, See!" references a line spoken by Edward G. Robinson's gangster character in the 1931 film Little Caesar. This gun is used in The Convict's past.
entries.chineseNotes: 汤普森冲锋枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。备注：在《挺进地牢》中，空尖弹会使用汤普森冲锋枪。“Myeah, See!” 引用了爱德华·G·罗宾逊在 1931 年电影《小凯撒》中黑帮角色的一句台词。这把枪也会出现在囚犯的过去关卡中。

entries.englishNotes: Screecher is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires piercing sound waves that grow in width the further they travel. Waves have a 1% chance to stun enemies for 3 seconds on impact. Notes: The sound waves destroy chests very quickly; it is not recommended to check for mimics using this gun. The sound waves also crack the walls of secret rooms very quickly, making it a great, ammo efficient gun for locating them. The gun could be a reference to anti-riot weapons such as the Long Range Acoustic Device (LRAD), which uses a form of non-kinetic and non-lethal form of crowd dispersal.
entries.chineseNotes: 声波枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：快速发射可穿透的声波，飞行越远波幅越宽。声波命中时有 1% 概率使敌人眩晕 3 秒。备注：这些声波会很快打碎宝箱，因此不建议用它来试探拟态怪。声波也能很快震裂隐藏房间的墙壁，是一把很适合找秘密房、且弹药效率很高的武器。这把枪可能致敬了 LRAD（远程声学装置）等防暴武器，这类武器会以非动能、非致命的方式驱散人群。

entries.englishNotes: Sticky Crossbow is a gun that fires bolts which stick to enemies. Upon reloading, the bolts explode. Bolts may also be detonated by switching weapons at any time. Notes: Triple Sticky - If the player also has Triple Crossbow, Sticky Crossbow will fire three bolts per shot. Triple Crossbow's triple shot will explode upon hitting an enemy. If the player has a passive allowing bullets to pierce, the explosion will occur where the bolt struck. Exploding bolts will ignite pools of oil. Trivia: This gun's behaviour and description is a reference to the AGL grenade launcher from the game Teleglitch. This gun is used in The Hunter's past.
entries.chineseNotes: 黏性十字弩是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会发射黏在敌人身上的弩箭；装填时，这些弩箭会爆炸，你也可以随时通过切换武器来手动引爆它们。备注：在“Triple Sticky”联动下，如果玩家同时拥有三重十字弩，黏性十字弩每次会射出三支弩箭；而三重十字弩本身的三连发命中敌人时也会爆炸。如果玩家拥有允许子弹穿透的被动物品，爆炸会在弩箭命中的位置触发。爆炸弩箭还会点燃油池。趣味冷知识：这把枪的行为和描述是在致敬游戏《特勒故障（Teleglitch）》中的 AGL 榴弹发射器。这把枪也会出现在猎人的过去关卡中。

entries.englishNotes: The A.W.P. is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It fires bullets that can pierce through one enemy. As a sniper rifle, its shot speed is extremely fast, and its shots leave lines of smoke. Notes: Due to its slow rate of fire it is easy to fire another gun between A.W.P. shots without A.W.P. downtime. A.W.P is an acronym for Arctic Warfare Police. "Noob Cannon" is a reference to the AWP weapon in Counter-Strike, popular among new and experienced players alike for its ability to one-shot opposing players.
entries.chineseNotes: 狙击枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。它发射的子弹可以穿透一个敌人。作为狙击步枪，它的弹速极快，射击后还会留下烟线。备注：由于射速较慢，玩家很容易在两次狙击枪射击之间切换到别的枪开火，而不会浪费它的冷却时间。狙击枪（A.W.P.）这一英文名是 Arctic Warfare Police 的缩写。“菜鸟炮”是在致敬《反恐精英（Counter-Strike）》中的 AWP，这把武器因能够一枪击杀对手而深受新手和老玩家欢迎。

entries.englishNotes: Zorgun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires homing (Rad: 5 Vel: 600) projectiles. The last shot of each magazine fires either an RPG rocket, a Grenade Launcher grenade, or a Bullet Bore drill. Holding down the fire button will not automatically fire the last round, the button must be let go and pressed again. Notes: The Zorgun is a reference to the ZF1 weapon sold by the villain Zorg in the film The Fifth Element. The entry for the Zorgun in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a strangely dressed Bullet Kin and a tablet styled after a Shotgun Kin.
entries.chineseNotes: 佐尔枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：快速发射追踪投射物（追踪半径：5，速度：600）。每个弹匣的最后一发会随机变成火箭推进式榴弹的火箭弹、榴弹发射器的榴弹，或钻头枪的钻头弹。按住射击键不会自动打出最后一发，必须先松开再重新按下。备注：佐尔枪致敬了电影《第五元素（The Fifth Element）》中反派佐尔（Zorg）出售的 ZF1 武器。实体《枪械图鉴》中，佐尔枪的条目旁画着一个穿着古怪的子弹怪和一块霰弹枪子弹怪风格的石板涂鸦。

entries.englishNotes: Barrel is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires blue fish. ETG Fish have a 20% chance to Stun (Dur: 2.5s) enemies, and leave pools of water when flopping onto the ground that are capable of extinguishing chest fuses and the fireplace. Notes: The gun itself as well as its flavor text are a reference to the idiom "Like shooting fish in a barrel" describing an effortless or simple action, with guaranteed success. One Fish Two Fish Is a clear reference to a book of a similar name written by Dr. Seuss. This gun's quote in Portuguese, "Isso, Isso, Isso", is a reference to a popular Mexican TV show called El Chavo del Ocho about a boy who lives in a barrel.
entries.chineseNotes: 桶枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：发射蓝色的鱼。在《挺进地牢》中，这些鱼有 20% 概率使敌人眩晕 2.5 秒，并会在落地扑腾时留下水洼，可用于熄灭宝箱引线和壁炉。备注：这把枪本身以及它的风味文本都致敬了英语习语“像在桶里打鱼一样容易”，形容某件事做起来毫不费力、而且十拿九稳。“One Fish Two Fish” 显然是在引用苏斯博士（Dr. Seuss）的同名书籍。本枪在葡萄牙语中的引语“Isso, Isso, Isso”则是在致敬墨西哥热门电视剧《八号街的查沃（El Chavo del Ocho）》，剧中有个住在桶里的男孩。

entries.englishNotes: Bow is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Charges to shoot arrows. If fired fully charged, its arrows will move faster, deal more damage, and pierce enemies. Notes: Arrowkin wield the Bow. The charge effect is likely a reference to the game "Titan Souls". It could also be a reference to the Light Arrow from The Legend of Zelda games.
entries.chineseNotes: 弓是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：可以蓄力发射箭矢。完全蓄力后射出的箭会飞得更快、伤害更高，并且能够穿透敌人。备注：箭弹怪会使用弓。蓄力效果很可能是在致敬游戏《泰坦之魂（Titan Souls）》，也可能是在致敬《塞尔达传说（The Legend of Zelda）》系列中的光之箭。

entries.englishNotes: Dueling Pistol is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires large, piercing musket balls which bounce twice. Notes: The Hell Singing synergy is likely a reference to Van Helsing, the vampire hunter created by Bram Stoker. The Dead Prez synergy is likely a reference to the death of Abraham Lincoln, who was shot with a Derringer, and the Dueling Pistol likely is referencing the many duels that Andrew... The entry for the Dueling Pistol in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of one musketball gundead shooting another dead with the weapon.
entries.chineseNotes: 决斗手枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。它会发射大型、可穿透并且会弹跳两次的火枪弹。备注：“Hell Singing” 联动很可能是在致敬布莱姆·斯托克（Bram Stoker）创造的吸血鬼猎人范海辛（Van Helsing）。“Dead Prez” 联动很可能与亚伯拉罕·林肯之死有关，因为他是被德林杰手枪射杀的；而决斗手枪本身则大概是在影射安德鲁·杰克逊（Andrew Jackson）参与过的多次决斗。实体《枪械图鉴》中，决斗手枪的条目旁画着一只火枪弹枪骸用这把武器射击另一只枪骸的小涂鸦。

entries.englishNotes: Mega Douser is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: The Mega Douser fires a continuous stream of water with strong knockback but relatively low damage. This stream leaves water goop on the ground beneath it at it travels. This water stream can extinguish the fireplace, put out Chest fuses, and clean off hidden Rainbow Chests. Because the Mega Douser uses the Water damage type, it deals 2x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and does not ignite Coalers. Notes: The name and appearance of the gun reference Super Soaker, a brand of toy water guns. More specifically, its shape and color scheme are based on the original Super Soaker 50.
entries.chineseNotes: 超级小火车是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：它会持续喷射水流，击退力很强，但伤害相对较低。水流经过时会在地面留下水渍。这股水流可以熄灭壁炉、扑灭宝箱引线，还能冲掉隐藏彩虹箱上的伪装。由于超级小火车使用的是水属性伤害，它对枪口幽魂和枪口火花会造成 2 倍伤害，并且不会点燃燃煤怪。备注：这把枪的名字和外观致敬了超级水枪（Super Soaker）这个玩具水枪品牌，更具体地说，它的造型和配色取材自最初的超级水枪 50（Super Soaker 50）。

entries.englishNotes: The Crossbow is a gun in Enter the Gungeon that fires a single high-damage bolt. The Hunter starts with this gun. Notes: There is a delay between the shot being fired and the auto reload which can be canceled with a manual reload. If playing in coop mode and the Hunter dies whilst holding the Crossbow, it will disappear. It will not disappear if others hold it. The entry for the Crossbow in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of the weapon and Junior II, referencing the Hunter's starting loadout.
entries.chineseNotes: 十字弩是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪，会发射单发高伤害弩箭。猎人开局自带这把武器。备注：射击后到自动装填之间存在一小段延迟，这段延迟可以通过手动装弹取消。如果在双人合作模式下，猎人手持十字弩时死亡，这把武器会消失；若由其他角色持有，则不会消失。实体《枪械图鉴》中，十字弩的条目旁画着这把武器和 Junior II 的小涂鸦，呼应了猎人的初始装备。

entries.englishNotes: Thunderclap is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Quickly fires small balls of electricity. ETG Any pools of water that these balls pass over will be electrified, dealing considerable damage to enemies. This gun does not grant electricity immunity. As such, electrified pools of water also pose considerable danger to the player. Notes: Altered: Diazepam - Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, this gun was included in Diazepam. The damaging field while reloading was added in A Farewell to Arms. This weapon's appearance is a reference to the Thunderbolt weapon from the video game series Quake and the Plasma Gun from Doom.
entries.chineseNotes: 霹雳枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：快速发射小型电球。在《挺进地牢》中，这些电球掠过的水洼会被通电，对敌人造成可观伤害。这把枪不会赋予玩家电击免疫，因此被通电的水洼对玩家同样很危险。备注：“Altered: Diazepam” 这一联动说明，在《高级地牢与巨枪》更新之前，这把枪原本包含在 Diazepam 联动中。装弹时产生的伤害力场则是在《告别武装》更新中加入的。这把武器的外观致敬了《雷神之锤（Quake）》系列中的雷霆（Thunderbolt）武器，以及《毁灭战士（Doom）》中的等离子枪（Plasma Gun）。

entries.englishNotes: Bee Hive is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires bees that home (Rad: 10 Vel: 150) in on and damage enemies. The initial 3 damage impact of each bee is affected by the players damage stat, but the lingering swarm damage is not. Notes: ETG If the player feeds the Bee Hive and the RPG to a regular Muncher, it will always spit out a Stinger. ETG Bees will not home in on enemies that are not necessary for room clear. ETG Bees caught by Gunjurers retain their quick movement and tight homing, making them extrmely hard for the player to dodge.
entries.chineseNotes: 蜂巢是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：发射会追踪敌人并造成伤害的蜜蜂（追踪半径：10，速度：150）。每只蜜蜂初次命中时造成的 3 点伤害会受到玩家伤害属性影响，但后续持续的蜂群伤害不会。备注：在《挺进地牢》中，如果玩家把蜂巢和 RPG 一起喂给普通吃枪人，它一定会吐出毒刺枪。蜜蜂不会追踪那些并非房间清理所必需的敌人。被枪巫师抓住的蜜蜂会保留高速移动和强力追踪特性，因此对玩家来说极难闪避。

entries.englishNotes: AK-47 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the AK-47 is called the AP-13. Notes: The AK-47 is wielded by some Bullet KinETG, TankersETG, and HollowpointsXTG. ETG If the player feeds the AK-47 and either the Flame Hand or Megahand to a regular Muncher, it will always spit out a Machine Fist. The description of the AK-47 is a reference to the film Jackie Brown.
entries.chineseNotes: AK-47 是《挺进地牢》《逃出地牢》以及《挺进地牢：枪械亡者之家（Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead）》中出现的一把枪。在 Apple Arcade 版《逃出地牢》中，AK-47 被改名为 AP-13。备注：部分子弹怪、《挺进地牢》中的坦克怪，以及《逃出地牢》中的空尖弹都会使用 AK-47。在《挺进地牢》中，如果玩家把 AK-47 与烈焰手炮或洛克手炮中的任意一把一起喂给普通吃枪人，它一定会吐出机械拳套。AK-47 的描述是在致敬电影《危险关系（Jackie Brown）》。

entries.englishNotes: Yari Launcher is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires tightly homing (Rad: Vel: 220) rockets that create small explosions upon hitting an enemy. The damage dealt by these rockets (both their impact damage and explosive damage) bypass the Boss DPS cap, allowing this gun to kill bosses extremely quickly. Notes: The gun is a reference to the rocket launcher in the 2013 reboot of Shadow Warrior. The orbiting Demon Head gained through the Shadow Warrior synergy is likely a reference to one of the game's weapons, a demon head that shoots a laser out of its mouth.
entries.chineseNotes: 亚里火箭发射器是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：快速发射强力追踪火箭弹（速度：220），命中敌人时会产生小范围爆炸。这些火箭弹造成的伤害，无论是直接命中还是爆炸伤害，都可以无视 Boss 的 DPS 上限，因此这把枪能极快地击杀 Boss。备注：这把枪致敬了 2013 年重启版《影子武士（Shadow Warrior）》中的火箭发射器。通过“影子武士（Shadow Warrior）”联动获得的环绕恶魔头颅，可能也是在致敬游戏中的一件武器：会从口中发射激光的恶魔头。

entries.englishNotes: Heck Blaster is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires invisible bullets. Jammed enemies and bosses hit by the Heck Blaster will revert to normal. Notes: This gun is useful in high Curse runs, as it gives players a counter to the high spawn rates of Jammed enemies. Gunjurers cannot absorb Heck Blaster's bullets. This gun is also capable of reverting Jammed bosses to normal, including the Jammed Lich that appears in the Glitched Lich fight.
entries.chineseNotes: 见鬼冲击波是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：快速发射不可见子弹。被见鬼冲击波命中的诅咒敌人和诅咒 Boss 会恢复成普通状态。备注：在高诅咒流程中，这把枪非常实用，因为它能有效对抗高刷新率的诅咒敌人。枪巫师无法吸收见鬼冲击波发射的子弹。这把枪还可以让诅咒 Boss 恢复正常状态，包括故障巫妖战中出现的诅咒巫妖。

entries.englishNotes: Blooper is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a shotgun blast of 6 short-range projectiles with high knockback. Deals 20% less damage to bosses. Notes: Gunjurers cannot catch the Blooper's shots. Blooper is a reference to the 2012 time travel film Looper. The gun's tagline, "Close Your Bloop", is a reference to the movie's tagline, "Close Your Loop". The entry for the Blooper in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a Bullet Kin executing another in a field of grain, using the weapon.
entries.chineseNotes: 笨头枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：像霰弹枪一样发射 6 枚短程投射物，击退力很高。对 Boss 造成的伤害会降低 20%。备注：枪巫师无法接住笨头枪的射击。笨头枪致敬了 2012 年的时间旅行电影《环形使者》（Looper）。这把枪的标语“Close Your Bloop”则是在致敬电影的宣传语“Close Your Loop”。实体《枪械图鉴》中，笨头枪的条目旁画着一只子弹怪在麦田里用这把武器处决另一只子弹怪的小涂鸦。

entries.englishNotes: Grenade Launcher is a gun in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Fires explosive grenades. ETG Grenades skip across the ground, and are able to ricochet off of a wall or object once. Notes: This gun is based on the real-world M79 Grenade Launcher, which was developed as a higher powered and more accurate substitute for the US Military's rifle-barrel grenades. The item quote "Fwomp!" is a reference to the real-life weapon's distinctive report when fired. Grenade Launcher's max ammo was increased from 25 to 60 in A Farewell to Arms.
entries.chineseNotes: 榴弹发射器是《挺进地牢》《逃出地牢》以及《挺进地牢：枪械亡者之家》中出现的一把枪。效果：发射会爆炸的榴弹。在《挺进地牢》中，这些榴弹会沿地面弹跳前进，并且可以在撞到墙壁或物体后反弹一次。备注：这把枪以现实中的 M79 榴弹发射器为原型，后者是为了替代美军枪管榴弹而开发的更强力、更精准的武器。道具引语“Fwomp!” 致敬了现实武器开火时极具辨识度的声响。在《告别武装》更新中，榴弹发射器的最大弹药量从 25 提高到了 60。

entries.englishNotes: Moonscraper is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a laser beam that reflects off of walls or obstacles once. Notes: This gun is a reference to the Moonraker laser rifle from the 1979 James Bond movie Moonraker, as well as the Moonraker Laser weapon from the Nintendo 64 game, GoldenEye 007. The synergy Land Among The Stars references the idiom, "Shoot for the moon; even if you miss, you’ll land among the stars." The synergy Jumping...
entries.chineseNotes: 月球平土机是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中的一把枪。效果：发射一束激光，并能在墙壁或障碍物之间反射一次。备注：这把枪是在致敬 1979 年詹姆斯·邦德电影《太空城》中的 Moonraker 激光步枪，以及任天堂 64 游戏《黄金眼 007》中的 Moonraker Laser 武器。“Land Among The Stars” 联动引用了那句谚语：“Shoot for the moon; even if you miss, you’ll land among the stars.”，大意是“志存高远，即使失手，也能落入群星之间”。当前英文源条目在 “Jumping...” 这里本身就是截断状态，因此后续说明暂无更多内容。

entries.englishNotes: BSG is a gun that slowly charges up to fire a large green projectile that, upon reaching its maximum distance, will detonate and severely damage all enemies in the room. Notes: Items that increase shot speed (such as Rocket-Powered Bullets) will allow projectiles to reach their maximum distance quicker and thus detonate in less time. Projectiles will detonate instantly if they come in contact with a black hole created by either the Black Hole Gun or Singularity. The explosion's effect is identical to that of the Bracket Key, with the exception that it does not stop additional enemy waves from spawning; it can damage certain bosses during...
entries.chineseNotes: 大射机枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会缓慢蓄力，然后发射一枚巨大的绿色弹体；当弹体到达最远距离时会爆炸，并对房间内所有敌人造成重创。备注：提高弹速的物品，例如火箭动力子弹，会让弹体更快到达最远距离，因此也会更快引爆。若弹体接触到由黑洞枪或奇点（Singularity）制造的黑洞，则会立刻爆炸。其爆炸效果与支架钥匙相同，但不会阻止额外敌潮继续生成；它还能在某些 Boss 的特定阶段对其造成伤害……

entries.englishNotes: Shades's Revolver is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases Coolness by 3 while in the players inventory, decreasing the cooldown of active items and increasing the chance of items dropping upon clearing a room. Notes: The pickup line "Someone Loses An Eye", could be a reference to the latter part of the phrase "It's all fun and games until someone loses an eye." The corresponding pickup line of Smiley's Revolver, "All Smiles," is likely a corruption of the first part of the phrase. The "notches" referenced in the Ammonomicon Entry are usually indicative of a soldier's confirmed kills. As such, it is implied that Shades has killed 17 Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseNotes: 墨镜子弹的左轮手枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。效果：当它位于玩家背包中时，会额外提供 3 点酷度（Coolness），从而缩短主动道具的冷却时间，并提高玩家清理房间后掉落物品的概率。备注：拾取台词“Someone Loses An Eye”可能是在致敬短语“It's all fun and games until someone loses an eye.”的后半句。对应的另一把微笑左轮（Smiley's Revolver）的拾取台词“All Smiles,”则很可能是对这句短语前半句的变体改写。《枪械图鉴》（Ammonomicon）条目中提到的“刻痕”通常代表士兵确认击杀的数量，因此这里暗示 Shades 已经击杀了 17 名枪牢勇士。

entries.englishNotes: Dungeon Eagle is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It can be charged to fire a more powerful shot, or tap fired to shoot more frequent, weaker projectiles. Notes: The name Dungeon Eagle is a reference to the real-world 'Desert Eagle' gun. The description of the weapon refers to the Desert Eagle's popularity in American culture and the weapon's iconic reputation despite its shortcomings. With Don't Hoot the Messenger, the reload animation of the gun shows its slide and barrel rotating 360 degrees in reference to the real-world ability of owls to rotate their heads...
entries.chineseNotes: 地牢之鹰是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它可以通过蓄力发射威力更强的一击，也可以通过快速点射发出更频繁但更弱的弹体。备注：“地牢之鹰”这个名字是在影射现实中的“Desert Eagle”。武器描述提到了沙漠之鹰在美国文化中的流行度，以及它尽管有明显缺点却依然极具标志性的名声。若拥有 Don't Hoot the Messenger，这把枪的换弹动画会让套筒和枪管旋转 360 度，这是在致敬现实中猫头鹰能够大角度转动头部的能力……

entries.englishNotes: The Dart Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It serves as The Cultists starting gun in both games. Notes: The Dart Gun may be a reference to the Nerf Maverick REV-6, a toy foam dart blaster that has the same shape, similar color pattern (albeit purple instead of yellow), and also hold... The Dart Gun is a replacement toy for the Cultist, after they lost their previous toy blaster (the Light Gun) down a pit. The alternate skin of this gun resembles a worm, in order to match the Cultists apple alt skin.
entries.chineseNotes: 标枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它在这两部作品里都是教徒的初始武器。备注：标枪可能是在致敬 Nerf Maverick REV-6，这是一把玩具泡沫飞镖枪，两者外形相似、配色也接近，只是本作里是紫色而不是黄色，而且同样可以装填…… 标枪是教徒丢失之前那把玩具枪光之枪（Light Gun）之后，用来替代的新玩具。它的替代皮肤看起来像一条蠕虫，用来配合教徒的苹果主题替代皮肤。

entries.englishNotes: M1 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the M1 is called the Grand Rifle. Effects: Bullets from the M1 pierce through enemies and decorations, and travel at an extremely high speed. On reload, the M1 makes a distinctive "ping" sound. Notes: Although classified as semi-automatic, the M1 is functionally automatic, as its rate of fire does not benefit from tapping the fire button instead of holding it down. There are several real guns with the name 'M1', however the shape (such as the band around the rifle's forend), distinctive pinging reload sound, and Ammonomicon entry of the weap...
entries.chineseNotes: M1 是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。在 Apple Arcade 版《逃出地牢》中，M1 被称作 Grand Rifle。效果：M1 发射的子弹会穿透敌人和场景装饰，并以极高的速度飞行。换弹时，M1 会发出很有辨识度的“ping”声。备注：虽然它被归类为半自动武器，但实际手感上更接近全自动，因为连续点按开火并不会比按住开火获得更高射速。现实中有多种枪械都叫作“M1”，不过从外形特征，例如护木前端的箍环、标志性的“ping”式换弹声，以及 Ammonomicon 里的武器条目来看，这把武器明显是在影射 M1 Garand……

entries.englishNotes: Nail Gun is a gun in Enter the Gungeon that fires a rapid stream of low damage nails. Notes: This gun is among those Gunsling King and Manservantes can challenge the player to clear a room with. The Ammonomicon entry is a reference to the 1990s horror film Arachnophobia. This weapon may also be a reference to Home Improvement: Power Tool Pursuit!, as the character in that game can also wield a nail gun, which shares the inaccuracy, fire rate, and...
entries.chineseNotes: 钉枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械，会高速连续射出伤害较低的钉子。备注：这把枪是枪王和曼侍从可能拿来挑战玩家清房的武器之一。Ammonomicon 条目是在致敬 1990 年代的恐怖电影《小魔煞》。这把武器也可能是在影射《Home Improvement: Power Tool Pursuit!》，因为那部作品中的角色同样能使用钉枪，而且两者在不准度、射速以及……等方面都很相似。

entries.englishNotes: The Light Gun is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires an incredibly fast zap of white light capable of piercing through enemies. The final bullet in each magazine is a mallard duck, which automatically seeks out enemies to attack them. This duck is capable of piercing once, and has extremely tight homing. Like all other piercing projectiles, the duck's damage will halve after piercing an enemy for the first time. Notes: This gun is a reference to the NES Zapper. The duck being shot is a reference to Duck Hunt, one of the most well-known games to use the NES Zapper.
entries.chineseNotes: 光之枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。效果：它会发射一道极快的白色电光，并能穿透敌人。每个弹匣的最后一发子弹会变成一只绿头鸭，它会自动追踪敌人进行攻击。这只鸭子可以穿透一次，而且追踪性能极强。和其他穿透类弹体一样，这只鸭子在第一次穿透敌人后伤害会减半。备注：这把枪是在致敬 NES Zapper。被射出的鸭子则是在致敬《Duck Hunt》，那是使用 NES Zapper 的代表性作品之一。

entries.englishNotes: Mailbox is a gun that fires mail at enemies, with the final shot in each magazine being a package. The package can explode, leave glitter, burn, or poison enemies. Notes: This gun is the only way to get the Day Ruiner achievement, acquired by killing a boss after covering it in glitter. Many of the final shot's effects are references to real mail-related attacks: The option of a box filled with glitter is a reference to postal glitter bombs.
entries.chineseNotes: 信箱是一把会向敌人发射邮件的枪械，而每个弹匣的最后一发则会射出一个包裹。这个包裹可能会爆炸、洒下闪粉、点燃敌人或让敌人中毒。备注：这把枪是获得 Day Ruiner 成就的唯一方式，该成就需要在 Boss 身上撒满闪粉后将其击杀。最后一发的许多效果都在影射现实中的邮寄袭击手法，其中装满闪粉的盒子就是在致敬邮寄闪粉炸弹。

entries.englishNotes: VertebraeK-47 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires homing ghost-shaped bullets that can pierce once. When close together, these bullets form chain links between each other that damage enemies. ETG Each chain deals 2 damage to enemies it overlaps. Enemies hurt by a chain have a 1 second cooldown before they can be harmed by the same chain again. Notes: The weapon's name is a portmanteau of 'vertebrae' and 'AK-47'. Vertebrae are bones which a spine consists of, and the AK-47 is an assault rifle. The description of the gun is a reference to the Jake Clover game, Nuign Spectre.
entries.chineseNotes: 脊椎K-47是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。效果：它会高速射出可穿透一次、形似幽灵的追踪子弹。当这些子弹彼此靠近时，会在它们之间形成能够伤害敌人的锁链。ETG 中每条锁链会对接触到的敌人造成 2 点伤害。被锁链伤害过的敌人会有 1 秒冷却时间，在此期间不会再次被同一条锁链伤害。备注：这把武器的名字是“vertebrae”和“AK-47”组合而成的双关词。vertebrae 指的是构成脊柱的椎骨，而 AK-47 则是一把突击步枪。这把枪的描述是在致敬 Jake Clover 的游戏《Nuign Spectre》。

entries.englishNotes: M1911 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: This gun is one of the six guns wielded by the Beholster. As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine. The in-game description erroneously refers to the M1911's magazine as a clip.
entries.chineseNotes: M1911 是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。备注：这把枪是 Beholster 所持有的六把枪之一。由于它属于 Beholster 的武器，因此也可以被放到 Beholster Shrine 上。游戏内描述还错误地把 M1911 的 magazine 写成了 clip。

entries.englishNotes: Klobbe is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It rapidly fires inaccurate, low-damage bullets. Notes: This gun is among those Gunsling King and Manservantes can challenge the player to clear a room with. This gun is a reference to the Klobb from GoldenEye 007 (itself based on the real-life Škorpion), a notoriously bad gun with similar weaknesses as the Klobbe. The Klobbering Time synergy is a reference to Fantastic Four member The Thing, whose catchphrase is "It's clobbering time".
entries.chineseNotes: 可洛比枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它会高速发射不够精准、伤害偏低的子弹。备注：这把枪是枪王和曼侍从可能拿来挑战玩家清房的武器之一。它是在致敬《黄金眼 007（GoldenEye 007）》中的可洛布（Klobb），那把枪本身又是以现实中的斯科尔皮恩（Škorpion）为原型，并且和可洛比枪一样以性能糟糕著称。Klobbering Time 这个联动则是在致敬神奇四侠（Fantastic Four）成员石头人（The Thing）的名台词“It's clobbering time”。

entries.englishNotes: Void Marshal is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It fires fast-moving laser projectiles. Notes: This gun is one of the six guns wielded by the Beholster. As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine.
entries.chineseNotes: 虚空元帅是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它会发射高速飞行的激光弹体。备注：这把枪是 Beholster 所持有的六把枪之一。由于它属于 Beholster 的武器，因此也可以被放到 Beholster Shrine 上。

entries.englishNotes: Tear Jerker is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Shoots tears that pierce enemies and leave puddles of water on collision. The direction of these tears is affected by the player's momentum, meaning that tears angle in the direction the player is moving. Notes: Because the Tear Jerker uses the Water damage type, it deals 2x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and does not ignite Coalers. The Tear Jerker also puts out decorative torches and burning skeletons. This gun and both of its synergies are references to The Binding of Isaac.
entries.chineseNotes: 催泪枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。效果：它会射出能够穿透敌人的眼泪，并在命中后留下水洼。这些眼泪的飞行方向会受到玩家移动惯性的影响，也就是说，子弹会朝玩家移动的方向倾斜。备注：由于催泪枪使用的是水属性伤害，因此它会对枪口幽魂（Muzzle Wisps）和枪口火花（Muzzle Flares）造成 2 倍伤害，同时不会点燃燃煤怪（Coalers）。催泪枪还可以熄灭装饰用火把和着火的骷髅。这把枪以及它的两个联动都在致敬《以撒的结合（The Binding of Isaac）》。

entries.englishNotes: Smiley's Revolver is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Decreases shop prices by 15% while in the players inventory. Notes: This item's description references both the name and effect of Disarming Personality. The entry for Smiley's Revolver in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of Smiley.
entries.chineseNotes: 微笑左轮是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。效果：当它位于玩家背包中时，商店售价会降低 15%。备注：这件物品的描述同时影射了和善个性（Disarming Personality）的名字和效果。实体版《枪械图鉴》（Ammonomicon）中，微笑左轮（Smiley's Revolver）的条目旁边还画着一个小小的 Smiley 涂鸦。

entries.englishNotes: Megahand is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires small yellow pellets that deal 6 damage. Charges up to fire a powerful blue energy blast that deals 45 damage and knocks enemies back. Notes: This gun is a reference to Mega Man's arm cannon, called the Mega Buster. The tooltip references how in Mega Man through Mega Man 3, the Mega Buster was represented in menus by the Symbol P. The colors the Megahand flashes while charging most closely resemble those in Mega Man 4, the game in which the ability to charge the Buster was first introduced.
entries.chineseNotes: 洛克手炮是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。效果：它会发射造成 6 点伤害的小型黄色弹丸。蓄力后则会打出强力的蓝色能量冲击波，造成 45 点伤害并击退敌人。备注：这把枪是在致敬洛克人（Mega Man）的手臂炮，也就是洛克手炮（Mega Buster）。它的提示文本提到了在《洛克人（Mega Man）》到《洛克人 3（Mega Man 3）》期间，洛克手炮（Mega Buster）在菜单中会以 Symbol P 表示。本作中的洛克手炮（Megahand）蓄力时闪烁的颜色则最接近《洛克人 4（Mega Man 4）》中的表现，而那一作正是首次引入 Buster 蓄力能力的作品。

entries.englishNotes: Serious Cannon is a gun that fires large, bouncing cannonballs that pierce through enemies. The cannonballs can bounce up to 6 times before disappearing. Each shot can hit the same enemy multiple times. Notes: This gun is a reference to the SBC Cannon from Serious Sam. Its item name "Seriously MENTAL" is a reference to Mental, the series' main villain. The synergy Serious Sam Publishing Contract is a reference to Serious Sam: Kamikaze Attack!, another game published by Devolver Digital.
entries.chineseNotes: 强力加农炮是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会发射巨大且会弹跳的炮弹，这些炮弹能够穿透敌人。炮弹最多可反弹 6 次后才会消失。每一发子弹都可能多次命中同一个敌人。备注：这把枪是在致敬《Serious Sam》中的 SBC Cannon。它的物品名“Seriously MENTAL”则是在影射系列主反派 Mental。联动 Serious Sam Publishing Contract 则是在致敬另一款由 Devolver Digital 发行的作品《Serious Sam: Kamikaze Attack!》。

entries.englishNotes: Magnum is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon, as well as in Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead under a different name. Notes: The Magnum is the most commonly used enemy weapon in the Gungeon, being held by Bullet Kin, Veteran Bullet Kin, Minelets, Cardinals, Shroomers, Ashen Bullet Kin, Mutant Bullet Kin... The quote "5 shots or 6?" is a reference to the film Dirty Harry. The gun's description also is a reference to Harry calling his magnum a filthy gun.
entries.chineseNotes: 马格南手枪会出现在《挺进地牢》《逃出地牢》以及《Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead》中，不过在后者里使用了不同名称。备注：它是地牢里最常见的敌方武器之一，子弹枪兵、老兵子弹枪兵、Minelets、Cardinals、Shroomers、灰烬子弹枪兵、变异子弹枪兵等敌人都会使用它。台词“5 shots or 6?”是在致敬电影《肮脏的哈里》。这把枪的描述也影射了 Harry 把自己的 magnum 称作一把肮脏武器的桥段。

entries.englishNotes: RPG is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a rocket-propelled explosive grenade. Capable of dealing considerable damage, but with a lengthy reload time. The impact of the RPG projectile (not the explosion) deals 30% extra damage to bosses. RPG grenades start off slightly slower, before quickly accelerating to maximum velocity. Notes: If the player feeds both this gun and Bee Hive to a Muncher, it will spit out a Stinger as a result. 'Gundropping' (dropping a weapon mid-reload and picking it back up to force-reload it, skipping it's reload time) is highly effective with this weapon due to it's lengthy reload.
entries.chineseNotes: 火箭推进式榴弹会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。效果：它会发射一枚由火箭推进的爆炸榴弹，伤害相当可观，但换弹时间很长。RPG 弹体本身的直接撞击伤害，对 Boss 会额外造成 30% 伤害，这部分不包括爆炸伤害。RPG 榴弹刚发射时速度略慢，随后会迅速加速到最高速度。备注：如果玩家把这把枪和蜂巢一起喂给吞枪兽，最终会吐出一把机尾炮。由于它换弹极慢，因此“Gundropping”这个技巧，也就是在换弹中途丢下武器再捡起来以强制完成换弹、跳过原本换弹时间，对这把武器尤其有效。

entries.englishNotes: Freeze Ray is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires a continuous blue laser that freezes enemies. Notes: Has a similar look and basic abilities as the weapon used by Mr. Freeze in various "Batman" media. This gun's flavor text is a reference to Arnold Schwarzenegger's campy performance as Mr. Freeze from the movie Batman & Robin. The synergy "Willing to Sacrifice" is a reference to the 1977 song Cold As Ice by Foreigner.
entries.chineseNotes: 冰冻射线是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会发射持续不断的蓝色激光，并将敌人冻结。备注：它的外观和基本能力都与多部《蝙蝠侠（Batman）》作品中急冻人使用的武器非常相似。这把枪的风味文本是在致敬阿诺德·施瓦辛格（Arnold Schwarzenegger）在电影《蝙蝠侠与罗宾（Batman & Robin）》中饰演急冻人时那种夸张的表演风格。联动“Willing to Sacrifice”则是在致敬外国人乐队（Foreigner）于 1977 年发行的歌曲《Cold As Ice》。

entries.englishNotes: Heroine is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It has 3 levels of damage depending on how long the gun has been charged. Notes: The Heroine is a reference to the Arm Cannon wielded by Samus Aran, the heavily armored bounty hunter and protagonist in the Metroid series. Its in-game model and its alternative modes match its appearance in Metroid Prime. The Hyper Beam synergy is a reference to a weapon with the same name from Super Metroid. The beam is obtained after a baby Metroid sacrifices itself to save Samus.
entries.chineseNotes: 女英雄是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会根据蓄力时间长短造成 3 个等级的不同伤害。备注：女英雄是在致敬《银河战士（Metroid）》系列主角、重装赏金猎人萨姆斯·阿兰（Samus Aran）所使用的手臂炮。它在游戏中的模型以及替代模式都对应着《银河战士 Prime（Metroid Prime）》中的造型。联动 Hyper Beam 则是在致敬《超级银河战士（Super Metroid）》中同名武器；那道光束是在一只幼年密特罗德（Metroid）为救萨姆斯而牺牲后获得的。

entries.englishNotes: Trank Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: This gun is wielded by Beadies, Coalers, and the Beholster. As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine. The Trank Gun is a reference to the Tranq Gun from the Metal Gear franchise, in particular a modified Beretta M9 used in Metal Gear Solid: The Twin Snakes and Metal Gear Solid 2...
entries.chineseNotes: M9 是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。备注：Beadies、Coalers 以及 Beholster 都会使用这把枪。由于它属于 Beholster 的武器之一，因此也可以放到 Beholster Shrine 上。M9 在英文 wiki 上使用的条目名为麻醉枪（Trank Gun），这是在致敬《合金装备（Metal Gear）》系列中的麻醉枪（Tranq Gun），尤其是《合金装备：孪蛇（Metal Gear Solid: The Twin Snakes）》和《合金装备 2（Metal Gear Solid 2）》中那把经过改装的贝瑞塔 M9（Beretta M9）……

entries.englishNotes: Machine Pistol is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: This gun resembles a Mini Uzi, a compact, blowback-operated machine pistol developed in 1980, chambered in 9x19mm Parabellum. This gun is used by Bandana Bullet Kin, and is one of the six guns wielded by the Beholster. As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine.
entries.chineseNotes: 机枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。备注：这把枪看起来很像 Mini Uzi，这是一种于 1980 年问世、采用自由枪机结构的紧凑型冲锋手枪，使用 9x19mm Parabellum 弹药。Bandana Bullet Kin 会使用这把枪，而它也是 Beholster 所持有的六把枪之一。由于它属于 Beholster 的武器，因此也可以被放到 Beholster Shrine 上。

entries.englishNotes: Skull Spitter is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: ETG Fires piercing, homing (Rad: 6 Vel: 500) skulls. Notes: This gun appears similar to Johnson, the talking gun from the 2011 video game Shadows of the Damned. The description of the gun is a reference to the Jake Clover game, Nuign Spectre. Dawn of the Gundead is a reference to the emblematic zombie film Dawn of the Dead.
entries.chineseNotes: 颅骨吐射器会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。效果：在《挺进地牢》中，它会发射可穿透、可追踪的骷髅弹体，追踪半径为 6，速度为 500。备注：这把枪与 2011 年游戏《Shadows of the Damned》中那把会说话的枪 Johnson 十分相似。这把枪的描述是在致敬 Jake Clover 的游戏《Nuign Spectre》。Dawn of the Gundead 则是在致敬经典丧尸电影《Dawn of the Dead》。

entries.englishNotes: Jolter is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. It fires large, rectangular bullets with high knockback. Notes: The Jolter is a reference to the Warhammer 40k weapon, the Bolter, typically used by space marines. However, unlike the Bolter, the Jolter isn't an explosive weapon. Having the Demon Head orbital while using the Gun That Can Kill The Past may crash the game and force you to restart the floor. The Synergy "There is Only War" is a reference to Warhammer 40k's iconic tagline: "In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only war."
entries.chineseNotes: 振动机会出现在《挺进地牢》和《挺进地牢：枪械亡者之家（Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead）》中。它会发射大型的矩形子弹，并带有很强的击退效果。备注：振动机是在致敬《战锤 40K（Warhammer 40K）》中的武器 Bolter，这种武器通常由星际战士使用。不过和 Bolter 不同，振动机并不是爆炸武器。若在使用 Gun That Can Kill The Past 时同时拥有恶魔首脑（Demon Head）环绕物，游戏可能会崩溃并强制你重新开始当前楼层。联动“There is Only War”则是在致敬《战锤 40K（Warhammer 40K）》的经典标语：“在遥远未来的黑暗绝境中，唯有战争。”

entries.englishNotes: Sniper Rifle is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires high-velocity bullets that can pierce through one enemy. Notes: The synergy 360 Yes Scope is a reference to the 360 No Scope meme spawned by Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare. The Diazepam and Sniper Woof synergies are referencing Metal Gear Solid's Sniper Wolf character. "Scope Creep" is a reference to a common problem in many projects where the original goals expand while the project is in progress.
entries.chineseNotes: 狙击步枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会发射高速子弹，并能穿透一个敌人。备注：联动 360 Yes Scope 是在致敬由《使命召唤 4：现代战争》带火的 360 No Scope 梗。Diazepam 和 Sniper Woof 这两个联动则是在影射《合金装备》中的角色 Sniper Wolf。“Scope Creep”则是在借用项目管理中的常见问题，指项目进行过程中原本目标不断膨胀的现象。

entries.englishNotes: SAA is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the SAA is called the Single Action. Effects: The SAA fires bouncing bullets that can ricochet up to two times. This damage multiplier stacks each time the bullet ricochets. Additional bounces above the guns inherent 2 can be granted by items such as Bouncy Bullets. In addition to this, the SAA is notable for its very rapid reload. Notes: SAA refers to the Colt Single Action Army. If combined with Angry Bullets, the shots fired from the SAA will often bounce around the room multiple times, great for fighting large, slow moving enemies.
entries.chineseNotes: 柯尔特单动左轮会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。在 Apple Arcade 版《逃出地牢》中，这把枪被称作 Single Action。效果：它发射的子弹会弹跳，最多可反弹两次。每次反弹都会继续叠加伤害倍率。若搭配弹性子弹等物品，还能让反弹次数超过武器自带的 2 次。除此之外，柯尔特单动左轮还以极快的换弹速度著称。备注：SAA 指的是柯尔特单动军用左轮（Colt Single Action Army）。如果与愤怒的小子弹联用，柯尔特单动左轮射出的子弹通常会在房间里多次反弹，非常适合对付体型大、移动慢的敌人。

entries.englishNotes: Regular Shotgun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Notes: The Regular Shotgun has an equip animation in which the gungeoneer racks the pump. ETG The Regular Shotgun is in the SHOTGUN gun class, meaning it benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. The Regular Shotgun is the gun wielded by Red Shotgun Kin, Ashen Shotgun Kin, and Mutant Shotgun Kin.
entries.chineseNotes: 常规霰弹枪会出现在《挺进地牢》《逃出地牢》以及《Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead》中。备注：常规霰弹枪有一段装备动画，表现为枪牢勇士给它上膛。在《挺进地牢》中，常规霰弹枪属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此可以享受 Shotgun Affinity 联动的加成。红色霰弹枪兵、灰烬霰弹枪兵以及变异霰弹枪兵使用的都是这把枪。

entries.englishNotes: Crescent Crossbow is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires medium-sized star projectiles. These stars split into 3 smaller, bouncing stars upon impact. These extra stars are created at the end of the medium star's small trail, causing them to appear slightly away from the wall, enemy, or obstacle the initial star impacted. When fully charged, fires a large star. This star splits into 10 medium-size stars, which in turn each split into 3 smaller stars. Notes: The Crescent Crossbow is peculiarly a part of the CHARM gun class despite not charming enemies. This gun is a reference to the Crescent Moon Wand and Moon Scepter weapons in the Sailor Moon franchise, which use moonlight to combat evil.
entries.chineseNotes: 新月形弩是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。效果：它会发射中等大小的星形弹体。这些星星在命中后会分裂成 3 颗更小、会反弹的星星。这些额外的小星星会在中型星星尾迹的末端生成，因此看起来会稍微偏离最初命中的墙壁、敌人或障碍物。完全蓄力后，则会发射一颗大型星星；它会分裂成 10 颗中型星星，而每颗中型星星又会继续分裂成 3 颗更小的星星。备注：尽管它并不会魅惑敌人，新月形弩却很特别地被归入了 CHARM 枪械类别。这把枪是在致敬《美少女战士》系列中的 Crescent Moon Wand 与 Moon Scepter，两者都会借助月光对抗邪恶。

entries.englishNotes: AU Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. In both games, it deals very high damage but has very little ammo. Notes: It is worth noting that due to the DPS cap mechanic existent in most Bosses, shots from the AU Gun should ideally be fired 3 seconds apart. This gun is a reference to the Golden Gun from the James Bond movie The Man with the Golden Gun. "Some Assembly Required" refers to the fact that in the film, the Golden Gun is assembled from a series of golden innocuous-looking items: a fountain pen (the barrel), a cigarette...
entries.chineseNotes: 金色手枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。在这两部作品里，它都有着极高的伤害，但备弹量非常少。备注：需要注意的是，由于大多数 Boss 都带有 DPS 上限机制，金色手枪的射击理想上应该间隔 3 秒左右。这把枪是在致敬詹姆斯·邦德电影《金枪人》中的金色手枪（Golden Gun）。“Some Assembly Required”则是在说影片里那把金枪是由一系列看似无害的金色小物件拼装而成，例如钢笔作为枪管、香烟……

entries.englishNotes: Laser Rifle is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It fires a burst of three instantaneous purple laser bolts. Notes: The weapon is likely a reference to the Laser Rifle from X-COM: UFO Defense, which it strongly resembles in both appearance and function. It may also be a reference to the more recent X-COM games, which also sport similar looking laser weapons. If the player also has Vorpal Bullets while they have the Starburst Fire synergy, it is possible for Vorpal Bullets to trigger multiple times in a row, and will deal massive damag...
entries.chineseNotes: 激光步枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。它会一次射出三发瞬发的紫色激光束。备注：这把武器很可能是在致敬《X-COM: UFO Defense》中的激光步枪（Laser Rifle），因为两者在外观和功能上都非常相似。它也可能是在影射后来的几部 X-COM 游戏，那些作品中同样出现过外观近似的激光武器。如果玩家同时拥有斩首子弹（Vorpal Bullets）和 Starburst Fire 联动，那么斩首子弹（Vorpal Bullets）有可能连续多次触发，并造成极其夸张的伤害……

entries.englishNotes: Void Shotgun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. It fires a shotgun blast of 6ETGXTG/4HoTG short-range purple bullets and has strong knockback. Notes: The Void Shotgun is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such is affected by the Shotgun Affinity synergy. CQC stands for Close Quarters Combat. This gun is a reference to the Junker Legionnaire Shotgun from the tabletop miniatures game, Void 1.1.
entries.chineseNotes: 真空霰弹枪会出现在《挺进地牢》《逃出地牢》以及《Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead》中。它会打出一轮霰弹，在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中发射 6 发、在《House of the Gundead》中发射 4 发短程紫色子弹，并带有很强的击退效果。备注：真空霰弹枪属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此会受到 Shotgun Affinity 联动的影响。CQC 是 Close Quarters Combat，也就是近距离作战的缩写。这把枪是在致敬桌面微缩模型游戏《Void 1.1》中的 Junker Legionnaire Shotgun。

entries.englishNotes: 38 Special is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: Spamming the fire button while dodge rolling causes the gun to fire considerably faster for a brief time after the dodge roll has concluded. With a fire rate of 0.07, the 38 Special requires a minimum of ~14 clicks per second to fire at maximum DPS, meaning the player is likely to be unable to take full advantage of th... This can be mitigated on PC by temporarily binding the player's fire keys to ScrollUp and ScrollDown on the scroll wheel.
entries.chineseNotes: 38特种手枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。备注：如果在翻滚闪避时疯狂连按开火键，那么在翻滚结束后的短时间内，这把枪的射速会明显加快。由于它的射击间隔只有 0.07 秒，38特种手枪想打出最高 DPS 至少需要大约每秒点击 14 次，这意味着玩家往往很难真正吃满它的上限…… 在 PC 上，可以通过临时把开火键绑定到鼠标滚轮的 `ScrollUp` 与 `ScrollDown` 来缓解这个问题。

entries.englishNotes: Alien Sidearm is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Its behaviour is starkly different in each game. Notes: This gun is a reference to the alien pistols usable in Halo. Shield Breaker is a reference to Halo's famous shield mechanic. The charging mechanic is also a function of Halo's plasma pistol. A fully charged shot from that gun could instantly break another player's shields in multiplayer.
entries.chineseNotes: 外星武器会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中，并且它在两部作品里的表现方式截然不同。备注：这把枪是在致敬《Halo》系列中可用的外星手枪。Shield Breaker 则是在影射《Halo》里经典的护盾机制。蓄力射击同样也是 Halo 等离子手枪的招牌能力之一；在多人模式中，那把枪的满蓄力一击甚至可以瞬间打碎另一名玩家的护盾。

entries.englishNotes: Void Core Assault Rifle is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: ETG Fires a 3-shot burst of lasers. HoTG Rapid-fires laser blasts. Notes: Prior to release, this gun was originally known as the Space Core Assault Rifle with 250 ammo and 30 magazine size. The name of the synergy "Armored Corps" is a homophone to the Armored Core game series. The Void Core Captain described in this gun's Ammonomicon entry is Alistair, the Thunderbolt, referenced in the Ammonomicon entries of many electricity-themed guns and items.
entries.chineseNotes: 真空核心突击步枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《挺进地牢：枪械亡者之家（Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead）》中。效果：在《挺进地牢》中，它会打出 3 连发激光；在《枪械亡者之家（House of the Gundead）》中，则会高速连续发射激光冲击。备注：在正式发售前，这把枪原本叫作 Space Core Assault Rifle，拥有 250 发备弹和 30 发弹匣容量。联动“Armored Corps”的名字是在谐音致敬《装甲核心（Armored Core）》系列。这把枪在 Ammonomicon 条目中提到的 Void Core Captain 指的是雷霆阿利斯泰尔（Alistair, the Thunderbolt），他也在许多电系主题枪械和道具的条目里被反复提及。

entries.englishNotes: Hegemony Rifle is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires blue energy bolts with considerable spread. Notes: This gun appears to be based on the DH-17 Carbine from Star Wars. The comment about accuracy likely references the historically bad aim of Stormtroopers in Star Wars. However, Stormtroopers never used the DH-17. The weapon's sprites refer to it as "E12", which is a reference to the E-11 Carbine which is the actual standard-issue weapon of Stormtroopers.
entries.chineseNotes: 帝国步枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。效果：它会发射散布较大的蓝色能量弹。备注：这把枪看起来是以《星球大战（Star Wars）》中的 DH-17 Carbine 为原型。关于精准度的吐槽，很可能是在影射《星球大战（Star Wars）》中暴风兵一贯糟糕的枪法。不过暴风兵实际上并不会使用 DH-17。这把武器的精灵图又把它标记为“E12”，这是在影射 E-11 Carbine，那才是暴风兵真正的制式武器。

entries.englishNotes: Demon Head is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires a continuous beam that slightly curves towards enemies and has a chance to burn. Notes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Demon Head did not curve towards enemies. This gun is a reference to the Guardian Head weapon from Shadow Warrior. The synergy There is Only War is a reference to the tagline for Warhammer 40,000 by Games Workshop.
entries.chineseNotes: 恶魔首脑是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会发射持续不断的光束，能够略微向敌人弯曲追踪，并且有概率点燃敌人。备注：在 Supply Drop 更新之前，恶魔首脑的光束并不会朝敌人弯曲。这把枪是在致敬《影子武士（Shadow Warrior）》中的守护者头颅（Guardian Head）武器。联动“There is Only War”则是在致敬 Games Workshop 为《战锤 40,000（Warhammer 40,000）》使用的那句标语。

entries.englishNotes: Bundle of Wands is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a spread of three magic projectiles that each have a 10% chance to transmogrify enemies they hit into harmless chickens. Bosses and Mimics are immune to being transmogrified. Transmogrification can affect enemies which are normally invulnerable, such as Gunreapers and Lead Cubes. Notes: Despite being a shotgun, the Bundle of Wands is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. Shooting walls with the gun leaves rune-shaped indentations. The Special Delivery synergy is a reference to Hedwig, the snowy owl that accompanies Harry in the Harry Potter book series.
entries.chineseNotes: 一束魔杖会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。效果：它会散射出三枚魔法弹体，每一枚都有 10% 概率把命中的敌人变形成无害的小鸡。Boss 和拟身怪（Mimic）不会受到变形影响。变形效果还能够作用于一些平时近乎无敌的敌人，例如 Gunreapers 和 Lead Cubes。备注：尽管它的攻击方式像一把霰弹枪，一束魔杖却并不属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此无法享受 Shotgun Affinity 联动加成。用它射击墙壁时会留下符文形状的凹痕。联动“Special Delivery”则是在致敬《哈利·波特（Harry Potter）》小说系列中一直陪伴哈利的雪鸮海德薇（Hedwig）。

entries.englishNotes: Colt 1851 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon that fires a burst of two bullets. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the Colt 1851 is called Blondie. Notes: The description and pickup quote are referencing the gun's use in the film, The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly. The name 'Blondie' used for the Colt 1851 in the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon is a reference to the nickname given to the Man With No Name in the film by the character... This gun is used in The Hunter's past.
entries.chineseNotes: 柯尔特1851会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中，并且每次会两连发射出子弹。在 Apple Arcade 版《逃出地牢》中，柯尔特1851 被称作金发佬（Blondie）。备注：它的描述和拾取台词都在影射这把枪在电影《黄金三镖客（The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly）》中的使用场景。Apple Arcade 版里给它起的名字“金发佬（Blondie）”，则是在致敬影片中无名客（Man With No Name）被其他角色叫作 Blondie 的外号…… 这把枪也会出现在猎人（The Hunter）的过去关卡中。

entries.englishNotes: Medkit is an item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. In ETG it appears as an active item, while in XTG it appears as a passive item. Effects: ETG Heals the player for four hearts on use. XTG Heals the player for four hearts immediately when collected. Has no additional effect. Notes: Has no effect on The Robot. If the Vampire is present on the floor, buying this item from the shop and selling the resulting health is almost always a profit. The description refers to the NGO "Médecin Sans Frontières" (doctors without borders) but parodied to be "Médecin Sans Diplôme" (doctors without diploma)
entries.chineseNotes: 急救包会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。在《挺进地牢》里它是主动道具，在《逃出地牢》里则是被动道具。效果：在《挺进地牢》中，使用后会回复玩家 4 颗心；在《逃出地牢》中，拾取时会立刻回复玩家 4 颗心，除此之外没有额外效果。备注：它对机器人（The Robot）没有效果。如果当前楼层有吸血鬼（Vampire），那么从商店买下这件物品，再把因此获得的生命值卖掉，几乎总是稳赚不赔。它的描述是在戏仿非政府组织“Médecin Sans Frontières”（无国界医生），把它改写成了“Médecin Sans Diplôme”（无文凭医生）。

entries.englishNotes: Potion of Lead Skin is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: While active, the player turns gray, becoming invincible and reflecting bullets back at enemies. Reflected bullets deal 10 damage. Does not prevent damage from falling into pits. Notes: This item is a reference to the classic Potion of Stoneskin from Dungeons and Dragons. Both the tagline and the item's effect could be references to Metal Gear Rising's Sundowner, a boss who employs a shield to deflect the player's attacks while boasting of his invi... The tagline could also be a reference to the James Bond movie Goldeneye, in which computer technician Boris Grishenko repeatedly yells, "Yes! I am invincible!"
entries.chineseNotes: 铅皮药水是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：生效期间，玩家会变成灰色，进入无敌状态，并把子弹反弹回敌人身上。反弹出去的子弹会造成 10 点伤害。它无法防止玩家掉进坑里时受到的伤害。备注：这件道具是在致敬《龙与地下城（Dungeons and Dragons）》中经典的石肤药水（Potion of Stoneskin）。它的标语和效果都可能是在影射《合金装备崛起：复仇（Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance）》里的 Boss 桑德唐纳（Sundowner），他会一边吹嘘自己的无敌，一边用护盾弹开玩家的攻击…… 这句标语也可能是在致敬詹姆斯·邦德电影《黄金眼（GoldenEye）》，其中电脑技术员鲍里斯·格里申科（Boris Grishenko）会反复大喊：“Yes! I am invincible!”

entries.englishNotes: Knife Shield is an active item in Enter the Gungeon Effects: Creates a ring of 8 knives around the player that damage enemies and block enemy bullets. Knives vanish after taking enough damage. If used again before Knife Shield is recharged, the knives are launched forward. Each knife deals 30 damage. Notes: The knives do not carry on between floors, and disappear once the player enters a new floor. Knife Shield can be activated while the player already has knives, adding another 8 knives to the ring. Knives will destroy some objects, such as breakables and barrels.
entries.chineseNotes: 刀盾是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：它会在玩家周围生成 8 把环绕飞刀，这些飞刀既能伤害敌人，也能挡下敌方子弹。飞刀承受足够伤害后就会消失。如果在刀盾尚未充能完毕前再次使用，道具会把这些飞刀一口气向前射出。每把飞刀都会造成 30 点伤害。备注：这些飞刀不会带到下一层，玩家一进入新楼层它们就会消失。即使玩家已经有一圈飞刀，刀盾依然可以再次激活，再额外增加 8 把。飞刀还会摧毁一些场景物件，例如可破坏物和炸药桶。

entries.englishNotes: Proximity Mine is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Places a mine that explodes when an enemy comes near it, dealing 60 damage. Notes: The mine does not seem to explode upon contact with mimics, even when already revealed. This item is a reference to the Proximity Mine in GoldenEye 007.
entries.chineseNotes: 感应地雷是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：它会放下一枚地雷，当敌人靠近时就会爆炸，并造成 60 点伤害。备注：这枚地雷似乎不会在接触拟身怪（Mimic）时爆炸，即便拟身怪已经显形也是如此。这件道具是在致敬《黄金眼 007（GoldenEye 007）》中的感应地雷（Proximity Mine）。

entries.englishNotes: Bullet Time is an active item. Effects: Slows down time by 70% while active. The player's movement, firing and reload speeds are unaffected by the slowdown. Notes: Bluer Guon Stone - If the player also has Blue Guon Stone, the size and rotation speed of the Guon Stone is increased and it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they... Thrown For A Bloop - If the player also has Blooper, while Bullet Time is active, a Blooper orbits the player and continually fires at enemies. Trivia: The tagline "Dodge This" is a reference to a quote made by the character Trinity in The Matrix.
entries.chineseNotes: 子弹时钟是一个主动道具。效果：激活后会让时间减速 70%。玩家自身的移动、射击和换弹速度则完全不受减速影响。备注：“Bluer Guon Stone”联动：如果玩家同时拥有蓝色滚石（Blue Guon Stone），那么滚石（Guon Stone）的体积和旋转速度都会提升，并且会在玩家周围保持固定距离旋转…… “Thrown For A Bloop”联动：如果玩家同时拥有笨头枪（Blooper），那么在子弹时钟激活期间，一把笨头枪（Blooper）会环绕玩家并持续朝敌人开火。趣味冷知识：它的标语“Dodge This”是在致敬《黑客帝国（The Matrix）》中角色崔妮蒂（Trinity）说过的一句台词。

entries.englishNotes: Decoy is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Places a decoy at the users current position. This decoy will distract enemies, who will target the decoy instead of the player. If a decoy is placed in a Shop, it will also distract the shopkeeper, allowing the player to steal from that shop while the Decoy is inside. Notes: Items cannot be purchased from a shop with a decoy in it; stealing is the only option. The item itself is a reference to the Body Replacement Technique from Naruto, in which the user replaces themselves with a log to avoid an opponents attack. The Kage Bunshin synergy refers to the Kage Bunshin technique from Naruto.
entries.chineseNotes: 诱饵是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：它会在玩家当前位置放下一个诱饵。这个诱饵会吸引敌人的注意力，让敌人改为攻击诱饵而不是玩家。如果把诱饵放在商店里，它还会分散店主的注意力，让玩家可以在诱饵仍在店内时偷取该商店里的物品。备注：只要商店里放着诱饵，玩家就无法正常购买物品；偷窃会变成唯一选项。这件道具本身是在致敬《火影忍者（Naruto）》中的替身术（Body Replacement Technique），使用者会用一截木头代替自己来躲开对手的攻击。Kage Bunshin 联动则是在致敬《火影忍者（Naruto）》中的影分身之术。

entries.englishNotes: Bubble Shield is an unused passive item. Effects: Deflects bullets for a few seconds, similar to Potion of Lead Skin. Recharges once every two rooms cleared. Trivia: It is unknown why this item was cut.
entries.chineseNotes: Bubble Shield 是一个未使用的被动道具。效果：它会像铅皮药水（Potion of Lead Skin）一样，在数秒内偏转子弹。每清理两个房间后会重新充能一次。趣味冷知识：目前仍不清楚这件道具为什么会被从正式内容中移除。

entries.englishNotes: Supply Drop is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. The Marine starts with this item. Effects: Upon use, calls in a crate containing Ammo at the players position. Cannot be used if the player is holding a gun with full ammo. Notes: Supply Drops have a very low chance to drop on room clear. Players can stack multiple uses if they acquire more than one Supply Drop. Calling in an ammo drop on the Sell Creeps grate allows the player to sell the resulting pickup.
entries.chineseNotes: 空投补给是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具，海军陆战队员（The Marine）开局就会携带它。效果：使用后，会在玩家当前位置呼叫一个装有 Ammo 的补给箱。如果玩家当前手持的枪械弹药已满，则无法使用。备注：空投补给在清房后有极低概率自然掉落。如果玩家获得多个空投补给，就可以把多次使用次数叠加起来。若在 Sell Creep 的铁栅栏上呼叫一份弹药空投，玩家就可以把掉下来的拾取物卖掉。

entries.englishNotes: Makarov is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: This gun is based on the real life Russian firearm Pistolet Makarova (Makarov's Pistol). This gun's description references The Cosmonaut, who was originally going to be found in the game as a Gungeoneer, but got cut during development. "This gun is no better or worse than any other gun." is a reference to equality under the doctrine of Communism, which was prevalent during the creation of the Makarov.
entries.chineseNotes: 马卡洛夫枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。备注：这把枪是以现实中的俄制手枪马卡洛夫手枪（Pistolet Makarova，意为“Makarov's Pistol”）为原型。它的描述提到了宇航员（The Cosmonaut），这个角色原本计划作为一名枪牢勇士出现在游戏中，但在开发过程中被删掉了。“这把枪不比其他任何枪更好，也不比它们更差。”这句话则是在影射共产主义 doctrine 下强调平等的观念，而马卡洛夫正是在那样的背景下诞生的。

entries.englishNotes: The Budget Revolver is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It serves as The Convict's starter gun in both games. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Convict or The Paradox. The gun appears to be modeled after a variety of snub-nosed revolvers.
entries.chineseNotes: 廉价左轮是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它在这两部作品里都是囚犯（The Convict）的初始武器。备注：这把枪无法丢弃。除了囚犯（The Convict）和 The Paradox 之外，其他任何枪牢勇士都无法获得它。这把枪的外形看起来参考了多种短枪管左轮手枪。

entries.englishNotes: Deck4rd is a gun that fires high-damage exploding bullets. Notes: Although classified as semi-automatic, the Deck4rd is functionally automatic, as its rate of fire does not benefit from tapping the fire button instead of holding it down. Blade Runner - If the player has Origuni, magazine size of both guns is increased by 50%. Running Blades - If the player has Knife Shield, killing enemies with Deck4rd has a high chance to spawn Knife Shield knives. Trivia: This gun is a reference to Deckard's gun from Blade Runner. "Unicorn of Handguns" is a reference to the unicorn in Deckard's dreams.
entries.chineseNotes: 德克福德是一把会发射高伤害爆炸子弹的枪械。备注：虽然它被归类为半自动武器，但在实际手感上更接近全自动，因为连续点按开火键并不会比按住开火键获得更高的射速。Blade Runner 联动：如果玩家同时拥有 Origuni，两把枪的弹匣容量都会提高 50%。Running Blades 联动：如果玩家用德克福德击杀敌人，就有很高概率生成 Knife Shield 的飞刀。趣味冷知识：这把枪是在致敬《银翼杀手（Blade Runner）》中德卡德（Deckard）使用的手枪。“Unicorn of Handguns”则是在影射德卡德梦中的独角兽。

entries.englishNotes: Elephant Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: ETG Fires a conical spread of bullets with strong knockback. Notes: So called elephant guns were large guns designed for the hunting of large animals (such as elephants) during safaris in Africa in the 19th century. The Ammonomicon description "These guns were once used to make pianos out of teeth." is a reference to the practice of hunting elephants to harvest their tusks for ivory, a materi... The Ammonomicon description "An inelegant weapon for a less civilized age" is a reference to the iconic line "This is the weapon of a Jedi Knight.
entries.chineseNotes: 猎象枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。效果：在《挺进地牢》中，它会发射一片带有强力击退效果的锥形散射子弹。备注：所谓的猎象枪，是 19 世纪非洲 safari 中专门用于猎杀大体型动物（例如大象）的大型枪械。《枪械图鉴》（Ammonomicon）中的描述“这些枪曾被用来把牙齿做成钢琴。”是在影射人们为了获取象牙而猎杀大象的做法，象牙曾经是制造钢琴键的材料之一…… 另一句描述“属于一个不那么文明时代的粗鄙武器”则是在致敬那句经典台词：“This is the weapon of a Jedi Knight.”

entries.englishNotes: Unfinished Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires piercing projectiles. Notes: Despite not actually igniting enemies, the Unfinished Gun is in the FIRE gun class. As a consequence, having the Unfinished Gun in the player's inventory makes them less likely to find other guns in the FIRE class that actually burn enemies. The Blacksmith can be seen working on an Unfinished Gun.
entries.chineseNotes: 枪坯是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。它会发射可穿透的投射物。备注：尽管它实际上并不会点燃敌人，枪坯依然属于 FIRE gun class。因此，只要玩家背包里带着枪坯，就会降低找到其他真正能点燃敌人的 FIRE 类枪械的概率。玩家还能看到铁匠（The Blacksmith）正在打造一把枪坯。

entries.englishNotes: The Vulcan Cannon is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the Vulcan Cannon is called the Gull Cannon. Notes: According to its ammonomicon entry, the Vulcan Cannon is wielded by the Gatling Gull, however its visual appearance is starkly different to the minigun the Gatling Gull can be see... The gun is a reference to a common trope of action films where people will carry handheld M134 Miniguns, which in reality is very difficult and impractical. The Not Quite As Mini synergy is a reference to the Minigun from Team Fortress 2 in appereance and function and subsequently reaffirms this.
entries.chineseNotes: 火神加农炮是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。在 Apple Arcade 版《逃出地牢》中，它被称作 Gull Cannon。备注：根据《枪械图鉴》条目，火神加农炮由 Gatling Gull 使用；不过它的视觉造型与 Gatling Gull 实际手持的 minigun 差别相当大…… 这把枪是在致敬动作电影里常见的一种桥段：角色会手持 M134 Minigun 扫射，但在现实中这样做其实既困难又不实用。Not Quite As Mini 联动则是在外观和功能上致敬了《军团要塞 2（Team Fortress 2）》中的 Minigun，也进一步强化了这一点。

entries.englishNotes: The Marine Sidearm is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It serves as The Marine's starting gun in both games. It has a good accuracy and a stronger knockback than other starting guns. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Is technically automatic, as tapping the fire button does not provide a faster fire rate than holding it down. After defeating The Marine's past with his alternate skin, an alternate skin of this weapon is unlocked.
entries.chineseNotes: 海军陆战队配枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。它在这两部作品里都是海军陆战队员（The Marine）的初始武器。它拥有不错的精准度，而且击退力比其他初始武器更强。备注：这把枪无法丢弃。它在机制上其实算是全自动，因为连续点按开火键并不会比按住开火键获得更高的射速。使用海军陆战队员（The Marine）的替代皮肤通关其过去关卡后，还会解锁这把武器的替代外观。

entries.englishNotes: Gamma Ray is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a green laser beam that slightly curves towards enemies. Continually shooting an enemy with the laser for 0.25 seconds will poison them for 3.5 seconds. Bug This beam is capable of extinguishing the fireplace in the Keep of The Lead Lord, despite not leaving any goop in its base form. Notes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Gamma Ray did not curve towards enemies. The Ammonomicon quote "Mean Green" may be a reference to The Hulk, who was transformed by exposure to gamma radiation. The Beta Ray synergy is likely a reference to beta decay particles.
entries.chineseNotes: 伽玛射线是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：它会发射一束绿色激光，并会稍微向敌人弯曲追踪。若持续用激光照射同一个敌人 0.25 秒，就会让其中毒 3.5 秒。Bug：尽管这束激光在基础形态下不会留下任何 goop，它依然能够熄灭 Keep of The Lead Lord 里的壁炉。备注：在 Supply Drop 更新之前，伽玛射线并不会朝敌人弯曲。《枪械图鉴》中的引语“Mean Green”可能是在致敬绿巨人（The Hulk），因为他正是暴露在 gamma radiation 下后发生了变异。Beta Ray 联动则很可能是在影射 beta decay particles。

entries.englishNotes: Robot's Right Hand is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It serves as The Robot's starter weapon in both games. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Robot or The Paradox. Robot's Right Hand has the largest magazine size of the starting guns.
entries.chineseNotes: 机器人右手会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。它在这两部作品里都是机器人（The Robot）的初始武器。备注：这把枪无法丢弃。除了机器人（The Robot）和 The Paradox 之外，其他任何枪牢勇士都无法获得它。机器人右手在所有初始武器中拥有最大的弹匣容量。

entries.englishNotes: The Rogue Special is a Gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It is the starting weapon of The Pilot. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Pilot or The Paradox. While reloading, the gun emits three jets of fog in the shape of a radiation symbol.
entries.chineseNotes: 流氓专用枪是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它是飞行员（The Pilot）的初始武器。备注：这把枪无法丢弃。除了飞行员（The Pilot）和 The Paradox 之外，其他任何枪牢勇士都无法获得它。换弹时，这把枪会喷出三股形状像辐射标志的雾气。

entries.englishNotes: Eye of the Beholster is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires instant laser projectiles. The final shot of each cylinder fires a projectile shaped like a pink Beadie. Notes: The Beholster wields this gun. As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine. The friendly Beadie spawned at the end of each cylinder is actually a bullet, not a charmed enemy. This is why the player cannot kill it and why it only travels in a straight line.
entries.chineseNotes: 嗜枪怪之眼是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。效果：它会发射瞬发激光投射物。每个弹巢中的最后一发会射出一枚外形像粉色 Beadie 的投射物。备注：Beholster 会使用这把枪。由于它属于 Beholster 的武器，因此也可以被放到 Beholster Shrine 上。每个弹巢最后生成的那只友方 Beadie，本质上其实是一枚子弹，而不是被魅惑的敌人。这也就是为什么玩家无法杀死它，以及它为什么只会沿直线飞行。

entries.englishNotes: H4mmer is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Rapid-fires a barrage of bullets. The last shot in every magazine is a high-damage hammer. ETG This hammer has a 20% chance to stun enemies for 3.5 seconds. Notes: This gun may be a reference to the trick of "fanning the hammer", where a single-action revolver is fired by flicking the hammer of the weapon rather than pulling the trigger in o... Bug There is an issue with the Hammer and Nail synergy where if the ammo count exceeds what the base gun would have without the 50% maximum ammo, the current ammo count would reve...
entries.chineseNotes: 悍马枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《挺进地牢：枪械亡者之家（Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead）》中。效果：它会高速连射出一阵弹幕。每个弹匣的最后一发都会变成一把高伤害铁锤。在《挺进地牢》中，这把铁锤有 20% 概率使敌人眩晕 3.5 秒。备注：这把枪可能是在致敬“fanning the hammer”这种技巧，也就是不通过正常扣动扳机，而是快速拨动单动左轮的击锤来连续射击…… Bug：Hammer and Nail 联动存在一个问题，如果当前弹药量超过了基础武器在没有 50% 最大弹药加成时本应拥有的上限，那么当前弹药数就会显得异常……

entries.englishNotes: Stinger is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires an explosive missile, and three homing (Rad: 10 Vel: 150) bees that seek out and attack enemies. When the missile impacts an enemy or obstacle, it will create 5 additional bees. Notes: Giving the Bee Hive and RPG to the Muncher will always result in a Stinger. The Stingers long reload time makes it especially affected by the 'gun-dropping' technique. This gun is based on the real world FIM-92 Stinger, a United States military ground-to-air missile launcher. Its ability to fire bees is a double-meaning based on its name.
entries.chineseNotes: 机尾炮会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。效果：它会发射一枚爆炸导弹，以及三只追踪蜜蜂（Rad: 10 Vel: 150），这些蜜蜂会自动寻找并攻击敌人。当导弹命中敌人或障碍物时，还会额外生成 5 只蜜蜂。备注：把蜂巢（Bee Hive）和 RPG 一起喂给 Muncher，一定会得到一把机尾炮。机尾炮极长的换弹时间，让它特别适合利用“gun-dropping”技巧。这把枪是以现实中的 FIM-92 Stinger 为原型，那是一种美国军方使用的单兵地对空导弹发射器。它能够射出蜜蜂的能力，则是建立在名字双关之上的设计。

entries.englishNotes: Old Goldie is a shotgun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a tight spread of shotgun pellets that deal significant damage, but have short range. Increases Coolness by 1. Increases damage by 70% while held. Notes: When a gun is Duct Taped to Old Goldie, it too will receive the 70% damage boost. However, when Old Goldie is duct taped to another gun, the damage boost is lost. Old Goldie is in the SHOTGUN gun class, meaning it benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. This weapon's name is likely a play on "Golden Oldie", a nostalgic term used to refer fondly to old music or movies.
entries.chineseNotes: 古金色枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把霰弹枪。效果：它会发射一束非常集中的霰弹，伤害相当可观，但射程较短。持有时会额外增加 1 点 Coolness，并让伤害提高 70%。备注：如果把另一把枪用 Duct Tape 粘在古金色枪上，那么那把枪也会获得这 70% 的伤害加成；但如果是把古金色枪粘到别的枪上，这个伤害加成就会消失。古金色枪属于 SHOTGUN gun class，因此可以享受 Shotgun Affinity 联动加成。这把武器的名字很可能是在玩“Golden Oldie”这个词的双关，它通常用来怀旧地指代老歌或老电影。

entries.englishNotes: MAC10 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon that fires bursts of 4 bullets. Notes: The item's subtext is a reference to the Biggie Smalls song 'Come On'. The synergy with the Eyepatch is a reference to Kurt Russell as Snake Plissken in the 1981 movie Escape from New York. The MAC10 is based on the real life machine pistol of the same name.
entries.chineseNotes: 英格拉姆Mac10式冲锋枪是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪，会每次四连发射击。备注：这件物品的副标题是在致敬 Biggie Smalls 的歌曲《Come On》。它与 Eyepatch 的联动，则是在致敬库尔特·拉塞尔（Kurt Russell）于 1981 年电影《纽约大逃亡（Escape from New York）》中饰演的 Snake Plissken。MAC10 本身则是以现实中的同名 machine pistol 为原型。

entries.englishNotes: AKEY-47 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon that fires keys. Shooting a locked chest or door will unlock it. Alternatively, opening a chest or door with the AKEY-47 equipped will unlock it for free, if the player has no keys. Notes: The AKEY-47 Has identical statistics to the AK-47. Once unlocked, the AKEY-47 may appear for sale in Flynts shop for 3 keys. Its bullets cannot open the padlocks on the trapdoor to the Oubliette and the tunnel to the Resourceful Rat's Lair; however, they can be opened by hand for free with the AKEY-47 e...
entries.chineseNotes: AKEY-47 是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪，会发射钥匙。用它射击上锁的宝箱或门时，就能将其打开。另一种方式是：如果玩家当前没有钥匙，只要在装备 AKEY-47 时去开启宝箱或门，也可以免费解锁。备注：AKEY-47 的各项数值与 AK-47 完全相同。解锁后，AKEY-47 可能会在 Flynt 的商店里以 3 把钥匙的价格出售。它发射出来的钥匙子弹无法打开通往 Oubliette 的活板门锁，或通往 Resourceful Rat's Lair 的隧道锁；不过如果玩家手持 AKEY-47，则依然可以徒手免费打开这些锁……

entries.englishNotes: M16 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the M16 is called the iCarbine. Effects: Reloading the M16 alternates between a burst-fire mode which shoots a burst of three bullets with every trigger pull, and a grenade launcher mode which lobs explosive projectiles. XTG Grenades are affected by gravity, falling quickly towards the bottom of the screen. Notes: Grenades consume 1 ammo each, the exact same as a regular bullet. Allowing the M16 to reload passively by switching to another weapon for a few seconds does not switch the gun's form. An old, unused appearance for the M16 exists within Enter the Gungeons assets.
entries.chineseNotes: M16 会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。在 Apple Arcade 版《逃出地牢》中，M16 被称作 iCarbine。效果：每次换弹后，M16 都会在两种形态之间切换：一种是每次扣动扳机会打出三连发的 burst-fire 模式，另一种则是发射爆炸投射物的 grenade launcher 模式。在《逃出地牢》中，这些榴弹会受到重力影响，很快坠向屏幕底部。备注：每发榴弹同样只消耗 1 点弹药，和普通子弹完全一样。如果玩家切换到别的武器，靠被动等待几秒让 M16 自动装填，并不会切换它当前的形态。在《挺进地牢》的资源文件中，还能找到 M16 一套旧的、未使用的外观。

entries.englishNotes: Polaris is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Has three different levels, with the gun leveling up after enough enemies are slain. Higher levels deal more damage. Killing 11 enemies will level up Polaris to level 2. Killing 20 more enemies (31 total) will level up Polaris to level 3. Notes: Polaris' level does not affect its selling price. While level 1 and 3 fire a single projectile of varying damage, level 2 fires two. Losing hearts in ways that do not deal damage to the player, such as the Vampire, do not affect the level of Polaris.
entries.chineseNotes: 北极星是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：它共有三个不同等级，在击杀足够数量的敌人后会升级。等级越高，伤害也越高。击杀 11 个敌人后，北极星会升到 2 级；再额外击杀 20 个敌人（总计 31 个）后，会升到 3 级。备注：北极星的等级不会影响它的出售价格。1 级和 3 级时，它会发射单发、伤害不同的投射物；而 2 级时则会一次射出两发。像吸血鬼（Vampire）那样会扣除心数、但不算对玩家造成伤害的效果，并不会影响北极星的等级。

entries.englishNotes: Patriot is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires high-accuracy bullets that can pierce up to 3 times. Rate of fire increases the longer the trigger is held. Notes: This gun is a reference to the weapon of the same name in Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater. The Ammonomicon quote "Gun Eater" is a reference to the title of the game- "Snake Eater". This gun's description is a reference to the convoluted and hard to follow plot of the Metal Gear series, and how people still enjoy it regardless.
entries.chineseNotes: 爱国者是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪。效果：它会发射高精度、最多可穿透 3 次的子弹。按住扳机时间越久，射速就会越快。备注：这把枪是在致敬《合金装备 3：食蛇者（Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater）》中同名的武器。《枪械图鉴》中的引语“Gun Eater”是在影射游戏标题里的“Snake Eater”。这把枪的描述则是在拿《合金装备（Metal Gear）》系列那种复杂又难以理清的剧情开玩笑，同时也在说大家即使看得晕头转向，依然乐在其中。

entries.englishNotes: The Rusty Sidearm is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It serves as The Hunters starting gun in both games. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Hunter or The Paradox. After defeating The Hunter's past with her alternate skin, an alternate skin for this gun is unlocked.
entries.chineseNotes: 生锈的配枪会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。它在这两部作品里都是猎人（The Hunter）的初始武器。备注：这把枪无法丢弃。除了猎人（The Hunter）和 The Paradox 之外，其他任何枪牢勇士都无法获得它。使用猎人的替代皮肤通关其过去关卡后，还会解锁这把枪的替代外观。

entries.englishNotes: Unicorn Horn is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It fires a continuous rainbow beam with strong knockback that homes in on enemies. A unique song is played whenever it is fired. Notes: The song played by the Unicorn Horn is Unicorn Power!, composed by Enter the Gungeon sound designer Erica Hampson. If the player has Helix Bullets, the 2 rainbows fired will follow the same path, and will not lose their homing property, unlike most other homing guns with Helix Bullets. The rainbow beam and unique music track of this weapon may be a reference to the Parry Gripp song Space Unicorn.
entries.chineseNotes: 独角兽之角会出现在《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中。它会发射一束持续不断、带有强力击退效果并会追踪敌人的彩虹光束。每次开火时，还会播放一段独特的音乐。备注：独角兽之角播放的曲子名叫《Unicorn Power!》，由《挺进地牢》的音效设计师 Erica Hampson 创作。如果玩家拥有 Helix Bullets，那么射出的两道彩虹会沿着同一路径前进，而且与大多数拥有 Helix Bullets 的追踪枪不同，它们不会失去追踪能力。这把武器的彩虹光束和独特音乐，也可能是在致敬 Parry Gripp 的歌曲《Space Unicorn》。

entries.englishNotes: Scope is a passive item. Effects: Reduces shot spread by 60%, increasing accuracy. Notes: 360 Yes Scope - While holding A.W.P. or Sniper Rifle, spinning 360 degrees before firing makes the shot deal 50% more damage. The buff can stack up to 6 times, and each instance of the buff will last for 3 seconds, providing an additional 1.5x damage multiplier for each instance. If player has several Scopes or Lich's Eye Bullets, the buff can stack 1.5x damage multiplier for each item. Trivia: The synergy M1 Multi-Tool refers to the MIDA Multi Tool of Destiny, which grants increased movement speed and boasts a very high reload.
entries.chineseNotes: 瞄准镜是一个被动道具。效果：它会将射击散布降低 60%，从而显著提高精准度。备注：360 Yes Scope 联动：当玩家手持 A.W.P. 或 Sniper Rifle 时，如果在开火前先原地转满 360 度，这一枪就会额外造成 50% 伤害。这个 buff 最多可以叠加 6 层，每层持续 3 秒，并且每层都额外提供 1.5 倍伤害倍率。如果玩家拥有多个瞄准镜，或持有 Lich's Eye Bullets，那么这个 buff 还能按每件物品继续叠加 1.5 倍伤害倍率。趣味冷知识：M1 Multi-Tool 联动是在致敬《命运（Destiny）》中的 MIDA Multi Tool，那把武器能提升移动速度，而且拥有极快的装填速度。

entries.englishNotes: Ration is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Heals the player for two full hearts. Automatically used if the player runs out of health. If the player has more than one active item, the Ration has to be the selected active item to be automatically used upon death. Notes: Has no effect for The Robot. Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Ration was an tier item. This is a direct reference to the rations from Metal Gear, both in terms of its description and function, as well as the auto-heal property.
entries.chineseNotes: 口粮是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：它会回复玩家两整颗心。如果玩家生命值归零，它会自动触发。若玩家同时拥有多个主动道具，那么只有当口粮被选为当前主动道具时，才会在死亡时自动使用。备注：它对机器人（The Robot）没有效果。在 Supply Drop 更新之前，口粮曾是一件 tier item。无论是描述、功能，还是自动回血这一特性，它都明显是在致敬《合金装备（Metal Gear）》系列中的 rations。

entries.englishNotes: Fortune's Favor is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: While active, enemy bullets are repulsed from the player- curving around them. Notes: The curving effect is not powerful enough to redirect bullets with significant velocity (e.g. Sniper Shell projectiles) or bigger bullets (e.g. Cannonbalrog's disappearing attack). The synergy "Pretty Good" is a reference to the popular quote from Metal Gear Solid, "You're pretty good". The synergy "What a Thrill" is a reference to the song "Snake Eater" from Metal Gear Solid 3, sung by Cynthia Harrel.
entries.chineseNotes: 财富的青睐 是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：生效期间，敌方子弹会从玩家身边被排斥开来，并绕着玩家弯曲飞过。备注：这种弯曲效果并不足以改变那些速度特别快的子弹（例如 Sniper Shell 的投射物），或者体积较大的子弹（例如 Cannonbalrog 消失攻击时的弹幕）。“Pretty Good”联动是在致敬《合金装备（Metal Gear Solid）》中的一句名台词“You're pretty good”。“What a Thrill”联动则是在致敬《合金装备 3：食蛇者（Metal Gear Solid 3）》中的歌曲《Snake Eater》，由 Cynthia Harrel 演唱。

entries.englishNotes: Jetpack is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Use to toggle the jetpack on and off. While active, the players Movement Speed is increased by 2.5 and the player gains flight, but cannot dodge roll. Passing over pools of flammable goop such as oil or Phaser Spider webs while the jetpack is active will set them on fire. Notes: The Barrage Shot synergy is a reference to the game Charge Shot, which the weapon of the same name in Enter the Gungeon is a reference to. Bug If Jetpack is active when entering the Resourceful Rat's Lair, the loading screen will be the default loading screen instead of the rat variant.
entries.chineseNotes: 喷气包是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具。效果：使用后可以在开启和关闭喷气包之间切换。喷气包开启时，玩家的 Movement Speed 会提高 2.5，并获得飞行能力，但无法进行 dodge roll。若玩家在喷气包启动期间掠过 oil 或 Phaser Spider webs 等可燃 goop，就会把它们点燃。备注：Barrage Shot 联动是在致敬游戏《Charge Shot》，而《挺进地牢》中同名武器本身也是在致敬那款游戏。Bug：如果玩家在进入 Resourceful Rat's Lair 时喷气包仍处于开启状态，那么加载画面会显示默认版本，而不是老鼠专属版本。

entries.englishNotes: Raiden Coil is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires a continuous laser that homes in on and damages all on-screen enemies. Notes: Like other guns, this will not fire if the player is up against a wall and trying to shoot into the wall, even though this gun shoots through walls. Backup Gun indirectly doubles this gun's damage due to its direct homing. This gun is a large reference to the Raiden series.
entries.chineseNotes: 闪电枪会出现在《挺进地牢》中。它会发射一束持续不断的激光，能够追踪并伤害屏幕上所有敌人。备注：和其他枪械一样，如果玩家紧贴墙壁并尝试朝墙里开火，它也不会射击，尽管这把枪本身其实是可以穿墙攻击的。由于它的追踪效果非常直接，Backup Gun 会间接让这把枪的伤害翻倍。这把枪整体上是在致敬《雷电（Raiden）》系列。

entries.englishNotes: Bomb is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. It also appears in Exit the Gungeon as a powerup. Effects: ETG Throws a bomb onto the ground that explodes after a short delay, dealing 60 damage to nearby enemies. XTG Triggers an explosion at the position of every enemy on screen. Notes: The bomb's explosion can open secret rooms. Bomb can be used to hurt Cannonbalrog while it is performing its invulnerable attack. The Bomb's synergy with the Bow is likely a reference to the Legend of Zelda series.
entries.chineseNotes: 炸弹是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动道具，在《逃出地牢》中则作为 powerup 出现。效果：在《挺进地牢》中，玩家会把一颗炸弹扔到地上，短暂延迟后爆炸，对附近敌人造成 60 点伤害。在《逃出地牢》中，它会在屏幕上每个敌人的位置触发一次爆炸。备注：炸弹的爆炸可以炸开秘密房间。当 Cannonbalrog 正在使用无敌攻击时，炸弹也能够对其造成伤害。炸弹与 Bow 的联动，则很可能是在致敬《塞尔达传说（The Legend of Zelda）》系列。

entries.englishNotes: Ice Bomb is an active item. Effects: Throws a bomb that deals 8 damage and freezes enemies. Notes: Smart Bombs - If the player has Homing Bullets or Crutch, Ice Bomb will home in on enemies. Battle Mode - If the player has Orbital Bullets, creates three bombs which orbit around the player, blocking bullets and exploding in contact with enemies. Super Bomberpal - If the player has Lil' Bomber, it fires two bombs instead of one, charges twice as fast, and has 20% lower reload time.
entries.chineseNotes: 冰炸弹是一个主动道具。效果：它会扔出一枚造成 8 点伤害并冻结敌人的炸弹。备注：Smart Bombs 联动：如果玩家拥有自导引子弹（Homing Bullets）或拐杖（Crutch），冰炸弹就会追踪敌人。Battle Mode 联动：如果玩家拥有环绕子弹（Orbital Bullets），则会生成三枚环绕玩家旋转的炸弹，它们既能挡子弹，也会在碰到敌人时爆炸。Super Bomberpal 联动：如果玩家拥有里尔炸弹枪（Lil' Bomber），那么它会一次发射两枚炸弹、充能速度翻倍，并且换弹时间降低 20%。

entries.englishNotes: Magic Sweet is a passive item. Effects: Adds 1 heart container. Increases movement speed by 1.5. Increases damage by 15%. Notes: Sweetness and Light - If the player also has Magic Lamp, it fires three projectiles at a time. The shots deal 25% of their original damage, but the genie deals full damage. Like other items that grant heart containers, this item gives The Robot 7 to 10 upon pickup. Trivia: This item is a reference to the item Rare Candy from the Pokémon series, which levels up the Pokémon by 1, explaining the all stats up. The Sweetness and Light synergy is a reference to an English idiom.
entries.chineseNotes: 魔术糖是一个被动道具。效果：增加 1 个心之容器。移动速度提高 1.5。伤害提高 15%。备注：Sweetness and Light 联动：如果玩家同时拥有 Magic Lamp，它就会一次发射三枚投射物。这些子弹只会造成原本 25% 的伤害，但精灵本身依然造成完整伤害。和其他会增加心之容器的物品一样，这件道具在被机器人（The Robot）拾取时会给予它 7 到 10 的奖励。趣味冷知识：这件物品是在致敬《宝可梦（Pokémon）》系列中的道具 Rare Candy，它会让宝可梦提升 1 级，因此也呼应了这里的全属性提升。Sweetness and Light 联动则是在引用一句英语习语。

entries.englishNotes: Heavy Bullets is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Increases damage by 25%. Halves bullet speed. Doubles knockback. Notes: Thrown guns will increase in size, and will remain large even after picking them back up. This is purely a cosmetic effect and has no effect on gameplay. Due to the higher knockback and slower shot speed, this item can be detrimental with short-ranged guns. Rocket-Powered Bullets will mitigate the lower bullet velocity. Trivia: This item is a reference to the game Heavy Bullets. The icon of the item resembles the appearance of ammunition in Heavy Bullets. The statement about their colors is a reference to the colorful graphics in the aforementioned game.
entries.chineseNotes: 重子弹（Heavy Bullets）是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品，也是一种子弹强化。 效果：提高 25% 伤害。子弹速度减半。击退效果翻倍。 备注：被投掷出去的枪会变大，并且即使重新捡起后也依然保持巨大。这个效果纯属外观变化，不会影响实际玩法。由于击退更高且射速更慢，这件物品在短射程枪械上有时反而会带来负面影响。火箭驱动的子弹（Rocket-Powered Bullets）可以缓解子弹速度降低的问题。 趣味冷知识：这件物品是在致敬游戏《Heavy Bullets》。它的图标也很像《Heavy Bullets》里的弹药外观。关于颜色的描述，则是在致敬那款游戏色彩鲜明的画面风格。

entries.englishNotes: Cartographer's Ring is a passive item. Effects: New floors have a 50% chance to be mapped out. Does not reveal secret rooms. Notes: Cartographer's Ring does not reveal the trapdoor to the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.chineseNotes: 制图师的戒指是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：每层新楼层有 50% 概率直接显示地图。不会显示隐藏房间。 备注：Cartographer's Ring 不会显示机敏老鼠巢穴（Resourceful Rat's Lair）的活板门位置。

entries.englishNotes: Rocket-Powered Bullets is a passive item and bullet upgrade that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the shot speed of the player's bullets by 50%. Increases damage by 10%. Increases rate of fire by 10%. Notes: The active item exclusive to The Pilot's past that fires a volley of rockets shares an identical sprite with Rocket-Powered Bullets.
entries.chineseNotes: 火箭驱动的子弹（Rocket-Powered Bullets）是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品，也是一种子弹强化。 效果：玩家子弹的飞行速度提高 50%。伤害提高 10%。射速提高 10%。 备注：飞行员（The Pilot）过去关卡专属、可发射一轮火箭的那个主动物品，与火箭驱动的子弹使用了完全相同的精灵图。

entries.englishNotes: Bionic Leg is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases Movement Speed by 1.5. Grants a piece of Armor. Notes: The quote upon picking up this item is a reference to a Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi quote. The synergy Brave New World is a reference to the Disney movie, "The Little Mermaid". The synergy is also a reference to the novel Brave New World by Aldous Huxley
entries.chineseNotes: 仿生腿（Bionic Leg）是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：移动速度提高 1.5。获得 1 点护甲。 备注：拾取这件物品时的台词是在致敬《星球大战 6：绝地归来》（Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi）中的一句台词。Brave New World 联动名是在致敬迪士尼电影《小美人鱼》，同时也影射了阿道司·赫胥黎的小说《美丽新世界》（Brave New World）。

entries.englishNotes: Ballot is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases Coolness by 3, which decreases the cooldown of active items and increases the chance of items dropping upon clearing a room. Notes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases Coolness. This item being in a gun-themed game is likely a reference to the Abraham Lincoln quote "The ballot is stronger than the bullet." It may also simply be due to the words ballot and bullet being near homophones.
entries.chineseNotes: 选票（Ballot）是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：增加 3 点冷静度（Coolness），从而缩短主动物品冷却时间，并提高清房后掉落物品的概率。 备注：如果通过某种方式获得这件物品的重复品，还会继续提高冷静度。这件物品出现在一个以枪为主题的游戏里，很可能是在致敬亚伯拉罕·林肯的名言：“The ballot is stronger than the bullet.” 也可能只是因为 ballot 和 bullet 这两个词读音相近。

entries.englishNotes: Ammo Synthesizer is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Adds a 10% chance to regain 5% of the currently held gun's maximum ammo (rounded down) upon killing an enemy. Notes: If 5% of a gun's maximum ammo is less than 1 (less than 20 maximum ammo), Ammo Synthesizer will restore 1 ammo when it activates. Works well with Ancient Hero's Bandana as it will restore 4x more ammo effectively making it easier to not run out. Works well with Makeshift Cannon if it activates.
entries.chineseNotes: 弹药合成器（Ammo Synthesizer）是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：击杀敌人时，有 10% 概率回复当前手持枪械最大弹药量的 5%（向下取整）。 备注：如果某把枪最大弹药量的 5% 小于 1，也就是最大弹药量低于 20，那么弹药合成器触发时仍会回复 1 发弹药。它与远古英雄头巾（Ancient Hero's Bandana）配合良好，因为实际回复量会变成 4 倍，更不容易打空弹药。若对临时大炮（Makeshift Cannon）触发，也会非常好用。

entries.englishNotes: Eyepatch is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Increases damage by 35%. Increases shot spread by 65%, making shots less accurate. As this serves as a multiplier on a gun's existing shot spread, guns that are more accurate by default will be less affected. Notes: This item is a reference to the Norse god Odin, in particular the poem Völuspá of the Poetic Edda, where it is explained that Odin cast his eye into the well 'Mímisbrunnr' in exch... The Iroquois synergy is a reference to the 1981 film Escape from New York, where the protagonist Snake Plissken wears an eyepatch over his left eye and carries a MAC10.
