entries.chineseNotes: 眼罩（Eyepatch）是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一个被动物品。 效果：伤害提高 35%。子弹散布提高 65%，因此射击会变得更不精准。由于这是对枪械原有散布的倍率修正，所以原本就更精准的枪受影响会相对较小。 备注：这件物品是在致敬北欧神话中的奥丁（Odin），尤其是《诗体埃达》中的《女先知的预言》（Völuspá），其中提到奥丁将自己的一只眼投入米米尔之泉（Mímisbrunnr）以换取智慧。Iroquois 联动是在致敬 1981 年电影《纽约大逃亡》（Escape from New York），其中主角 Snake Plissken 左眼戴着眼罩，并携带一把 MAC10。

entries.englishNotes: Metronome is a passive item. Effects: Grants a +2% damage bonus for each enemy killed. The effect maxes out at +150% weapon damage (75 consecutive kills). The bonus is reset if the player takes damage, changes guns, or drops their gun. Picking up a new gun does not reset the bonus, effectively transferring the bonus to the new gun. Notes: Adding currently equipped guns to a Muncher will reset the bonus as if switching guns. Playing Winchester's minigame will reset the bonus. Receiving and losing the Windgunner from Sprun will not reset the bonus.
entries.chineseNotes: 节拍器（Metronome）是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：每击杀一个敌人，就获得 +2% 伤害加成。该效果最高可叠加到 +150% 武器伤害，也就是连续击杀 75 个敌人。若玩家受到伤害、更换枪械或丢下枪械，这个加成就会重置。拾取一把新枪不会重置加成，等于把这个加成直接转移到新枪上。 备注：把当前装备的枪丢进吞枪怪（Muncher）里，会像切枪一样重置这个加成。游玩 Winchester 的小游戏也会重置该加成。通过 Sprun 获得或失去 Windgunner 时，则不会重置该加成。

entries.englishNotes: Disintegrator is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires a powerful disintegrating laser after a long charge time. Notes: The Disintegrator appears to be a reference to the "M-920 Cain" heavy weapon from Mass Effect 2, having a similar design and very long charge time before firing.
entries.chineseNotes: 分解者（Disintegrator）是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会在较长时间蓄力后发射一道强力的分解激光。 备注：分解者看起来是在致敬《质量效应 2》（Mass Effect 2）中的重武器 “M-920 Cain”，两者在外形设计和超长蓄力后开火这一点上都很相似。

entries.englishNotes: Blunderbuss is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It charges up to fire a short ranged shotgun blast of bouncing bullets. Notes: Despite firing like a shotgun, the Blunderbuss is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. There is a glitch where firing Blunderbuss by charging until just before the fully charged animation causes the gun to fire without using ammo. The description in the Ammonomicon is a reference to Farmer Giles of Ham by J.R.R. Tolkien.
entries.chineseNotes: 喇叭枪（Blunderbuss）是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它会蓄力后发射一团短射程、可反弹的霰弹。 备注：尽管它的开火方式像霰弹枪，喇叭枪并不属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此无法享受 Shotgun Affinity 联动的加成。有一个漏洞是，在蓄力到即将进入满蓄力动画前开火，会导致喇叭枪射击时不消耗弹药。它在枪弹百科（Ammonomicon）中的描述是在致敬 J.R.R. 托尔金的《哈姆的农夫吉尔斯》（Farmer Giles of Ham）。

entries.englishNotes: Pulse Cannon is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires a spread of 6 projectiles. Notes: This weapon may be a reference to the M41A Pulse Rifle in the film Aliens. The entry for the Pulse Cannon in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a monstrous Bullet Kin with another Bullet Kin head emerging out of its toothy maw.
entries.chineseNotes: 脉冲炮（Pulse Cannon）是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会一次发射 6 枚散射弹丸。 备注：这把武器可能是在致敬电影《异形 2》（Aliens）中的 M41A Pulse Rifle。实体版枪弹百科（Physical Ammonomicon）里，脉冲炮的条目旁边还画着一只怪异的子弹人（Bullet Kin）涂鸦，它满是牙齿的嘴里又伸出了另一个子弹人的头。

entries.englishNotes: Cactus is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It rapidly fires low-damage needles. Notes: "1000 Needles!" is a reference to a move used by the Cactuar, a recurring enemy from the Final Fantasy series, who resembles a walking cactus. "Succulent DOOM" may possibly be a reference to the album Special Herbs by MF DOOM. The "undiscovered Chamber" in the Cactus' description may be the unused Old West floor.
entries.chineseNotes: 仙人掌（Cactus）是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。它会快速发射伤害较低的尖刺。 备注：“1000 Needles!” 是在致敬《最终幻想》系列中的常驻敌人仙人掌怪（Cactuar）所使用的招式，它的外形像一株会走路的仙人掌。“Succulent DOOM” 则可能是在致敬 MF DOOM 的专辑《Special Herbs》。仙人掌描述中提到的“未被发现的 Chamber”，可能指的是未启用的西部主题楼层。

entries.englishNotes: Flame Hand is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Notes: As the Flame Hand deals fire-type damage, it deals no damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares. ETG Due to the high knockback and large size of the fireballs, they can hit the same enemy multiple times. 2D6 + Int mod is a reference to Dungeons and Dragons
entries.chineseNotes: 火焰之手（Flame Hand）是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。 备注：由于火焰之手造成的是火焰属性伤害，因此它无法对 Muzzle Wisps 和 Muzzle Flares 造成伤害。因为火球体积较大且击退很强，它们有时会对同一个敌人造成多次命中。“2D6 + Int mod” 则是在致敬《龙与地下城》（Dungeons and Dragons）。

entries.englishNotes: Shotbow is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires shotgun spreads of 6 crossbow bolts at once. Notes: The Shotbow is in the SHOTGUN gun class and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. This gun's description could be a reference to the episode Tuvix, from the TV show Star Trek Voyager, where two characters were merged into one as a result of a transporter (a sor... It could also be a reference to the short story by George Langelaan titled "The Fly" originally published in the June 1957 issue of Playboy magazine, which inspired two films of t...
entries.chineseNotes: 霰弹弓是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。它会一次射出 6 支呈霰弹状散开的弩箭。 备注：霰弹弓属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此可以享受 Shotgun Affinity 联动加成。这把枪的描述可能是在致敬科幻剧《星际迷航：航海家号》（Star Trek Voyager）中的《图维克斯》（Tuvix）一集，剧中两名角色因一次传送器事故而融合成了同一个人。它也可能是在致敬乔治·朗格兰（George Langelaan）的短篇小说《苍蝇》（The Fly），这篇作品最初发表于 1957 年 6 月号《花花公子》（Playboy）杂志，并启发了两部同名电影。

entries.englishNotes: Junk is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. It often appears after destroying chests. Effects: Junk has no inherent effect, however it does interact with some other systems and items. When playing as The Robot, each piece of Junk increases damage by a permanent additive 5%. The damage increase persists no matter what happens to the Junk. If the player has Ser Junkan, collecting Junk levels him up, making him more powerful. Notes: Junk has a chest destruction loot weight of 0.45. If the player is in possession of Ser Junkan, the chest destruction loot weight of junk is multiplied by 1.5. If the player is in possession of at least one key, the chest destruction loot weight of junk is multiplied by 3.
entries.chineseNotes: 垃圾是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。它经常会在摧毁宝箱后出现。 效果：垃圾本身没有固有效果，但会与其他系统和物品产生联动。当玩家使用机器人（The Robot）时，每一份垃圾都会永久额外提高 5% 伤害。无论之后垃圾发生什么，这个伤害加成都会保留。如果玩家拥有废料爵士（Ser Junkan），收集垃圾会让他升级并变得更强。 备注：垃圾在宝箱摧毁掉落表中的权重为 0.45。如果玩家持有废料爵士，垃圾的该掉落权重会乘以 1.5。如果玩家至少持有一把钥匙，垃圾的该掉落权重会乘以 3。

entries.englishNotes: RUBE-ADYNE MK.II is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires purple lasers that can each bounce up to 2 times. Notes: RUBE-ADYNE MK.II is the upgraded version of the RUBE-ADYNE Prototype. The RUBE-ABYNE MK.II multiplies the loot weight of the RUBE-ADYNE Prototype by 2, doubling its likelihood of appearing. Curiously, this does not work in reverse. Obtaining the RUBE-ADYNE Prototype does not make the RUBE-ADYNE MK.II more likely to appear.
entries.chineseNotes: 鲁布-亚达因型2号（RUBE-ADYNE MK.II）是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。 效果：发射紫色激光，每一道激光最多可反弹 2 次。 备注：鲁布-亚达因型2号是鲁布-亚达因原型（RUBE-ADYNE Prototype）的升级版本。鲁布-亚达因型2号会把鲁布-亚达因原型的掉落权重乘以 2，也就是让后者的出现概率翻倍。比较特别的是，这个效果不会反向生效。获得鲁布-亚达因原型并不会让鲁布-亚达因型2号更容易出现。

entries.englishNotes: Com4nd0 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires explosive homing (Rad: Vel: 220) missiles. Notes: This gun is one of the six wielded by the Beholster. When used by the Beholster, it fires homing rockets visually identical to those fired by the player. As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine. This gun is based on the real world M202 FLASH rocket launcher.
entries.chineseNotes: 魔鬼司令是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一把枪械。 效果：发射会追踪敌人的爆炸导弹（Rad: Vel: 220）。 备注：这把枪是 Beholster 所持有的六把枪之一。当由 Beholster 使用时，它发射出的追踪火箭在视觉效果上与玩家发射的完全一致。由于这把枪属于 Beholster 的武器，因此它也可以被放上 Beholster Shrine。这把枪的原型是现实中的 M202 FLASH 火箭发射器。

entries.englishNotes: Glacier is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires bouncing ice cubes which leave trails of water, explode, and freeze enemies. Like most explosions, these ice blasts can destroy enemy bullets. Notes: The ice cubes bounce off Cursed Pots and will destroy them without exploding. Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, Glacier was a gun. The Unsinkable synergy is a reference to the RMS Titanic, an ocean liner that was claimed to be 'unsinkable', which famously sank after a collision with an iceberg.
entries.chineseNotes: 冰川是《挺进地牢》中的一把枪械。 效果：发射可反弹的冰块。冰块会留下水迹、发生爆炸，并冰冻敌人。和大多数爆炸一样，这些冰爆也能摧毁敌方子弹。 备注：这些冰块会从诅咒罐（Cursed Pots）上反弹，并在不发生爆炸的情况下将其摧毁。在《高级地牢与巨龙》（Advanced Gungeons & Draguns）更新之前，冰川是一把枪。Unsinkable 联动是在致敬 RMS Titanic，这是一艘曾被称作“永不沉没”的远洋客轮，但后来却因撞上冰山而著名地沉没了。

entries.englishNotes: Utility Belt is a passive item. Effects: Grants an extra active item slot. Increases maximum ammo by 20%. Notes: Gunnerang - If the player also has Boomerang, thrown guns deal 50% more damage. M1 Multi-Tool - If the player also has M1, M1's reload time is decreased by 20%, and its magazine size and maximum ammo are increased. If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, increases the maximum ammo count and grants another active item slot. Trivia: Unused: Wonderful Toys - (CustomSynergyType.USEFUL_TOOLS) If the player has Escape Rope, it causes an unknown effect. This item and its synergy with the Boomerang are likely a reference to Batman's utility belt and Batarangs, and possibly his aversion to guns.
entries.chineseNotes: 实用皮带是一个被动物品。 效果：提供一个额外的主动物品栏位。最大弹药量提高 20%。 备注：Gunnerang 联动下，如果玩家还持有回力镖（Boomerang），被扔出的枪会多造成 50% 伤害。M1 Multi-Tool 联动下，如果玩家还持有 M1，那么 M1 的装弹时间会减少 20%，弹夹容量和最大弹药量都会增加。如果通过某种方式拿到了这件物品的复制品，还会继续增加最大弹药量，并再提供一个主动物品栏位。 趣味冷知识：有一个未启用的联动 Wonderful Toys（CustomSynergyType.USEFUL_TOOLS），如果玩家持有 Escape Rope，会触发未知效果。这件物品本身以及它和回力镖的联动，很可能是在致敬蝙蝠侠的多功能腰带和蝙蝠镖，也可能是在影射他对枪支的厌恶。

entries.englishNotes: Ring of Miserly Protection is a passive item. Effects: Grants two heart containers. Disappears upon purchasing anything from any shop. Notes: Porkulent - If the player has Pig, purchases will not destroy the ring. The item disappears if it is dropped. The ring cannot be sold, as it disappears immediately even if dropped atop the Sell Creep's grate. Trivia: The Ring of Miserly Protection is a reference to a ring in Dark Souls called the "Ring of Favor and Protection", which boosts several stats but breaks when removed.
entries.chineseNotes: 吝啬保护之戒是一个被动物品。 效果：提供两个心之容器。只要从任何商店购买任意物品，它就会消失。 备注：Porkulent 联动下，如果玩家持有猪（Pig），购物不会摧毁这枚戒指。如果把这件物品丢在地上，它也会直接消失。这枚戒指无法出售，因为即便把它丢到 Sell Creep 的格栅上，它也会立刻消失。 趣味冷知识：吝啬保护之戒是在致敬《黑暗之魂》（Dark Souls）中的“宠爱与庇护戒指”（Ring of Favor and Protection），那枚戒指可以提升多项属性，但一旦摘下就会破碎。

entries.englishNotes: Backpack is a passive item. Effects: Allows the player to hold an extra active item. The active items are switched by default by pressing Shift (keyboard) or up on the D-pad (controller). Notes: M1 Multi-Tool - If the player also has M1, its reload time is decreased by 20%, and its magazine size and maximum ammo are increased. Mak Pak - If the player has Makarov, Makarov's maximum ammo is increased by 30%. While holding Marakov, it occasionally fires a homing bullet at an enemy for free. MM6 Mini Rocket - If the player also has Jetpack, activating the Jetpack fires a rocket in the direction of the crosshair. This has a cooldown of about 5 seconds.
entries.chineseNotes: 背包是一个被动物品。 效果：允许玩家额外携带一个主动物品。默认情况下，可以通过键盘上的 Shift 键或手柄方向键的上方向来切换当前主动物品。 备注：M1 Multi-Tool 联动下，如果玩家还持有 M1，M1 的装弹时间会减少 20%，弹夹容量和最大弹药量也会提高。Mak Pak 联动下，如果玩家持有 Makarov，Makarov 的最大弹药量会提高 30%；在手持 Makarov 时，它还会偶尔免费朝敌人发射一枚追踪子弹。MM6 Mini Rocket 联动下，如果玩家还持有 Jetpack，激活 Jetpack 时会朝准星方向发射一枚火箭，冷却时间约为 5 秒。

entries.englishNotes: Ammo Belt is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Increases maximum ammo by 20%. Notes: The M1 Multi-Tool synergy is a possible reference to the MIDA Multi-Tool, a gun from the game Destiny. An Ammo Belt can be seen among the pile of items that makes up the Resourceful Rats throne in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Bug Entering a Gungeoneer's past with Ammo Belt in your inventory will cause the gun given in that Gungeoneer's past to have its current ammo set to 1.2x of the gun's usual maximu...
entries.chineseNotes: 弹药带是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一个被动物品。 效果：最大弹药量提高 20%。 备注：M1 Multi-Tool 联动可能是在致敬《命运》（Destiny）中的武器 MIDA Multi-Tool。在机敏老鼠巢穴（Resourceful Rat's Lair）里，构成机敏老鼠王座的那堆物品中就能看到一条弹药带。若玩家在持有弹药带的情况下进入某位 Gungeoneer 的过去关卡，该过去里发给玩家的枪，其当前弹药量会被设置为那把枪正常最大值的 1.2 倍。

entries.englishNotes: Cog of Battle is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: When reloading, pressing the fire or reload buttons when the indicator passes a certain mark on the reload bar will instantly reload the weapon. This effectively decreases the reload time. This effect also increases the damage of the next magazine by 75% and also increases the accuracy of the next magazine. Notes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Cog of Battle was a item. All active reload effects (including those of the Cog of Battle) are disabled while the Gun Queue challenge modifier is active. The Cog of Battle's name and active reload mechanic are a reference to the Gears of War series.
entries.chineseNotes: 战争嵌齿轮是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：装弹时，当装弹条指示器经过某个特定标记时按下开火键或装弹键，就能瞬间完成装弹，从而有效缩短装弹时间。这个效果还会让下一个弹夹的伤害提高 75%，同时提升下一个弹夹的精准度。 备注：在《空投补给》（Supply Drop）更新之前，战争嵌齿轮就已经作为一件物品存在了。当 Gun Queue 挑战修正激活时，所有主动装弹效果都会被禁用，其中也包括战争嵌齿轮的效果。战争嵌齿轮的名称和主动装弹机制，都是在致敬《战争机器》（Gears of War）系列。

entries.englishNotes: C4 is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Places explosives on the ground which then can be detonated by using the item again, dealing 60 damage to nearby enemies. Unlike Bomb, does not open secret rooms. Notes: The C4 in game is based on the real-life plastic explosive. C4 is often known for its moldable clay-like quality; however, this doesn't appear in-game. After placing down the C4 charge, the items appearance in the players UI will change to a transmitter switch until the mine is detonated. Dropping C4 after placing down a mine, but before triggering it will automatically detonate the charge, reverting the item back to its regular appearance.
entries.chineseNotes: C4 是《挺进地牢》中的一个主动物品。 效果：在地面放置炸药，再次使用该物品时可以将其引爆，对附近敌人造成 60 点伤害。和 Bomb 不同，它无法炸开隐藏房间。 备注：游戏中的 C4 是以现实中的塑胶炸药为原型。现实里的 C4 经常以可像黏土一样塑形而闻名，但这一点在游戏内并没有体现。放下 C4 炸药后，玩家界面中的该物品图标会变成一个遥控引爆器开关，直到炸药被引爆为止。如果玩家在放置炸药后、引爆前把 C4 丢掉，炸药会自动引爆，而该物品也会恢复成原本的外观。

entries.englishNotes: Map is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon, which is treated more like a pickup. Effects: Fully reveals the layout of the current floor, including secret rooms. Notes: Map is consumed upon pickup and does not appear in the player's inventory. Has a small chance to drop on room clear. Does not reveal the trapdoor to the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.chineseNotes: 地图是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品，但它在实际机制上更接近一种拾取物。 效果：完全显示当前楼层的布局，包括隐藏房间。 备注：地图在拾取后会被直接消耗，不会出现在玩家的物品栏中。它有很小概率在清房后掉落。地图不会显示通往机敏老鼠巢穴（Resourceful Rat's Lair）的活板门。

entries.englishNotes: Honeycomb is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Taking damage spawns 12-20 homing (Rad: 10 Vel: 150) bees that seek out and attack enemies. These bees are not affected by the player's other items, or any of their stats except for bullet scale. Notes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Honeycomb was a item. This item is a reference to The Pain, a character in Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater capable of controlling insects due to a parasite infection giving him the ability to secrete p... It may also be a reference to the Honey Comb item in Terraria, which has an identical effect.
entries.chineseNotes: 蜂窝是《挺进地牢》和《逃出地牢》中都会出现的一个被动物品。 效果：受到伤害时，会生成 12 到 20 只追踪蜜蜂（Rad: 10 Vel: 150）来寻找并攻击敌人。这些蜜蜂不会受到玩家其他物品的影响，也不会受到除子弹大小以外的任何属性影响。 备注：在《空投补给》（Supply Drop）更新之前，蜂窝就已经作为一件物品存在了。这件物品是在致敬《合金装备3：食蛇者》（Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater）中的角色 The Pain，他因为寄生虫感染而获得了操控昆虫的能力。它也可能是在致敬《泰拉瑞亚》（Terraria）中的 Honey Comb 物品，两者效果完全相同。

entries.englishNotes: Master of Unlocking is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Has a 20% chance to give a free Key upon clearing a room if no damage was taken in that room. Notes: In practice, this item can almost fully substitute for infinite unlock items due to the sheer amount of keys it generates (assuming the player has little to no Curse). This item is a reference to the character Jill Valentine from Resident Evil and her ability to pick locks. The item's name is a reference to an infamous voice line in the first Resident Evil game: "Jill, here’s a lockpick.
entries.chineseNotes: 解锁大师是《挺进地牢》中的一个被动物品。 效果：如果玩家在清空某个房间时没有受到伤害，那么有 20% 概率免费获得一把钥匙（Key）。 备注：在实际游玩中，这件物品产出的钥匙数量非常多，因此几乎可以替代那些提供无限开锁能力的物品，前提是玩家身上的诅咒（Curse）很低甚至没有。这件物品是在致敬《生化危机》（Resident Evil）中的 Jill Valentine 以及她的开锁能力。物品名称还引用了第一代《生化危机》里那句很出名的台词：“Jill, here’s a lockpick.”

entries.englishNotes: The RUBE-ADYNE Prototype is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It fires lasers which bounce up to 6 times. Notes: The RUBE-ADYNE MK.II is an upgraded version of this gun. The RUBE-ADYNE weapons may be named after David Rubel, one of the programmers of Enter the Gungeon. As Rubel is one of the lead programmers at Dodge Roll, the Ammonomicon entry of this gun may be a reference to the development of Enter the Gungeon itself, with Rubel needing to p...

entries.englishNotes: Shotgun Full of Hate is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a spread of 6 disparate bullets with different effects. 2 regular bullets with lower range than the other projectiles. 2 poison bullets that create pools of poison goop on impact. As poison is a non-flammable liquid, these bullets are capable of extinguishing fused chests and the fireplace. Notes: The Shotgun Full of Hate being in the SHOTGUN gun class makes it inherently less common than its counterpart, the Shotgun Full of Love which exists in the CHARM class. This is due to the SHOTGUN class being a more common class, meaning more guns exist where possessing them will make the Shotgun Full of Hate less common.

This is due to the SHOTGUN class being a more common class, meaning more guns exist where possessing them will make the 充满仇恨的霰弹枪 less common.

entries.englishNotes: Witch Pistol is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Each bullet fired has a 10% chance to transmogrify enemies into harmless chickens. Notes: Bosses and Mimics are immune to transmogrification. Bullets from the Witch Pistol leave R, N, and Φ shaped scorch marks on impacting a north wall. These are the same symbols created and fired by Bookllets.

These are the same symbols created and fired by Bookllets.

entries.englishNotes: Dragunfire is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires piercing flame bullets that have a 1/9 chance to burn enemies. Notes: The design of the Dragunfire is that of the Bolter from the dystopian science-fantasy universe of Warhammer 40,000. The name of the gun comes from the Dragonfire round which the Bolter can fire. The tagline "Roar" is a reference to the Bolter's unique roaring sound when fired.

Notes: The design of the 龙焰枪 is that of the Bolter from the dystopian science-fantasy universe of Warhammer 40,000. The name of the gun comes from the Dragonfire round which the Bolter can fire. The tagline "Roar" is a reference to the Bolter's unique roaring sound when fired.

entries.englishNotes: Lies is a passive item. Effects: None. Notes: Betrayer's Lies - If the player has Betrayer's Shield, it gains infinite ammo, a much larger magazine size, increased accuracy, and extremely high fire rate. Wicked Sister - If the player also has Magnum, Magnum gets 200 max ammo and a knife on the front of the gun that will block bullets when reloading. The only way to obtain this item is by destroying Brother Albern's chest.

The only way to obtain this item is by destroying Brother Albern's chest.

entries.englishNotes: Face Melter is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Simultaneously fires four streams of musical notes at 90° intervals. Creates an amplifier on the ground when reloading. While firing, the active amplifier will fire bullets of its own in sync with the main gun, including aim angle. Only one amplifier can be active at a time. Creating a new amplifier by reloading will remove any previous ones. Notes: Amplifiers do not have hitboxes, meaning that enemies can potentially stand on top of them and be damaged by all four note streams at once. Possible Bug In co-op, if playing as The Cultist, reloading will drop the amplifier at the other player's location.

entries.englishNotes: T-Shirt Cannon is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires t-shirts with considerable knockback. Notes: This weapon and its high knockback are a reference to an episode of The Simpsons, in which Maude Flanders is shot by a T-Shirt Cannon and falls to her death. The T-Shirt Cannon was first teased in a twitter post from Dodge Roll on 01/02/2015.

The T恤加农炮 was first teased in a twitter post from Dodge Roll on 01/02/2015.

entries.englishNotes: The Membrane is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Notes: The Absent Minded synergy is a reference to the movie The Absent-Minded Professor, which features an extremely bouncy material known as Flubber. Due to its overpenetration, high range, and high projectile count, the Membrane works extremely well with Flak Bullets and Scattershot. This works even better with the synergy due to homing.
entries.chineseNotes: 膈膜枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Due to its overpenetration, high range, and high projectile count, the Membrane works extremely well with Flak Bullets and Scattershot. This works even better with the synergy due to homing.

entries.englishNotes: The Kiln is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires pots that break into 3 bouncing crystals upon hitting an enemy or object. Notes: This gun is a reference to The Legend of Zelda series, where thrown pots can be used to deal damage. The crystals that the pots break into are also a reference to rupees in The Legend of Zelda. Kiln is also an Anagram for Link, the protagonist of The Legend of Zelda.

Notes: This gun is a reference to The Legend of Zelda series, where thrown pots can be used to deal damage. entries.englishNotes: Shock Rifle is a gun that fires a zap of electricity. It can electrify water, and grants immunity to electricity while held. Notes: Assault and Battery - If the player also has the M16, the guns are dual wielded. Battery Powered - If the player has R2G2 or Shock Rounds, Shock Rifle gains a smartphone battery-esque look and automatically regenerates 1 ammo every 4 seconds. When fired at a Gunjurer, the bullets are fired back at a slower speed. Instead of being fired back as a laser-like bullet, it now looks like a thunder bolt. Trivia: Removed: - If the player has Battery Bullets, shot speed is doubled. Likely removed because it includes a starting item.

entries.englishNotes: Trashcannon is a gun that fires a trash bag, which explodes into 6 poison projectiles flying 60° apart from each other that create pools of poison. Notes: Garbage Collecting - If the player has Unity, hitting an enemy with Trashcannon causes it and its bullets to briefly freeze. Grouch - Junk increases the damage of the Trashcannon by 25%. This effect does not stack with multiple Junk (despite the Ammonomicon entry claiming otherwise). Recycling Bin - Starpew transforms the Trashcannon into a recycling bin, causing it to shoot high damage recycled shells instead of trash, and also greatly increasing its magazine...

entries.englishNotes: Singularity is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Spawns a black hole that sucks enemies, bullets, and items into it. Enemies in the black hole take damage. Bullets sucked into the black hole are destroyed. Notes: Bosses are not pulled into the black hole. Consumes any spawned in its proximity. Beam weapons can be used around the Singularity without being pulled in.

entries.englishNotes: Laser Lotus is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires blue laser blasts capable of each piercing 1 enemy. These lasers electrify any water that they pass over. The Laser Lotus does not grant electric immunity, making electrified puddles of water potentially very dangerous to the player. Notes: This gun is a reference to Community. The character Pierce is a "Level 5 Laser Lotus" in his Buddhist renewal community.

entries.englishNotes: Big Iron is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It fires a shotgun spread of 3ETG/2XTG bullets. Notes: ETG Despite Big Iron using bullets in its ammo bar, shell cartridges come out of its compartment when reloading. ETG Despite firing a spread of multiple bullets like a shotgun, the Big Iron is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, instead residing in the PISTOL class. This gun is a reference to the Marty Robbins song of the same name.

This gun is a reference to the Marty Robbins song of the same name.

entries.englishNotes: Amulet of the Pit Lord is a passive item. Effects: Falling into pits no longer deals damage. Trivia: The item is a reference to a famous Magic the Gathering card "Lord of the Pit." The "bargain" referred to in this text refers to the card mechanic whereby you must sacrifice your... The code for Amulet of the Pit Lord is stored in a class called 'RingOfPitFriendship', which may have been an in-development name/theme for the item. Since the player will still go through the falling animation the item can be used to avoid other sources of damage for a brief time.

entries.englishNotes: Gundromeda Strain is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Reduces the health of all enemies and bosses by 25%. Notes: This item reduces the health of both normal enemies and bosses. Gundromeda Strain's effect is equivalent to increasing damage by 33%. Gundromeda Strain allows for quicker kills on bosses due to the bonus not being tied to DPS caps (where additional damage, otherwise, could be ignored).

entries.englishNotes: Gunknight Helmet is a passive item. Effects: Grants two pieces of armor upon pickup. Grants a piece of armor upon entering a new floor. Notes: Cormorant - Acquiring all four Gunknight items transforms the player into Cormorant. Having this item increases the chance to find other Gunknight items. Trivia: The second paragraph of the Ammonomicon entry implies the Resourceful Rat stole his helmet.

Notes: Having this item increases the chance to find other Gunknight items. One of the projectiles that can be fired by Pedestal Mimics takes the form of a spinning Gunknight Greave.

Cormorant - Acquiring all four Gunknight items transforms the player into Cormorant. Having this item increases the chance to find other Gunknight items.

entries.englishNotes: Gunknight Armor is a passive item. Effects: Grants a piece of armor upon pickup. Grants a piece of armor upon entering a new floor. Notes: Cormorant - Acquiring all four Gunknight items transforms the player into Cormorant. Having this item increases the chance to find other Gunknight items. Dropping this item, then picking it up again will not produce more armor. Trivia: Unused: Constitution Check - (CustomSynergyType.ARMORED_GUNKNIGHT) If the player has AC-15, it causes an unknown effect.

entries.englishNotes: Heart Synthesizer is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: If the player is not at full health, adds a 20% chance to gain a Half Heart upon completing a room without taking damage. Notes: Heart Synthesizer has no benefit for The Robot, as it cannot use hearts. It still does, however, contribute to the synergy mentioned above. CMV In the Chinese Mobile Version of Enter the Gungeon, the sprite of Heart Synthesizer has been changed to resemble the logo of Chinese game developer XD, the company responsible...

entries.englishNotes: Oiled Cylinder is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Decreases reload time by 50%.
entries.chineseNotes: 油缸 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Decreases reload time by 50%.

entries.englishNotes: Shelleton Key is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Allows any chest or locked door to be opened without using a Key. Increases Curse by 1 while held. Notes: The Shelleton Key can only substitute regular Keys, and cannot open locks that require special keys. This includes Cell locks (which require Cell Keys), the hatch to the Resourceful Rat's Lair (which requires the Gnawed Key), and Rat Chests/Locks (which require Rat Keys). The Shelleton Key cannot be used to purchase items from Flynt.
entries.chineseNotes: 骷髅钥匙 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Allows any chest or locked door to be opened without using a Key. Increases Curse by 1 while held. Notes: The 骷髅钥匙 can only substitute regular Keys, and cannot open locks that require special keys. The 骷髅钥匙 cannot be used to purchase items from Flynt.

entries.englishNotes: Bloody Eye is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Decreases enemy bullet speed by 15%. Notes: This item can be counterproductive; since bullets are slower than usual, the time the bullets are in midair is increased, meaning the player can run into bullets that would have a... This item's name, appearance and effects are a reference to particularly potent form of a drug named Red Eye in Cowboy Bebop which, when taken, could heighten the user's reaction... The Fear the Old Blood Synergy is a reference to the game Bloodborne, known for its use of blood vials and "trick" weapons.

entries.englishNotes: Double Vision is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: While active, doubles all bullets fired by the player, but reduces accuracy. Notes: If you have multiple active items, switching off Double Vision while active will end the effect prematurely. The two bullets fired can be desynced by using the item while the current gun is in-between shots. This is easiest to achieve with slow firing weapons like Sniper Rifle or A.W.P.. This item and its Ammonomicon quote are a reference to a scene in the 1993 film Tombstone.
entries.chineseNotes: 复视药酒 is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: While active, doubles all bullets fired by the player, but reduces accuracy. Notes: If you have multiple active items, switching off 复视药酒 while active will end the effect prematurely. The two bullets fired can be desynced by using the item while the current gun is in-between shots. This is easiest to achieve with slow firing weapons like Sniper Rifle or A.W.P.. This item and its Ammonomicon quote are a reference to a scene in the 1993 film Tombstone.

entries.englishNotes: Black Hole Gun is a gun that fires black holes which attract enemies and bullets. The black holes travel slowly across the room until they hit a wall. Notes: Cosmic Horror - If the player has Abyssal Tentacle, black holes fire three tentacles while active. The black hole will also attract friendly projectiles; however, beam type weapons will not be affected. The black hole will not attract projectiles that aren't moving, such as Blockner's shields. Trivia: The gun's Ammonomicon Entry is a reference to the 1994 song "Black Hole Sun" by the American rock band Soundgarden.

entries.englishNotes: Ice Cube is a passive item. Effects: Allows active items to recharge while they are active. Increases Coolness by 3. Notes: Ice To Meet You - If the player also has Heart of Ice, firing with any gun will periodically fire a Heart of Ice projectile that splits and bounces. The probability of firing the ice projectile appears to be inversely proportional to the gun's fire rate. Rapidly clicking with a charge weapon will fire an ice projectile without consuming ammo. Trivia: The synergy Willing to Sacrifice - is a reference to the song "Cold As Ice" by Foreigner.

Trivia: The synergy Willing to Sacrifice - is a reference to the song "Cold As Ice" by Foreigner.

entries.englishNotes: Ghost Bullets is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets pierce through enemies and pass through obstacles (including tables). Each bullet can pierce through one enemy. Bullets that have pierced an enemy deal half damage.
entries.chineseNotes: 幽灵子弹 is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets pierce through enemies and pass through obstacles (including tables). Each bullet can pierce through one enemy. Bullets that have pierced an enemy deal half damage.

entries.englishNotes: Potion of Gun Friendship is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: While active, increases damage by 30%, doubles fire rate, decreases reload times by 70%, and multiplies knockback by 10. Notes: Switching to another active item while the Potion of Gun Friendship is active will prematurely end the effect. Fixed Bug Prior to the A Farewell to Arms update, if the player were to drop Potion of Gun Friendship while the Friend to Gun and Bullet was active, the copy gun became permanent. The copied gun was carried over to the Past.
entries.chineseNotes: 枪之友谊药水 is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. The copied gun was carried over to the Past.

entries.englishNotes: Tangler is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires shotgun blasts of rectangular bullets that bounce off walls. Enemies hit will gain a rectangular appearance. Notes: Despite being a shotgun, the Tangler is in the SILLY gun class. This means that unlike most other shotguns, the Tangler is not affected by the Shotgun Affinity synergy. Jammed enemies, the Bookllet variant in the R&G Dept., and the ghost of Blockner are unaffected by Tangler's visual distortion effect.
entries.chineseNotes: 矩形枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires 常规霰弹枪 blasts of rectangular bullets that bounce off walls. Enemies hit will gain a rectangular appearance. Notes: Despite being a 常规霰弹枪, the 矩形枪 is in the SILLY gun class. This means that unlike most other shotguns, the 矩形枪 is not affected by the Shotgun Affinity synergy. entries.englishNotes: Gungeon Ant is a gun that alternates between firing spreads of bullets that leave behind oil and ones that burn enemies and ignite oil upon reloading. Notes: This gun is a reference to the real-life Bullet Ant. Known for its extremely painful sting, victims have likened it to "being shot". The Great Queen Ant synergy is a reference to Earthworm Jim, specifically The Evil Queen Pulsating, Bloated, Festering, Sweaty, Pus-filled, Malformed, Slug-for-a-Butt.

entries.englishNotes: Alien Engine is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires tiny invisible pellets with a very short range, extending only slightly past the gun's visible muzzle flash. Sets enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Pushes the player backwards, away from the direction aimed, while firing. Notes: Despite its downsides, this gun has among the highest DPS in the Enter the Gungeon, making it useful for hit-and-run tactics in a Boss battle, or in combination with a longer rang... In September of 2016, Dodge Roll programmer Brent Sodman listed the Alien Engine as his favourite gun in Enter the Gungeon, and Shotgrub as his least favourite.

entries.englishNotes: Crestfaller is a gun that fires bullets which freeze enemies. Notes: Crestfallen Soul - If the player also has Gun Soul, dodge roll speed is increased by 20% and Crestfaller deals 50% more damage if the player dies and has not yet retrieved their s... Five O'Clock Somewhere - If the player also has Shotga Cola, Shotgun Coffee, Double Vision, Potion of Gun Friendship, Potion of Lead Skin, or Old Knight's Flask, reloading will fi... As with Gungine, pressing the reload button while the clip is full will still clear liquids. Trivia: Altered: Diazepam - Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, this gun was included in Diazepam.

entries.englishNotes: Proton Backpack is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires two slow-moving simultaneous beams; A thick homing (Rad: 18 Vel: 420) red laser that deals very low damage. A thin electric homing (Rad: 15 Vel: 420) beam that deals the majority of the Proton Backpack's DPS. Notes: This gun is a reference to the iconic Proton Pack ghost fighting weapon from the Ghostbusters franchise. The Ammonomicon quote "Crossing Streams" is in reference to the repeated warning in Ghostbusters (1984) "Don't cross the streams", as crossing the streams from multiple Proton Bac...

entries.englishNotes: Grasschopper is a very tiny gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires powerful blasts that have very strong knockback and delete bullets, like a small Blank effect. Notes: The explosions created on impact are not blanks, despite being able to delete bullets. They will not open secret rooms or trigger Ammolets. If a Gunjurer catches and returns a shot from this gun, the blank effect will still damage the player. This weapon is a reference to the Noisy Cricket from Men in Black.

Notes: The explosions created on impact are not blanks, despite being able to delete bullets. They will not open secret rooms or trigger Ammolets. If a Gunjurer catches and returns a shot from this gun, the blank effect will still damage the player. This weapon is a reference to the Noisy Cricket from Men in Black.

entries.englishNotes: Winchester Rifle is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: The Winchester Rifle appears to be based off the real world Winchester Model 1866, the first 'Winchester Rifle' created by the Winchester Repeating Arms Company. Although classified as semi-automatic, the Winchester Rifle is functionally automatic, as its rate of fire does not benefit from tapping the fire button instead of holding it down. The Ammonomicon description "Guns and Deviltry" is a direct reference to Swords and Deviltry, the first collected volume of Fafhrd and the Gray Mouser short stories.
entries.chineseNotes: 温切斯特步枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: The 温切斯特步枪 appears to be based off the real world 温彻斯特霰弹枪 Model 1866, the first '温切斯特步枪' created by the 温彻斯特霰弹枪 Repeating Arms Company. Although classified as semi-automatic, the 温切斯特步枪 is functionally automatic, as its rate of fire does not benefit from tapping the fire button instead of holding it down. The Ammonomicon description "Guns and Deviltry" is a direct reference to Swords and Deviltry, the first collected volume of Fafhrd and the Gray Mouser short stories.

entries.englishNotes: Grey Mauser is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Stealths the player upon reloading an empty clip. While stealthed, enemies do not see the player, and they may steal from merchants. Deals 400% damage if fired while the bearer is stealthed. Notes: Followers like Wingman will not shoot while the invisibility effect is active. This gun's name is a portmanteau of an early semi-automatic pistol design, the Mauser C96, and the thief from Fritz Leiber's fantasy books known as the Gray Mouser. This gun shares its name with the Grey Mauser, the NPC alongside Frifle, from which you unlock this gun.

While stealthed, enemies do not see the player, and they may steal from merchants. Deals 400% damage if fired while the bearer is stealthed. Notes: Followers like Wingman will not shoot while the invisibility effect is active. This gun's name is a portmanteau of an early semi-automatic pistol design, the Mauser C96, and the thief from Fritz Leiber's fantasy books known as the Gray Mouser. This gun shares its name with the 格雷毛瑟枪, the NPC alongside Frifle, from which you unlock this gun.

entries.englishNotes: Ser Manuel's Revolver is an unobtainable gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: Ser Manuel's Revolver is wielded by Ser Manuel in his bossfight in the Halls of Knowledge. Due to the way enemy AI is coded in Enter the Gungeon, companions and enemies which use weapons disconnected from their sprite hold real guns which are theoretically usable in the... However, the fact that the Ser Manuel's Revolver has a unique description in the Ammonomicon suggests that it may have at one point been intended for player use.
entries.chineseNotes: 曼努埃尔爵士的左轮 is an unobtainable gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: 曼努埃尔爵士的左轮 is wielded by 曼努埃尔爵士 in his bossfight in the Halls of Knowledge. Due to the way enemy AI is coded in Enter the Gungeon, companions and enemies which use weapons disconnected from their sprite hold real guns which are theoretically usable in the... However, the fact that the 曼努埃尔爵士的左轮 has a unique description in the Ammonomicon suggests that it may have at one point been intended for player use.

entries.englishNotes: The Judge is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: The last shot of each magazine will fire one of the following special projectiles, chosen at random; A green bullet that deals 4 damage, Poisons (Dur: 2.5s DPS: 3) enemies, and leaves a small puddle of poison goop. A flare that deals 4 damage and sets enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Notes: This gun is a reference to Judge Dredd's gun, the Lawgiver. The pickup quote "Hot Shot" is one of the Lawgiver's settings. The entry for The Judge in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a round-faced figure holding a gun.
entries.chineseNotes: 审判者 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: The last shot of each magazine will fire one of the following special projectiles, chosen at random; A green bullet that deals 4 damage, Poisons (Dur: 2.5s DPS: 3) enemies, and leaves a small puddle of poison goop. A flare that deals 4 damage and sets enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Notes: This gun is a reference to Judge Dredd's gun, the 审判者. The pickup quote "Hot Shot" is one of the 审判者's settings. The entry for 审判者 in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a round-faced figure holding a gun.

entries.englishNotes: Machine Fist is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon reloading, the Machine Fist alternates modes between a fast firing minigun and a single shot fist-shaped rocket. With keyboard and mouse controls, the rocket fist will home in towards the players cursor. With gamepad controls, the rocket will update its direction to match the currently held aim direction on the controller. Notes: Like other single shot weapons, firing a rocket fist causes the player to reload the gun immediately after, transforming it. In order to reload, the gun must have remaining ammo greater than the size of the magazine.
entries.chineseNotes: 机械拳头 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon reloading, the 机械拳头 alternates modes between a fast firing minigun and a single shot fist-shaped rocket. With keyboard and mouse controls, the rocket fist will home in towards the players cursor. With gamepad controls, the rocket will update its direction to match the currently held aim direction on the controller. Notes: Like other single shot weapons, firing a rocket fist causes the player to reload the gun immediately after, transforming it. In order to reload, the gun must have remaining ammo greater than the size of the magazine.

entries.englishNotes: Disarming Personality is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. The Pilot starts with this item in both games. Effects: Grants a 15% discount at shops.ETG Grants a 20% discount at shops.XTG Notes: Cannot be sold, even as gungeoneers other than The Pilot. Does not provide a discount for the Gnawed Key or the Prime Primer. If Disarming Personality is bought from a shop, the discount will apply to itself.
entries.chineseNotes: 和善个性 is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. The Pilot starts with this item in both games. Effects: Grants a 15% discount at shops.ETG Grants a 20% discount at shops.XTG Notes: Cannot be sold, even as gungeoneers other than The Pilot. Does not provide a discount for the Gnawed Key or the Prime Primer. If 和善个性 is bought from a shop, the discount will apply to itself.

entries.englishNotes: Rolling Eye is a passive item. Effects: Rolling through bullets reflects them at enemies. Reflected bullets deal 10 damage. Notes: Fear The Old Blood - If the player has Trick Gun, its reload time is decreased by 33% and its fire rate is increased by 20%. Iroquois - If the player has MAC10, its reload time is decreased by 33%, its magazine size is increased by 50%, and its knockback is increased by 50%. If one player on co-op has MAC10 and another player has Rolling Eye, the player who has Rolling Eye equipped will gain the benefits of the synergy for all guns.
entries.chineseNotes: 翻紫眼儿 is a passive item. Effects: Rolling through bullets reflects them at enemies. Reflected bullets deal 10 damage. Notes: Fear The Old Blood - If the player has 魔术枪, its reload time is decreased by 33% and its fire rate is increased by 20%. Iroquois - If the player has 英格拉姆Mac10式冲锋枪, its reload time is decreased by 33%, its magazine size is increased by 50%, and its knockback is increased by 50%. If one player on co-op has 英格拉姆Mac10式冲锋枪 and another player has 翻紫眼儿, the player who has 翻紫眼儿 equipped will gain the benefits of the synergy for all guns.

entries.englishNotes: Ring of Fire Resistance is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Grants immunity to fire.
entries.chineseNotes: 耐火之戒 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Grants immunity to fire.

entries.englishNotes: Bug Boots is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Dodge rolling leaves a trail of poison goop. Grants immunity to poison. Notes: Use of this item allows the player to spread poison over the entrance to Bullet Hell, despite there visually being no ground to spread it on.
entries.chineseNotes: 臭虫靴子 is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Dodge rolling leaves a trail of poison goop. Grants immunity to poison. Notes: Use of this item allows the player to spread poison over the entrance to Bullet Hell, despite there visually being no ground to spread it on.

entries.englishNotes: Fossilized Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon It fires a stream of oil goop. Reloading causes the skull to spit fire, which can ignite the oil. Notes: The plume of flame belched by the Fossilized Gun when reloading solely has the effect of igniting flammable goop. Is is possible to pre-clear rooms by firing blindly into them from the doorway without fully entering, and then igniting the placed oil. This gun is a combined reference to dinosaur fossils, fossil fuels (ie; oil, so named because it is formed from organic remains), and fire-breathing dragons.
entries.chineseNotes: 化石枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon It fires a stream of oil goop. Reloading causes the skull to spit fire, which can ignite the oil. Notes: The plume of flame belched by the 化石枪 when reloading solely has the effect of igniting flammable goop. Is is possible to pre-clear rooms by firing blindly into them from the doorway without fully entering, and then igniting the placed oil. entries.englishNotes: Pea Shooter is a Gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It shoots low-damage peas. Notes: A peashooter is a type of toy blowgun. The term "pea shooter" is also used derogatorily to describe a weak, small-caliber firearm. The Pea Shooter is given to you by Ser Manuel in the tutorial. The Pea Shooter may be a reference to the Plants Vs.
entries.chineseNotes: 射豆枪 is a Gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It shoots low-damage peas. Notes: A peashooter is a type of toy blowgun. The term "pea shooter" is also used derogatorily to describe a weak, small-caliber firearm. The 射豆枪 is given to you by Ser Manuel in the tutorial. The 射豆枪 may be a reference to the Plants Vs.

entries.englishNotes: Gunslinger's Ashes is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires spectral gunslingers that slowly walk forwards and home (Rad: 10 Vel: 180) towards nearby enemies. Every 2 seconds, these gunslingers will fire a bullet at the nearest enemy which deals 5 damage. These spirits typically dissipate after shooting three times. The damage dealt by the spirits themselves making contact with enemies is considerably higher than that of their shots. Notes: Due to the high damage dealt by the spirits themselves making contact with enemies, it is most effective to fire this gun at close range.
entries.chineseNotes: 枪手骨灰 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires spectral gunslingers that slowly walk forwards and home (Rad: 10 Vel: 180) towards nearby enemies. Every 2 seconds, these gunslingers will fire a bullet at the nearest enemy which deals 5 damage. These spirits typically dissipate after shooting three times. The damage dealt by the spirits themselves making contact with enemies is considerably higher than that of their shots. Notes: Due to the high damage dealt by the spirits themselves making contact with enemies, it is most effective to fire this gun at close range.

entries.englishNotes: Luxin Cannon is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon which rapidly fires small, solidified beams of light at enemies. When the magazine is emptied, the tip of the crystal will be launched. Notes: This gun is a reference to The Lightbringer book series by Brent Weeks. "Falsely rumored to have natural healing abilities" is a reference to crystal healing, a pseudoscientific alternative medicine technique that employs stones and crystals. The The Return synergy is a reference to Ganon from the Legend of Zelda video game series.
entries.chineseNotes: 鲁信加农炮 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon which rapidly fires small, solidified beams of light at enemies. When the magazine is emptied, the tip of the crystal will be launched. Notes: This gun is a reference to The Lightbringer book series by Brent Weeks. "Falsely rumored to have natural healing abilities" is a reference to crystal healing, a pseudoscientific alternative medicine technique that employs stones and crystals. The The Return synergy is a reference to Ganon from the Legend of Zelda video game series.

entries.englishNotes: Charmed Bow is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: The Charmed Bow has two different levels of charge. The lower level, requiring the gun to be charged for only 0.2 seconds, fires a mundane arrow. The higher level, requiring the gun to be charged for 0.7 seconds, fires a faster moving and more damaging arrow with a heart trail. Notes: Shots fired from the Orange Guon Stone and Space Friend while the Unbelievably Charming synergy is active are guaranteed to charm enemies. The entry for the Charmed Bow in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a winged Bullet Kin in the role of Cupid, carrying the weapon.
entries.chineseNotes: 魅惑弓 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: The 魅惑弓 has two different levels of charge. The lower level, requiring the gun to be charged for only 0.2 seconds, fires a mundane arrow. The higher level, requiring the gun to be charged for 0.7 seconds, fires a faster moving and more damaging arrow with a heart trail. Notes: Shots fired from the 橙色滚石 and 太空朋友 while the Unbelievably Charming synergy is active are guaranteed to charm enemies. The entry for the 魅惑弓 in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a winged 子弹枪 Kin in the role of Cupid, carrying the weapon.

entries.englishNotes: Portable Turret is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Places a stationary turret that shoots at enemies and blocks enemy projectiles. The turret will be destroyed if it takes enough damage. The turret will disappear after the room has been cleared or enough time has passed. Notes: If the player has the M1911 with Pulp Gungeon, Portable Turret's shots will make the M1911 circling around the player fire. The effect stacks; if there are multiple Portable Turrets firing at once, the circling M1911 will shoot for each one firing. If the player also has Bumbullets, bees will be shot out of the circling M1911 at a very fast rate while Portable Turret is firing.
entries.chineseNotes: 便携式炮塔 is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Places a stationary turret that shoots at enemies and blocks enemy projectiles. The turret will be destroyed if it takes enough damage. The turret will disappear after the room has been cleared or enough time has passed. Notes: If the player has the M1911 with Pulp Gungeon, 便携式炮塔's shots will make the M1911 circling around the player fire. The effect stacks; if there are multiple Portable Turrets firing at once, the circling M1911 will shoot for each one firing. If the player also has Bumbullets, bees will be shot out of the circling M1911 at a very fast rate while 便携式炮塔 is firing.

entries.englishNotes: The Sawed-Off is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, where it serves as The Convict's secondary starting gun. It is a shotgun that fires four short-range bullets with low accuracy. Notes: The Sawed-Off is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. This also means that, according to the rules of how loot is distributed, holding the Sawed-Off makes finding other SHOTGUN type weapons more rare. Notably, this makes it the only starting weapon to technically be part of a synergy.
entries.chineseNotes: 短管霰弹枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, where it serves as The Convict's secondary starting gun. It is a 常规霰弹枪 that fires four short-range bullets with low accuracy. Notes: The 短管霰弹枪 is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. This also means that, according to the rules of how loot is distributed, holding the 短管霰弹枪 makes finding other SHOTGUN type weapons more rare. Notably, this makes it the only starting weapon to technically be part of a synergy.

entries.englishNotes: Cigarettes is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Deals half a heart of damage to the player. This functions exactly the same as all other damage sources in the game, and will break Armor first. Increases Coolness by 1 per use, decreasing the cooldown of active items and increasing the chance of items dropping upon clearing a room. Discards a cigarette onto the floor. If this cigarette lands in flammable goop such as oil or Phaser Spider web, it will ignite it. Notes: Dying to Cigarettes lists "Smoking" as the cause of death on the Ammonomicon death page. Using Cigarettes during a boss fight will count as taking damage, and will prevent the player from obtaining a Master Round.
entries.chineseNotes: 香烟 is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Deals half a heart of damage to the player. This functions exactly the same as all other damage sources in the game, and will break Armor first. Increases Coolness by 1 per use, decreasing the cooldown of active items and increasing the chance of items dropping upon clearing a room. Discards a cigarette onto the floor. If this cigarette lands in flammable goop such as oil or Phaser Spider web, it will ignite it. Notes: Dying to 香烟 lists "Smoking" as the cause of death on the Ammonomicon death page. Using 香烟 during a boss fight will count as taking damage, and will prevent the player from obtaining a Master Round.

entries.englishNotes: Irradiated Lead is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Adds a chance to fire green bullets that poison enemies for 2.5 seconds. The chance for any given projectile to be poisoned is 50% multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the players current gun. Beam-style guns have a flat 25% chance per second to poison enemies they are shooting. Notes: If an explosive projectile (such as from the RPG or Explosive Rounds) is poisoned by Irradiated Lead, it will leave a small pool of poison goop upon exploding. Emerald Weapon is a reference to, and named after, one of the superbosses in the game Final Fantasy VII.
entries.chineseNotes: 辐射铅弹 is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Adds a chance to fire green bullets that poison enemies for 2.5 seconds. The chance for any given projectile to be poisoned is 50% multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the players current gun. Beam-style guns have a flat 25% chance per second to poison enemies they are shooting. Notes: If an explosive projectile (such as from the RPG or Explosive Rounds) is poisoned by 辐射铅弹, it will leave a small pool of poison goop upon exploding. Emerald Weapon is a reference to, and named after, one of the superbosses in the game Final Fantasy VII.

entries.englishNotes: Poison Vial is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Throws a vial which breaks open to create a puddle of poison goop. Notes: If used in the Gorguns boss room, the vial will not shatter upon hitting the floor, instead sinking harmlessly into the water without releasing any poison.
entries.chineseNotes: 毒药瓶 is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Throws a vial which breaks open to create a puddle of poison goop. Notes: If used in the Gorguns boss room, the vial will not shatter upon hitting the floor, instead sinking harmlessly into the water without releasing any poison.

entries.englishNotes: Charm Horn is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon use, charms enemies within an 8 tile radius around the player for 10 seconds. Charms all merchant NPCs within an 8 tile radius of the player for 10 seconds. While charmed, the player can steal from that merchant. Notes: Hornucopia - If the player has Banana, the exploding banana will send out five bouncing explosive bananas instead of three, one of which explodes into 4 additional exploding banan... If used on the Misfire Beast's projection, the projection will home in on the beast and instantly kill it. Does not affect bosses. Trivia: This item is similar to Boromir's horn in The Lord of the Rings.
entries.chineseNotes: 魔力号角 is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon use, charms enemies within an 8 tile radius around the player for 10 seconds. Charms all merchant NPCs within an 8 tile radius of the player for 10 seconds. While charmed, the player can steal from that merchant. Notes: Hornucopia - If the player has Banana, the exploding banana will send out five bouncing explosive bananas instead of three, one of which explodes into 4 additional exploding banan... If used on the Misfire Beast's projection, the projection will home in on the beast and instantly kill it. Does not affect bosses. Trivia: This item is similar to Boromir's horn in The Lord of the Rings.

entries.englishNotes: Plague Pistol is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets fired from the Plague Pistol have a 50% chance to inflict the poison effect on enemies. These bullets also leave a small pool of lingering poison goop on the ground when destroyed. Notes: Because bullets from the Plague Pistol leave non-flammable goop on the ground, they can be used to extinguish chest fuses and the fireplace. The entry for the Plague Pistol in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a Mutant Bullet Kin.

These bullets also leave a small pool of lingering poison goop on the ground when destroyed. Notes: Because bullets from the 瘟疫手枪 leave non-flammable goop on the ground, they can be used to extinguish chest fuses and the fireplace. entries.englishNotes: Plunger is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: The Plunger fires a constant stream of green liquid that inflicts the poison status effect on enemies after 0.5 seconds of contact with the beam. Reloading the Plunger while standing on any goop, including goop that it has created, fully restores the guns ammo. Notes: The phrase Médecins Sans Diplôme in the description is French for Doctors Without Diplomas. The Plunger can be seen used by The Last Human for her poison spray attack in the Robots past. Bug The diacritic marks on é and ô are not supported by Enter the Gungeons font, causing "Médecins Sans Diplôme" to display as "Mdecins Sans Diplme" when read ingame.

entries.englishNotes: Sense of Direction is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon use, an arrow appears that points in the direction of the floor's exit. Notes: Using this item in the Resourceful Rat's Lair will cause the arrow to point in a random direction each time. This item doesn't work in the R&G Dept., possibly because it has the same layout every time, and the player doesn't leave this floor through an elevator. Combined with Blank Companion's Ring or Ring of Triggers, Sense of Direction allows for more frequent activation of their powerful effects.

entries.englishNotes: Gunbow is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires fast-moving bullets that bounce seven times. Notes: Enemies killed by the gunbow are vaporised, and leave no corpse behind. The name of this gun could be a reference to the Monster Hunter series, which features Bowguns.
entries.chineseNotes: 弩炮 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires fast-moving bullets that bounce seven times. Notes: Enemies killed by the gunbow are vaporised, and leave no corpse behind. The name of this gun could be a reference to the Monster Hunter series, which features Bowguns.

entries.englishNotes: Ballistic Boots is a passive item. Effects: Increases movement speed by 2. Notes: Knight Time - If the player has Gunknight Greaves, taking damage briefly stops time. Triple Jump - If paired with Springheel Boots, this item grants a third roll to the two already available. Trivia: The "pair of boots that fire bullets" mentioned in the Ammonomicon entry are the Gunboots.

entries.englishNotes: Lichy Trigger Finger is a passive item. Effects: Increases rate of fire by 25%. Notes: Liches Get Stitches - If the player has Riddle of Lead, killing an enemy grants a temporary fire rate boost, signified by a green arrow above the player's head like those above en... If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases manual fire rate. Trivia: The synergy name "Liches Get Stitches" is a reference to the phrase "snitches get stitches". The item's name is a play on the phrase "itchy trigger finger". In Dungeons & Dragons, a phylactery is a magical item into which a lich binds its soul. As long as its phylactery is intact, a lich cannot be permanently destroyed.

entries.englishNotes: Coin Crown is a passive item in both Enter and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Has a 10% chance to give 5 upon clearing a room without taking damage. Notes: It is easy to unlock with the Briefcase of Cash. If the player already has 50 then the 250 will immediately unlock it. Obtaining the Gold Junk will automatically unlock it. This is because the Gold Junk grants the player 500 when picked up. If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, increases the chance of a 5 shell spawning upon clearing a room and allows multiple Coin Crowns to be activated at once.

entries.englishNotes: Box is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: While wearing the box, enemies will not target the player. Firing a shot while under the box deals double damage and removes the box. Reloading does not remove the box, even if the player has Hip Holster. Notes: Has no effect if used while enemies are already targeting the player. While it has no effect on regular bosses as already stated, you can use this to be hidden for the first phase of the Resourceful Rat’s boss fight. Stealth can be used before entering the boss room but cannot be activated while fighting a boss.

entries.englishNotes: Old Knight's Shield is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Grants two pieces of Armor. Notes: This item is obtained in a secret room in the Halls of Knowledge. To find it, go to the room on the left of the first room after Manuel leaves the player. Talking to Ser Manuel with Old Knight's Helm and Old Knight's Shield after defeating him unlocks the Blockner fight. Once obtained in the Halls of Knowledge, the player will 'unlock' the Old Knight's Shield.

entries.englishNotes: AK-47 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. In the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon, the AK-47 is called the AP-13. Notes: The AK-47 is wielded by some Bullet KinETG, TankersETG, and HollowpointsXTG. ETG If the player feeds the AK-47 and either the Flame Hand or Megahand to a regular Muncher, it will always spit out a Machine Fist. The description of the AK-47 is a reference to the film Jackie Brown.

entries.englishNotes: Cold 45 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Its bullets can freeze enemies. Notes: Its name is a reference to the term "Colt 45" (which is likely the "typographical error" that the Ammonomicon Entry refers to). "Shatterday Night Special" is a reference to the term "Saturday Night Special", a nickname for a cheap, easily disposable handgun normally purchased in a hasty decision to commit... The yeti in the Why's Bullet's Crying? synergy may be a reference to the yetis seen in Fork Parker's holiday profit hike.

entries.englishNotes: Blanks are important pickups that appear in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Notes: Blanks have a unique icon on the map, showing up as It is never explained how Blanks function in-universe, with various dialogues and ammonomicon entries suggesting they emit a sonic frequency, while others state that they send bul... Blanks, like other pickups, can be carried over in the the pasts of various Gungeoneers, potentially offering an advantage if the player is able to amass a stockpile.

entries.englishNotes: Ice Breaker is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: The first two shots of each magazine fire a shotgun blast of freezing ice bullets. The final shot of each magazine fires a single large, metal slug that can pierce up to 5 times. This slug will also pass through breakables without being stopped. Notes: Because the ice shots of the Ice Breaker use the Ice damage type, they deal 1.5x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and do not ignite Coalers. Despite the Ammonomicon entry suggesting otherwise, the metal slugs fired by this gun do not deal any more damage to frozen enemies. Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Ice Breaker had 100 maximum ammo.

The final shot of each magazine fires a single large, metal slug that can pierce up to 5 times. This slug will also pass through breakables without being stopped. Notes: Because the ice shots of the 破冰者 use the Ice damage type, they deal 1.5x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and do not ignite Coalers. entries.englishNotes: Wristbow is an unobtainable gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon that fires fast arrows, similar to the Crossbow. Notes: ETG This gun is used by Skullets, Skullmets, and Knight Bullet Kin. Due to the way enemy AI is coded in Enter the Gungeon, companions and enemies which use weapons disconnected from their sprite hold real guns which are theoretically usable in the... However, the fact that the Wristbow has a unique description in the Ammonomicon suggests that it may have at one point been intended for player use.

entries.englishNotes: Particulator is a gun that fires a large bullet, which then splits into 10 smaller bullets that seek out enemies. Notes: Particle Accelerator - If the player also has Laser Sight, whenever a smaller bullet hits an enemy or object, a laser is automatically fired in its direction. Upon splitting, the large bullet creates a visual blast effect that is similar to a blank but doesn't have any actual effect. The homing projectiles are extremely useful for clearing large numbers of enemies, and for locating enemies off-screen. Trivia: The gun is a reference to a particle accelerator, with the "shower of exotic particles" referring to a Particle shower.

entries.englishNotes: Hegemony Carbine is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. This weapon rapidly shoots bright, white bolts. Notes: The tagline "All The Same" is possibly a reference to the Rifleman's Creed. This gun is used in The Marine's past. It's possible to bring the Galactic Medal of Valor over to his past, which will allow you to acquire the Decorated synergy.

Notes: The tagline "All The Same" is possibly a reference to the Rifleman's Creed. This gun is used in The Marine's past. entries.englishNotes: Helix is a gun that fires two waving bullets. Notes: Double Double Helix - If the player also has Helix Bullets, instead of the Helix Bullets effect being applied to each bullet, Helix's projectiles will be doubled (2 bullets will f... The Helix is a surprisingly powerful weapon, though difficult to use against regular enemies due to the way it fires. If the player also has Remote Bullets, the spread of the two bullets is reduced as they follow the crosshair, making it easier to use on smaller enemies. Trivia: The gun likely refers to DNA, which has a double helix shape that is similar to the bullets' path. The phrase "Splice n' Dice" is a reference to gene splicing.

entries.englishNotes: Gilded Hydra is a gun that fires large bursts of piercing, bouncing bullets. Its magazine size is increased by 1 for each half heart the player is missing, and healing any missing health decreases magazine size. Notes: Ecstasy of Gold - If the player also has Gilded Bullets, Gilded Hydra's damage is increased by 25%. The Gilded Hydra is part of the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. Magazine size will not increase when playing as The Robot. Trivia: The decreasing health adding to the clip size is an allusion to the Lernaean Hydra of Greek mythology, a beast that would sprout two heads in the place of one that was severed.

entries.englishNotes: Space Friend is a passive item and companion in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Follows the player and fires lasers at enemies which deal 5 damage. Blocks enemy bullets. Notes: Lasers fired by the Space Friend can be caught by Gunjurers. The Space Friend is a reference to the arcade shoot-em-up series Raiden. Bug Like other orbitals or orbital companions, the Space Friend may take a few moments to catch up to the player when entering the Aimless Void.

Blocks enemy bullets. Notes: Lasers fired by the 太空朋友 can be caught by Gunjurers. The 太空朋友 is a reference to the arcade shoot-em-up series Raiden. entries.englishNotes: iBomb Companion App is an active item. Effects: Detonates all explosives, explosive enemies, and exploding enemy bullets currently present in the room. Notes: Enemies detonated include: Bombshee Det Trivia: The item is a reference to the popular iPhone and iPad Apple products and their many diverse applications (usually refereed to as "Apps"). The Ammonomicon's quote for the item "One For That" is a reference to the slogan used to advertise these aforementioned products, that slogan being "There's an App for that!". The appearance of this item is a reference to the Pip Boy device from the Fallout franchise.

entries.englishNotes: Aged Bell is an active item in Enter the Gungeon and a Powerup in Exit the Gungeon. Notes: Using the Aged Bell is one simple strategy for unlocking Shelleton Key. This item may be a reference to the Unheard Bell from the manga series Made In Abyss, which is also a magical bell which stops time. It may also be a reference to the magical necromantic bell Saraneth from the Abhorsen series of books by Garth Nix.

entries.englishNotes: Duct Tape is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: When used on two different guns sequentially, they will be taped together and combined. Additional projectiles, taken from the consumed gun, fired alongside the host gun's base projectiles. Additional ammo capacity, equal to the consumed gun's ammo capacity. Notes: Combined guns still only count as one gun when fed to a Muncher. Duct Tape may be a reference to the movie Aliens, In which the protagonist Ripley tapes together an AR and flamethrower near the end of the film while preparing for a rescue.
entries.chineseNotes: 胶带 is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: When used on two different guns sequentially, they will be taped together and combined. Additional projectiles, taken from the consumed gun, fired alongside the host gun's base projectiles. Additional ammo capacity, equal to the consumed gun's ammo capacity. Notes: Combined guns still only count as one gun when fed to a Muncher. 胶带 may be a reference to the movie Aliens, In which the protagonist Ripley tapes together an AR and flamethrower near the end of the film while preparing for a rescue.

entries.englishNotes: Crutch is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: All bullets fired by the player slightly home (Rad: 5 Vel: 250) in towards enemies. Notes: The homing of this item appears to stack with guns whose projectiles already home, allowing them to turn faster towards their targets. Similarly, if duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, bullets home in on enemies more strongly, turning faster to reach their target. Heavy Bullets works well with this item if the player plans to rely on the homing, giving bullets more airtime to home in on enemies.
entries.chineseNotes: 拐杖 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: All bullets fired by the player slightly home (Rad: 5 Vel: 250) in towards enemies. Notes: The homing of this item appears to stack with guns whose projectiles already home, allowing them to turn faster towards their targets. Similarly, if duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, bullets home in on enemies more strongly, turning faster to reach their target. Heavy Bullets works well with this item if the player plans to rely on the homing, giving bullets more airtime to home in on enemies.

entries.englishNotes: Scattershot is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Guns fire triple the projectiles, with each projectile dealing 55% of its original damage. Notes: Dumb Smart Bullets - If the player also has Homing Bullets, bullets that don't home in become larger and deal 50% more damage. Laser Light Show - If the player also has Laser Rifle, Laser Rifle becomes blue and gold, and fires 3 sets of 3 shots in a spread per trigger pull. Each shot bounces once. If all projectiles hit, the damage is effectively increased by 65%.

entries.englishNotes: Napalm Strike is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Sets a large rectangular area on fire, igniting and damaging enemies. Notes: Altered: Napalm B - This synergy used to only let Mega Douser spread Napalm Strike's fire. It can now spread all fire. The category "Smells Great!" in the Ammonomicon is a reference to a quote from the movie Apocalypse Now, "I love the smell of napalm in the morning." Prior to the A Farewell to Arms Update, Napalm Strike was a item.

entries.englishNotes: Infuriating Note is a passive item. It is a note containing a mocking poem written by the Resourceful Rat. It is found randomly in any type of chest, aside from the sixth one which can only be dropped from a Mimic. Effects: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Notes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear: First note: Beat Gungeon Proper. Second note: Have an item get stolen by the Resourceful Rat.

entries.englishNotes: Infuriating Note is a passive item. It is a note containing a mocking poem written by the Resourceful Rat. It is found randomly in any type of chest, aside from the sixth one which can only be dropped from a Mimic. Effects: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Notes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear: First note: Beat Gungeon Proper. Second note: Have an item get stolen by the Resourceful Rat.

entries.englishNotes: Owl is a passive item and companion in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Summons an owl companion that flies close behind the player, blocking enemy bullets. Has a chance to activate a miniature Blank effect when enemy bullets come near the player. Occasionally shoots a single bullet at a random enemy. Notes: The owl's blanks will not open Secret Rooms. Owl's bullets are affected by all bullet modifiers. The Special Delivery synergy is a reference to the Harry Potter franchise, where owls are used to deliver mail and packages between wizards.
entries.chineseNotes: 猫头鹰 is a passive item and companion in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Summons an owl companion that flies close behind the player, blocking enemy bullets. Has a chance to activate a miniature Blank effect when enemy bullets come near the player. Occasionally shoots a single bullet at a random enemy. Notes: The owl's blanks will not open Secret Rooms. 猫头鹰's bullets are affected by all bullet modifiers. The Special Delivery synergy is a reference to the Harry Potter franchise, where owls are used to deliver mail and packages between wizards.

entries.englishNotes: Grappling Hook is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Allows players to hook onto and then pull themselves towards walls at a fast speed. The hook has unlimited range. Hitting an enemy with the hook Stuns it and deals 10 damage. Notes: If the player cannot reach the hook's location (e.g. table blocking the way), the hook will automatically deactivate after a few seconds. The Grappling Hook can be used to cheat in Winchester's Games. Using Grappling Hook to steal items while inside the shop will sometimes cause the player to get caught, even on the first theft. Trivia: This item is a reference to the Hookshot, an item from the The Legend of Zelda franchise.

entries.englishNotes: The Prize Pistol is a gun used only for Winchester's minigames in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: If the player leaves the shooting range mid-game, the Prize Pistol will be removed from their inventory and they will not receive a reward. Although the max ammo of the Prize Pistol is 1, Winchester loads four shots into the gun before the minigame begins, resulting in normally inaccessible ammo values of 4/1, 3/1, an... While the Prize Pistol does not appear in Exit the Gungeon, its sprites and description are present in the games assets.
