entries.englishNotes: Air Strike is an active item. Effects: Calls down a series of explosions over a long rectangular area. Each explosion deals 25 damage. Notes: Air Support - If the player has Explosive Rounds, Air Strike will cover a massive area. Shot Across The Bow - If the player has Gunbow, it fires explosive missiles.
entries.chineseNotes: 空袭 is an active item. Effects: Calls down a series of explosions over a long rectangular area. Each explosion deals 25 damage. Notes: Air Support - If the player has Explosive Rounds, 空袭 will cover a massive area. Shot Across The Bow - If the player has Gunbow, it fires explosive missiles.

entries.englishNotes: Gungeon Pepper is a passive item. Effects: Continuously deals damage to nearby enemies at a rate of 5 damage per second. Notes: Maximize Spell - If the player has Flame Hand, it turns green, and green flames will leave pools of green fire upon hitting enemies. Sausage and Pepper - If the player has Meatbun, Gungeon Pepper's range will be doubled. The synergy is lost when Meatbun is consumed. Phoenix Up - If the player has Phoenix, changes the look of the gun and summons a Phoenix companion that fires at enemies.
entries.chineseNotes: 地牢胡椒 is a passive item. Effects: Continuously deals damage to nearby enemies at a rate of 5 damage per second. Notes: Maximize Spell - If the player has 火焰之手, it turns green, and green flames will leave pools of green fire upon hitting enemies. Sausage and Pepper - If the player has 肉包子, 地牢胡椒's range will be doubled. The synergy is lost when 肉包子 is consumed. 凤凰 Up - If the player has 凤凰, changes the look of the gun and summons a 凤凰 companion that fires at enemies.

entries.englishNotes: Ring of Chest Friendship is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the chance of finding rewards upon clearing rooms. Increases the chance of finding a chest upon clearing a room by 50%. Modifies the chances for chests spawned on room clear to be a specific quality; Notes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, they will not stack their effects.

Modifies the chances for chests spawned on room clear to be a specific quality; Notes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, they will not stack their effects.

entries.englishNotes: Ancient Hero's Bandana is a passive item. Effects: Quadruples maximum ammo. Notes: I need scissors! 61! What A Thrill - If the player also has Patriot, it has a chance to transmogrify enemies into snakes. Has no effect on the Prize Pistol. Trivia: Unused: Recessive Hero - (CustomSynergyType.THE_TRUE_HERO) If the player has Number 2, it causes an unknown effect. Removed because it contains a starting item. This item is a reference to the Metal Gear Solid series. Ancient Hero's Bandana has the same sprite shape as Bloodied Scarf and Number 2.

entries.englishNotes: "If only I had some heavy boots, I wouldn't slip on this ice!" - Lost Adventurer Heavy Boots is a passive item in Enter and Exit the Gungeon. It also appears in powerup form in Exit the Gungeon. Effects: ETG Prevents the players movement from being interfered with by external forces, such as knockback from enemies, gun recoil, conveyor belts, and patches of ice. XTG Causes the player to release a shockwave upon landing. Enemies caught in the shockwave will be knocked back and take light damage. Has a short cooldown before the effect can be activated again. Notes: XTG This item can be very useful on elevators with holes.

Notes: XTG This item can be very useful on elevators with holes.

entries.englishNotes: Broccoli is a passive item. Effects: Increases damage by 10%. Adds a 10% chance to negate damage. Increases movement speed by 1. Notes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases damage, the chance to negate damage, and movement speed. Prior to the Supply Drop UpdateETG, Broccoli was an item, did not increase speed, and only gave a 5% damage increase. The Ammonomicon entry for Broccoli is almost identical to the first sentence on the Wikipedia page for Broccoli, which reads "Broccoli is an edible green plant in the cabbage fami...

entries.englishNotes: Antibody is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Adds a 50% chance to heal the player for an extra half a heart whenever they receive healing. Notes: In the real world, antibodies are proteins produced by the immune system to assist in fighting infection.

entries.englishNotes: Pink Guon Stone is a passive item and a Guon Stone in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Grants one extra heart container. Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact. Notes: Has no effect on the health of The Robot. The Guon Stones are a reference to Ioun Stones in Dungeons & Dragons. The visual appearance of this item may also be a reference to Life Crystals in the game Terraria.

entries.englishNotes: White Guon Stone is a passive item and a Guon Stone. Effects: Grants an extra blank per floor. Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact. Notes: Tile Match - If the player also has Tetrominator, whenever the player shoots, White Guon Stone will occasionally shoot a yellow cube Tetromino itself. Whiter Guon Stone - If the player also has +1 Bullets, Amulet of the Pit Lord, or Flash Ray, the size of the Guon Stone is increased, it rotates at a fixed distance from the playe... Trivia: The White Guon Stone, like all the other guon stones, is based on the Ioun Stones, popularized by Dungeons and Dragons.

entries.englishNotes: Orange Guon Stone is a passive item and a Guon Stone. Effects: Shoots at enemies. Each shot deals 5 damage. Has a cooldown of 1 second between shots. Notes: If the player has both the Enter the Fruitgeon and Oranger Guon Stone synergies at the same time, their damage increases do not stack. This item benefits from the Y.V. shrine, for a chance to fire extra bullets. This item benefits from Battle Standard's damage boost.

Notes: The Clear Guon Stone, like all the other guon stones, is based on Ioun Stones, popularized by Dungeons and Dragons. The Clear Guon Stone resembles a Skullet. This item's use of the word clear, its subtext "pure" and the blue tint of the item are cumulatively a reference to the street drug methamphetamine, or Crystal Meth, and in partic...

entries.englishNotes: Old Knight's Flask is an active item. Effects: Heals the player for one heart upon use. Starts with 2 charges, and refills to 2 charges at the start of each floor. It does not charge through damage. Notes: The player is immobile while the item is being used, and the player is not healed until the item is finished being used. The player is still vulnerable to damage while healing, so it is not recommended for in-combat recovery. This item does not heal The Robot. Trivia: This item is a reference to the Estus Flask from Dark Souls.

entries.englishNotes: Red Guon Stone is a passive item and a Guon Stone in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the speed and distance of dodge rolls. Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact. Notes: For the purposes of Really Special Lute, Red Guon Stone counts as a companion.
entries.chineseNotes: 红色滚石 is a passive item and a Guon Stone in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the speed and distance of dodge rolls. Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact. Notes: For the purposes of Really Special Lute, 红色滚石 counts as a companion.

entries.englishNotes: Blue Guon Stone is a passive item and a Guon Stone in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon taking damage, decreases enemy shot speed by 33% for 5 seconds. Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact. The stone orbits around the player faster than the other Guon Stones. Notes: Since the Farewell to Arms update, the Blue Guon Stone now rotates twice as fast compared to other Guon Stones, and therefore no longer affects the location of other Guon Stones t... If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further decreases enemy's shot speed and adds another Blue Guon Stone to the player. The Blue Guon Stone, like all the other guon stones, is based on the Ioun Stone, popularized by Dungeons and Dragons.

entries.englishNotes: Riddle of Lead is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Grants a heart container. Fully heals the player. Increases damage by 30%. Notes: Dropping and picking up the item will not heal the player again. The chance to negate damage applies to falling damage from walking into pits. Negated damage will not prevent the player from earning a Master Round.
entries.chineseNotes: 铅谜 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Grants a heart container. Fully heals the player. Increases damage by 30%. Notes: Dropping and picking up the item will not heal the player again. The chance to negate damage applies to falling damage from walking into pits. Negated damage will not prevent the player from earning a Master Round.

entries.englishNotes: Iron Coin is an active item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon use, kills all enemies in a random unexplored room of the current floor. Where the effect took place, a note can be found lying in a pool of blood on the ground. While held: Notes: The player can get money from enemies killed in this way, but pickup drops will likely be stolen by the Rat before the player reaches the room. Chests will spawn normally after clearing rooms with this item. This item cannot clear boss rooms. Trivia: This item, including the amount of uses it has, is a reference to A Song of Ice and Fire, popularized as the television show, Game of Thrones.

entries.englishNotes: Laser Sight is a passive item. Effects: Reduces weapon spread by 50%, increasing accuracy. Adds a laser sight that points where the player is aiming. Notes: Future Gangster - If the player has Thompson Sub-Machinegun, it fires lasers and increases damage by 1. Particle Accelerator - If the player has Particulator, whenever a split Particulator shot dissipates, a laser is automatically fired in its direction. Particle Flow - If the player also has RPG, Stinger, Zorgun, or Laser Lotus, crosshairs will appear on enemies and the guns will home in on them. Trivia: The description title is a reference to King of The Dot, the Canadian rap battle league of the same name.
entries.chineseNotes: 激光瞄准镜 is a passive item. Effects: Reduces weapon spread by 50%, increasing accuracy. Adds a laser sight that points where the player is aiming. Notes: Future Gangster - If the player has 汤普森冲锋枪, it fires lasers and increases damage by 1. Particle Accelerator - If the player has 粒子, whenever a split 粒子 shot dissipates, a laser is automatically fired in its direction. Particle Flow - If the player also has 火箭推进式榴弹, 机尾炮, 佐尔枪, or 激光莲花, crosshairs will appear on enemies and the guns will home in on them. Trivia: The description title is a reference to King of The Dot, the Canadian rap battle league of the same name.

entries.englishNotes: Dark Marker is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: When uncharged, fires black and white projectiles with no special properties. When charged, fires two capsules (one matter, one antimatter) in a helical formation, arcing towards one another. Firing a charged shot empties the entire magazine of the gun, and consumes 10 ammo rather than 1. Notes: This gun does not anger Bello when fired in the shop unless it is charged. Despite being listed as a semiautomatic weapon in the Ammonomicon, the Dark Marker is one of the few guns in Enter the Gungeon to have multiple different shooting styles at once.

When charged, fires two capsules (one matter, one antimatter) in a helical formation, arcing towards one another. entries.englishNotes: Flare Gun is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires flares which set enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Notes: After hitting a wall, fired flares will continue burning for a time. These lingering flares produce light, but have no combat utility. The Synergy with Medkit may be a reference to how flare guns and medical supplies are often kept together for emergency situations. The quote “Over Here” may be a reference to the original Jurassic Park film.

entries.englishNotes: Spice is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: If Spice has been used, it has a chance to replace future item drops depending on how many times it has been used. The effects of spice change depending on how many times it has been used. On the first use: Notes: In co-op mode, effects of spice usage are counted separately for each player. Possible Bug Dying in co-op mode removes any stat modifiers that the dead player gained through spice. These stats are not returned on being resurrected. The health reduction from Spice cannot put the player below 1 heart container, however continuing to put the health stat into the negatives by Spice usage will prevent future heal...

entries.englishNotes: Fat Bullets is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Doubles bullet size. Increases damage by 30%. Decreases maximum ammo by 10%. Notes: The increased projectile size negatively affects guns with large projectiles such as the Crestfaller. The decrease in maximum ammo can be bypassed if you temporarily drop the item before picking up ammo drops or new guns. May be a reference to The Binding of Isaac, where many items that increase damage also increase tear size.
entries.chineseNotes: 胖胖子弹 is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Doubles bullet size. Increases damage by 30%. Decreases maximum ammo by 10%. Notes: The increased projectile size negatively affects guns with large projectiles such as the Crestfaller. The decrease in maximum ammo can be bypassed if you temporarily drop the item before picking up ammo drops or new guns. May be a reference to The Binding of Isaac, where many items that increase damage also increase tear size.

entries.englishNotes: Frost Bullets is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Adds a chance to fire light-blue bullets that freeze enemies. The chance is higher for weapons with slower rates of fire. Notes: Added Effect - Ice - If the player has Alpha Bullet, the first shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be an ice bullet. Arctic Warfare - If the player has A.W.P., it turns orange and white, deals 62.5% more damage, and its shots are guaranteed to freeze enemies. Cold Ones - If the player has Frost Ammolet, the chance to fire ice bullets is significantly increased.
entries.chineseNotes: 霜子弹 is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Adds a chance to fire light-blue bullets that freeze enemies. The chance is higher for weapons with slower rates of fire. Notes: Added Effect - Ice - If the player has Alpha Bullet, the first shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be an ice bullet. Arctic Warfare - If the player has A.W.P., it turns orange and white, deals 62.5% more damage, and its shots are guaranteed to freeze enemies. Cold Ones - If the player has Frost Ammolet, the chance to fire ice bullets is significantly increased.

entries.englishNotes: Super Hot Watch is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Slows down time depending on how slow the player is moving. When standing completely still, time is slowed by 99%. One second of normal time takes 1 minute and 40 seconds of standing still with the Super Hot Watch. Dodge rolling is always considered moving, even if the player is rolling against an obstacle such as a wall. This can be used to progress time while remaining in one place. Notes: While time is slowed, gun cooldowns are also slowed, making firing difficult. The five Master Rounds required to unlock the Super Hot Watch do not have to be unique. As such, duplicate Master Rounds acquired via Clone will still count towards the unlock.
entries.chineseNotes: 超级热的手表 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Slows down time depending on how slow the player is moving. When standing completely still, time is slowed by 99%. One second of normal time takes 1 minute and 40 seconds of standing still with the 超级热的手表. Dodge rolling is always considered moving, even if the player is rolling against an obstacle such as a wall. This can be used to progress time while remaining in one place. Notes: While time is slowed, gun cooldowns are also slowed, making firing difficult. The five Master Rounds required to unlock the 超级热的手表 do not have to be unique. As such, duplicate Master Rounds acquired via 克隆人 will still count towards the unlock.

entries.englishNotes: Drum Clip is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the magazine size of all weapons by 50%. ETG Does not affect guns with only one round in each magazine, as numbers are rounded down. XTG Single-round guns gain an extra bullet. Notes: Drum Clip can negatively affect weapons that have special effects on the final shot, such as Eye of the Beholster. If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases guns' magazine size. Doesn't affect guns with one round.
entries.chineseNotes: 鼓夹 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the magazine size of all weapons by 50%. ETG Does not affect guns with only one round in each magazine, as numbers are rounded down. XTG Single-round guns gain an extra bullet. Notes: 鼓夹 can negatively affect weapons that have special effects on the final shot, such as Eye of the Beholster. If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases guns' magazine size. Doesn't affect guns with one round.

entries.englishNotes: Gungeon Blueprint is a passive item. Effects: Fully maps out every subsequent floor. Reveals all secret rooms. Notes: Does not reveal the trapdoor leading to the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Trivia: This item is linked to Woban, the character mentioned in the Ammonomicon entry for the Cartographer's Ring. The Gungeon Blueprint's pickup quote references how the Gungeon is procedurally generated ingame.
entries.chineseNotes: 地牢蓝图 is a passive item. Effects: Fully maps out every subsequent floor. Reveals all secret rooms. Notes: Does not reveal the trapdoor leading to the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Trivia: This item is linked to Woban, the character mentioned in the Ammonomicon entry for the Cartographer's Ring. The 地牢蓝图's pickup quote references how the Gungeon is procedurally generated ingame.

entries.englishNotes: Homing Bullets is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets have a 20% chance to home (Rad: 10 Vel: 420) in on enemies. The chance for any given projectile home in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. Notes: This item grants stronger homing than Crutch, but does not apply to all bullets.
entries.chineseNotes: 自导引子弹 is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets have a 20% chance to home (Rad: 10 Vel: 420) in on enemies. The chance for any given projectile home in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. Notes: This item grants stronger homing than Crutch, but does not apply to all bullets.

entries.englishNotes: Blood Brooch is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases Curse by 1 while held. Heals half a heart every 1200 damage dealt to enemies. Notes: This item has no effect aside from increasing curse when playing as Robot. The item effect is reminiscent of the rally mechanic in Bloodborne, whereby the player character can regain health by attacking enemies after taking damage. This item and its synergy with the Trick Gun are references to Bloodborne where the old blood refers to the blood of the Great Ones.
entries.chineseNotes: 鲜血胸针 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases Curse by 1 while held. Heals half a heart every 1200 damage dealt to enemies. Notes: This item has no effect aside from increasing curse when playing as Robot. entries.englishNotes: +1 Bullets is a passive item and a bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon, Exit the Gungeon, and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Increases damage by 25%. Notes: This item is a reference to common magical items in Dungeons and Dragons, which often show their enhanced nature by being labelled as '+1'. +1 Bullets synergising with Guon Stones is due to +1 Bullets and every Guon Stone being a reference to Dungeons and Dragons. Guon Stones themselves are a reference to Ioun Stones. Fixed Bug Prior to A Farewell To Arms, if Potion of Gun Friendship was dropped while the Friend to Gun and Bullet synergy was active, the orbiting gun would be made permanent.

entries.englishNotes: Backup Gun is a passive item. Effects: Guns simultaneously shoot forwards and backwards. The backwards firing shots will be significantly less accurate. Notes: Gruber's Bane - If player also has Shadow Bullets all backward shots have an additional projectile. Like Shooting Fish - If the player has Barrel, a fish pops out of the Barrel and fires bullets. Interacts strangely with Double Vision - Instead of doubling the backwards shots, a player that activates Double Vision with Backup Gun equipped will fire three shots forwards, an... Trivia: This item is a reference to the movie Die Hard, where the protagonist John McClane tapes his Beretta 92F pistol to his back.

Notes: Gruber's Bane - If player also has 阴影子弹 all backward shots have an additional projectile. Like Shooting Fish - If the player has 桶枪, a fish pops out of the 桶枪 and fires bullets. Interacts strangely with 复视药酒 - Instead of doubling the backwards shots, a player that activates 复视药酒 with “备”用枪 equipped will fire three shots forwards, an... entries.englishNotes: Bouncy Bullets is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Allows the player's bullets to bounce off of objects twice. Notes: Absent Minded - If the player also has The Membrane, its shots bounce 4 times and become homing. Bouncy Bullets will also cause tables from Table Tech Rocket to bounce. It works well with Snowballets, as Bouncy Bullets allows them to bounce across the room and grow to massive sizes. Trivia: Bouncy Bullets resemble Rubber Kin while Shock Rounds resemble Tazies.

entries.englishNotes: The Seven-Leaf Clover is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Increases the quality of chests found in chest rooms, mirror rooms, and some secret rooms to a 50-50 chance of red or black. Overrides the usual chance for Magnificence to decrease the quality of chests found in chest rooms. Has no effect on chests found upon clearing rooms and items not found in chests. Notes: Breakfast Club - If the player also has Wind Up Gun, its reload time is halved, fire rate increased by 60%, damage increased by 50%, magazine size increased to 27, and all but the... This item cannot drop from a Rainbow Mode chest Trivia: This item is and contains several references to Futurama.

entries.englishNotes: Sunglasses is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon Effects: Slows down time by 55% and increases dodge roll distance and speed by 25% for 2 seconds after an explosion. This effect has a 10 second cooldown, meaning it cannot be permanently activated by chained explosives. Increases coolness by 2. Notes: This item is a reference to the unflinching walk, a movie cliché popularized by action flicks where a "cool" character (sometimes wearing sunglasses) walks in slow motion as explo... In terms of design, the sunglasses closely resemble those of Horatio Caine, the protagonist of CSI: Miami who is well known for slowly putting on similar shades when announcing a...

entries.englishNotes: Meatbun is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. It also appears as a powerup in Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Heals the player for one heart. Grants double damage until the player is hit. In Exit the Gungeon, the effect will also wear off when the player ascends to the next chamber. Notes: The damage effect is lost if either player is hit in Co-opETG. This effect stacks with itself, meaning that a second meatbun will grant 4x damage, and 3 will grant 8x. Meatbun may be a reference to the California based gaming apparel brand Meat Bun.
entries.chineseNotes: 肉包子 is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. It also appears as a powerup in Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Heals the player for one heart. Grants double damage until the player is hit. In Exit the Gungeon, the effect will also wear off when the player ascends to the next chamber. Notes: The damage effect is lost if either player is hit in Co-opETG. This effect stacks with itself, meaning that a second meatbun will grant 4x damage, and 3 will grant 8x. 肉包子 may be a reference to the California based gaming apparel brand Meat Bun.

entries.englishNotes: Molotov Launcher is a gun in Enter the Gungeon that fires Molotovs, which set large areas on fire. Notes: Unlike the regular Molotov, the Molotov Launcher will work in The Gorgun's arena. Child projectiles created by Flak Bullets will not create puddles of fire. Extra shots fired by Hip Holster will usually not create puddles of fire, however it rarely still does.
entries.chineseNotes: 燃烧弹发射器 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon that fires Molotovs, which set large areas on fire. Notes: Unlike the regular 燃烧瓶, the 燃烧弹发射器 will work in The Gorgun's arena. Child projectiles created by 高射炮子弹 will not create puddles of fire. Extra shots fired by 臀部皮套 will usually not create puddles of fire, however it rarely still does.

entries.englishNotes: Mimic Tooth Necklace is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: All chests (with the exception of Rat chests, and chests that have no corresponding mimic type) are unlocked, and become Mimics. This includes chests spawned before the necklace was picked up. Possible Bug Has an inverse effect on Rat chests, forcing them not to be Mimics. Notes: Has no interaction with Wall Mimics, Door Lord, or the Mimic Gun, despite them being mimics. This item makes Junk significantly more difficult to acquire, as it is acquired from breaking non-mimic chests. Does not affect the chest spawned by Winchester's minigame, rainbow chests, synergy chests, or glitch chests.

Effects: All chests (with the exception of Rat chests, and chests that have no corresponding mimic type) are unlocked, and become Mimics. entries.englishNotes: Ring of Mimic Friendship is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon Effects: Mimic chests will no longer attack the player, acting like regular chests. Prevents Pedestal Mimics from appearing. Prevents Wall Mimics from awakening. Notes: This item is most valuable to new and inexperienced players, to whom Mimics may pose a serious threat. Does not prevent Door Lord from appearing, despite it technically being a Mimic.
entries.chineseNotes: 拟身怪友谊之戒 is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon Effects: Mimic chests will no longer attack the player, acting like regular chests. Prevents Pedestal Mimics from appearing. Prevents Wall Mimics from awakening. Notes: This item is most valuable to new and inexperienced players, to whom Mimics may pose a serious threat. Does not prevent Door Lord from appearing, despite it technically being a Mimic.

entries.englishNotes: Hot Lead is a passive item and a bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Every bullet fired has a 20%† chance to set enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Projectiles given this effect are tinted red. † The chance for any given projectile transmogrify in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. Fired beams have a ~25% chance per second trained on an enemy to set them on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Notes: The Get Equipped with -H- -synergy is a reference to Mega Man II - the Atomic Fire weapon is gained from defeating Heat Man, and represented on the weapon select screen with an H

Projectiles given this effect are tinted red. † The chance for any given projectile transmogrify in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. Fired beams have a ~25% chance per second trained on an enemy to set them on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). Notes: The Get Equipped with -H- -synergy is a reference to Mega Man II - the Atomic Fire weapon is gained from defeating Heat Man, and represented on the weapon select screen with an H

entries.englishNotes: Yari Launcher is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires tightly homing (Rad: Vel: 220) rockets that create small explosions upon hitting an enemy. The damage dealt by these rockets (both their impact damage and explosive damage) bypass the Boss DPS cap, allowing this gun to kill bosses extremely quickly. Notes: The gun is a reference to the rocket launcher in the 2013 reboot of Shadow Warrior. The orbiting Demon Head gained through the Shadow Warrior synergy is likely a reference to one of the game's weapons, a demon head that shoots a laser out of its mouth.
entries.chineseNotes: 亚里火箭发射器 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Rapidly fires tightly homing (Rad: Vel: 220) rockets that create small explosions upon hitting an enemy. The damage dealt by these rockets (both their impact damage and explosive damage) bypass the Boss DPS cap, allowing this gun to kill bosses extremely quickly. Notes: The gun is a reference to the rocket launcher in the 2013 reboot of Shadow Warrior. The orbiting Demon Head gained through the Shadow Warrior synergy is likely a reference to one of the game's weapons, a demon head that shoots a laser out of its mouth.

entries.englishNotes: Shock Rounds is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Creates chains of damaging electricity between fired bullets. Doubles the damage of Beam style Guns. Notes: Alistair's Ladder - If the player has Thunderclap, it fires two parallel balls of lightning with every shot, connecting the bullets in a ladder pattern. Battery Powered - If the player has Shock Rifle, the gun's appearance changes and it automatically regenerates ammo over time. Chain Lightning - If the player has Shadow Bullets, the range that Shock Bullets can connect bullets is increased, and lightning can connect to enemy bullets.
entries.chineseNotes: 电击炮 is a passive item and a bullet upgrade. Effects: Creates chains of damaging electricity between fired bullets. Doubles the damage of Beam style Guns. Notes: Alistair's Ladder - If the player has Thunderclap, it fires two parallel balls of lightning with every shot, connecting the bullets in a ladder pattern. Battery Powered - If the player has Shock Rifle, the gun's appearance changes and it automatically regenerates ammo over time. Chain Lightning - If the player has Shadow Bullets, the range that Shock Bullets can connect bullets is increased, and lightning can connect to enemy bullets.

entries.englishNotes: Super Space Turtle is a passive item that appeas in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Summons Super Space Turtle to the players side to aid them in combat. ETG Super Space Turtle will run towards enemies, firing bullets that deal 5 damage each. XTG Super Space Turtle will fly towards enemies with the aid of a jetpack, firing at them. Notes: The turtle's bullets are affected by bullet modifiers such as Cursed Bullets and Helix Bullets. Shock Rounds will create a link of electricity between the turtle's bullets and the player's bullets. The turtle will not attack a Mimic without the player first interacting with the Mimic.
entries.chineseNotes: 超级太空龟 is a passive item that appeas in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Summons 超级太空龟 to the players side to aid them in combat. ETG 超级太空龟 will run towards enemies, firing bullets that deal 5 damage each. XTG 超级太空龟 will fly towards enemies with the aid of a jetpack, firing at them. Notes: The turtle's bullets are affected by bullet modifiers such as 被诅咒的子弹 and 螺旋子弹. 电击炮 will create a link of electricity between the turtle's bullets and the player's bullets. The turtle will not attack a 拟身怪 without the player first interacting with the 拟身怪.

entries.englishNotes: Dog is a passive item in Enter and Exit the Gungeon. The Hunter starts with this item in both games. Notes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Hunter. The dog cannot be interacted with if the player is currently in combat. If the player has flight, they can still interact with the dog but there will be no petting animation.
entries.chineseNotes: 狗 is a passive item in Enter and Exit the Gungeon. The Hunter starts with this item in both games. Notes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Hunter. The dog cannot be interacted with if the player is currently in combat. If the player has flight, they can still interact with the dog but there will be no petting animation.

entries.englishDisplayName: Bullet That Can Kill The Past
entries.englishNotes: The Bullet That Can Kill The Past is an important and story-relevant passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Allows a Gungeoneer to access their past with the Gun That Can Kill The Past. Notes: Cannot be dropped. All rooms that are guaranteed to appear due to the required parts will no longer appear after turning the parts in. Obsidian Shell Casing will always drop from High Dragun's skull, but cannot be turned in more than once.
entries.chineseNotes: The Bullet That Can Kill The Past is an important and story-relevant passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Allows a Gungeoneer to access their past with the Gun That Can Kill The Past. Notes: Cannot be dropped. All rooms that are guaranteed to appear due to the required parts will no longer appear after turning the parts in. Obsidian Shell Casing will always drop from High Dragun's skull, but cannot be turned in more than once.

entries.englishNotes: Explosive Rounds is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Adds an 8.5% chance to fire bullets that explode upon hitting an enemy or object. The explosions deal 25 damage. This effect can only be triggered a maximum of once per second, making it seem like slower fire rate weapons have a higher chance. Notes: The explosions do not harm the player. Explosions can show secret room cracks when using starter guns. The beam damage multiplier sometimes granted by Explosive Rounds does not stack with the beam damage multipliers of Shock Rounds, Flak Bullets, Katana Bullets, Shadow Bullets, Vor... Trivia: Mega Blast might be a reference to Xenon 2 Megablast.

The explosions deal 25 damage. This effect can only be triggered a maximum of once per second, making it seem like slower fire rate weapons have a higher chance. Notes: The explosions do not harm the player. Explosions can show secret room cracks when using starter guns. The beam damage multiplier sometimes granted by 爆炸弹丸 does not stack with the beam damage multipliers of 电击炮, 高射炮子弹, 武士刀子弹, 阴影子弹, Vor... Trivia: Mega Blast might be a reference to Xenon 2 Megablast.

entries.englishNotes: Old Crest is a passive item found in a special room in the Oubliette. Effects: Grants a piece of armor. This piece of armor will always appear at the end of the health bar, and is destroyed upon taking damage. Picking up regular armor before or after the Old Crest will move the Old Crest forward, making it impossible to protect it with armor. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Self-damage from Cigarettes will destroy Old Crest. Cannot be stolen by the Resourceful Rat because it is on a pedestal.
entries.chineseNotes: 古老纹章 is a passive item found in a special room in the Oubliette. Effects: Grants a piece of armor. This piece of armor will always appear at the end of the health bar, and is destroyed upon taking damage. Picking up regular armor before or after the 古老纹章 will move the 古老纹章 forward, making it impossible to protect it with armor. Notes: Cannot be dropped. Self-damage from Cigarettes will destroy 古老纹章. Cannot be stolen by the Resourceful Rat because it is on a pedestal.

entries.englishNotes: Escape Rope is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon use, teleports the player into the Shop, resetting the current room if they are in an uncleared combat room. In the R&G Dept and Bullet Hell, which do not have shops, the player is teleported to the first room of the chamber. Cannot be used in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Notes: Teleporting out of a boss room will return the boss to full health when the player re-enters. If the player takes damage to a boss and uses the Escape Rope to teleport out, they cannot earn a Master Round even if they take no damage on subsequent attempts at the boss.
entries.chineseNotes: 逃生绳 is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Upon use, teleports the player into the Shop, resetting the current room if they are in an uncleared combat room. In the R&G Dept and Bullet Hell, which do not have shops, the player is teleported to the first room of the chamber. Cannot be used in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Notes: Teleporting out of a boss room will return the boss to full health when the player re-enters. If the player takes damage to a boss and uses the 逃生绳 to teleport out, they cannot earn a Master Round even if they take no damage on subsequent attempts at the boss.

entries.englishNotes: Wax Wings is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Grants flight, giving the player the ability to fly over pits and floor traps such as spikes. Flight, by extension, grants immunity to all floor goop, since the player is not actually on the floor to touch it. XTG Holding the Ascending Dodge Roll button will instead slow down time. Notes: Wax Wings utterly trivialise Winchesters shooting gallery, as the player can fly over the pit and shoot every target at point blank range- all but guaranteeing the highest reward. This item is a reference to the Greek legend of Icarus, where the craftsman Daedalus made wings out of wax and feathers to escape Crete with his son Icarus.
entries.chineseNotes: 蜡翅膀 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Grants flight, giving the player the ability to fly over pits and floor traps such as spikes. Flight, by extension, grants immunity to all floor goop, since the player is not actually on the floor to touch it. XTG Holding the Ascending Dodge Roll button will instead slow down time. Notes: 蜡翅膀 utterly trivialise Winchesters shooting gallery, as the player can fly over the pit and shoot every target at point blank range- all but guaranteeing the highest reward. This item is a reference to the Greek legend of Icarus, where the craftsman Daedalus made wings out of wax and feathers to escape Crete with his son Icarus.

entries.englishNotes: Cluster Mine is an active item. Effects: Places 5 small mines that explode when an enemy comes into contact with them, dealing 60 damage. Notes: Cerebral Bros - If the player also has Bullet Bore, the gun shoots an extra drill and turns red. Mine Craft - If the player also has Mine Cutter, mines home in on enemies while Mine Cutter is equipped. Can deal explosive damage to the player.
entries.chineseNotes: 集束地雷 is an active item. Effects: Places 5 small mines that explode when an enemy comes into contact with them, dealing 60 damage. Notes: Cerebral Bros - If the player also has Bullet Bore, the gun shoots an extra drill and turns red. Mine Craft - If the player also has Mine Cutter, mines home in on enemies while Mine Cutter is equipped. Can deal explosive damage to the player.

entries.englishNotes: Cloranthy Ring is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases dodge roll speed by 15.8%. Increases the amount of time during a dodge roll that the player is invulnerable. Notes: This item is a reference to a Dark Souls item of the same name. Like in Enter The Gungeon, dodge rolling in Dark Souls is a commonly used move to avoid enemy attacks. In Dark Souls, this ring speeds up stamina recovery. Stamina is used for rolling, as well as attacking and running.
entries.chineseNotes: 克罗兰溪戒指 is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Increases dodge roll speed by 15.8%. Increases the amount of time during a dodge roll that the player is invulnerable. Notes: This item is a reference to a Dark Souls item of the same name. Like in Enter The Gungeon, dodge rolling in Dark Souls is a commonly used move to avoid enemy attacks. In Dark Souls, this ring speeds up stamina recovery. Stamina is used for rolling, as well as attacking and running.

entries.englishNotes: Fairy Wings is an unused passive item. Effects: Grants flight. Rolls leave pink slime that temporarily charms enemies. Notes: Granted by Hungry Caterpillar. Trivia: It is unknown why this item was cut.
entries.chineseNotes: Fairy Wings is an unused passive item. Effects: Grants flight. Rolls leave pink slime that temporarily charms enemies. Notes: Granted by Hungry Caterpillar. Trivia: It is unknown why this item was cut.

entries.englishNotes: Clone is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Upon death, the player respawns at the very beginning of their run with full health, as well as all of their accumulated guns, items, and pickups- with the exception of Clone itse... The Robot will always respawn with 6 Armor. The player always respawns on the chamber they started the original run in. Notes: If the shopkeeper has been angered (ex. shooting in shop, stealing), he will not return after revival. Allows the collection of duplicate Master Rounds on a single run, all of which count towards unlocking the Super Hot Watch.

entries.englishNotes: Blast Helmet is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Decreases the radius at which explosions can harm the player. Increases damage dealt by dodge rolling into enemies by 200% (3x multiplier). For most characters this increases damage dealt per roll from 3 to 9. Notes: Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, this item did not prevent contact damage or increase dodge roll damage. This item may be a reference to the training helmet that Luke Skywalker wore in Star Wars. The Fightsabre Training synergy spawns an orbital that appears to be a training droid from the same scene.

entries.englishNotes: Monster Blood is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Taking damage spawns a pool of poison goop. Grants immunity to poison. Grants a heart container. Notes: Like all heart container items, The Robot will receive 5 to 10 instead. On the Switch version, and Windows 10 Steam version, the accented characters in the Ammonomicon entry won't show up, instead reading "Mdecins Sans Diplme". This item is a reference to the book Monster Blood, the third title in the original Goosebumps series, written by R. L. Stine.
entries.chineseNotes: 怪物血 is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Taking damage spawns a pool of poison goop. Grants immunity to poison. Grants a heart container. Notes: Like all heart container items, The Robot will receive 5 to 10 instead. This item is a reference to the book 怪物血, the third title in the original Goosebumps series, written by R. L. Stine.

entries.englishNotes: Nanomachines is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Grants 2 pieces of Armor upon pickup. Grants a piece of Armor every 4 times damage is taken. Damage count does not reset on floor changes. Notes: This item is a reference to the character Senator Steven Armstrong, antagonist and final boss of Metal Gear Rising: Revengence, who uses nanomachines within his body to grant hims... The Ammonomicon quote "Son" in reference to a quote from one of Armstrong's most famous speeches in the game; "Nanomachines, son!". Pretty Good is a reference to the popular recurring quote "You're pretty good", from the Metal Gear franchise.

Pretty Good is a reference to the popular recurring quote "You're pretty good", from the Metal Gear franchise.

entries.englishNotes: Gunboots is a passive item. Effects: Dodge rolling fires a spread of five bullets backwards, which deal 8 damage each. Increases movement speed by 1 (approximately 14%). Notes: Gunboots has a cooldown of about 2 seconds between bursts of bullets. Can be used to break targets in Winchester's game. Double Down - If the player also has Springheel Boots, the cooldown is removed and every roll will fire bullets. Trivia: This item, and possibly its method of unlock (found in the elevator by Tailor) are a reference to Downwell.
entries.chineseNotes: 长靴 is a passive item. Effects: Dodge rolling fires a spread of five bullets backwards, which deal 8 damage each. Increases movement speed by 1 (approximately 14%). Notes: 长靴 has a cooldown of about 2 seconds between bursts of bullets. Can be used to break targets in Winchester's game. entries.englishNotes: Gnawed Key is a passive item obtainable only in the shop in Gungeon Proper. It costs a total of 1000 , which can be given over the course of multiple runs. Effects: Unlocks the hatch to the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Notes: The Gnawed Key will not spawn until you have completed the Bullet That Can Kill The Past. The Gnawed Key will not be discounted by discount effects (e.g. Smiley's Revolver, Iron Coin). The key will disappear if the shopkeeper is angered.
entries.chineseNotes: 被咬的钥匙 is a passive item obtainable only in the shop in Gungeon Proper. It costs a total of 1000 , which can be given over the course of multiple runs. Effects: Unlocks the hatch to the Resourceful Rat's Lair. Notes: The 被咬的钥匙 will not spawn until you have completed the 子弹枪 That Can Kill The Past. The 被咬的钥匙 will not be discounted by discount effects (e.g. Smiley's Revolver, 铁硬币). The key will disappear if the shopkeeper is angered.

entries.englishNotes: R2G2 is a passive item and companion in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Summons a robotic companion that follows the player. When an enemy is in range, it prioritizes following the target and periodically fires a rapid burst of 6 bullets at them. R2G2 is capable of flight, and will fly over pits to keep up with the player or track down enemies. Notes: R2G2's bullets are affected by all bullet modifiers. R2G2 will not attack Red-Caped Bullet Kin. This item is a reference to the iconic robot R2-D2 from the Star Wars franchise.
entries.chineseNotes: R2G2 is a passive item and companion in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Summons a robotic companion that follows the player. When an enemy is in range, it prioritizes following the target and periodically fires a rapid burst of 6 bullets at them. R2G2 will not attack Red-Caped Bullet Kin. This item is a reference to the iconic robot R2-D2 from the Star Wars franchise.

entries.englishNotes: Ticket is an active item. Effects: Upon use, spawns a friendly Gatling Gull that periodically fires spreads of bullets and flies off once the room is cleared. He will die if he sustains enough damage. Notes: Secret Twin - If the player also has Vulcan Cannon, holding Vulcan Cannon while using Ticket will spawn two friendly Gatling Gulls instead of one. Gatling Gull gains the effects of most bullet modifiers. If the Ticket is used a second time in the same room the first Gatling Gull (or first two with Secret Twin), if still alive, will disappear. Trivia: In previous versions of the game, there were files for an item that spawned Gatling Gull as an ally, but couldn't shoot.

entries.englishNotes: The Gold Ammolet is a passive item and an Ammolet in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be Stunned (Dur: 1s) and dealt 60 damage. The damage effect of the Gold Ammolet functions by increasing each blank's regular damage radius to 25, and adding 50 damage (to the default 10). Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor. Notes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the Gold Ammolet increased blank damage to 35, did not grant an extra blank and was an item.

Effects: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be Stunned (Dur: 3s). Increases the knockback of Blanks by 400% (5x multiplier). Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor. Notes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, it further increases the knockback of blanks and grants another blank each floor. Bug If a large quantity of duplicates are somehow obtained (e.g.

entries.englishNotes: Angry Bullets is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets that hit enemies will bounce off them into a random direction. Reflected bullets can trigger the same effect. Reflected bullets deal half of the original bullet's damage. Notes: Beam guns will be deflected at a random angle upon hitting an enemy. Most explosive weapons will not explode upon contact with an enemy. An exception to this is Void Core Cannon, whose projectiles will still explode even with Angry Bullets.
entries.chineseNotes: 愤怒的小子弹 is a passive item and bullet upgrade in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Bullets that hit enemies will bounce off them into a random direction. Reflected bullets can trigger the same effect. Reflected bullets deal half of the original bullet's damage. Notes: Beam guns will be deflected at a random angle upon hitting an enemy. Most explosive weapons will not explode upon contact with an enemy. An exception to this is Void Core Cannon, whose projectiles will still explode even with 愤怒的小子弹.

entries.englishNotes: Chaos Ammolet is a passive item and an Ammolet in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will suffer the following effects; Stun (Dur: 1s) 50% chance to be set on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 6). Notes: The Ammonomicon quote "What Can Will" is a reference to the phrase "Anything that can go wrong will go wrong.", known colloquially as Murphy's Law. Bug If an enemy is frozen while spawning it will remain invulnerable to damage until it has thawed and been allowed to properly finish its spawn animation.

entries.englishNotes: Number 2 is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon. The Cultist starts with this item. This item is exclusive to co-op mode and cannot be found via normal gameplay until it is unlocked. Effects: Increases the player's movement speed by 2 (base movement speed is 7) and damage by 41% when their co-op partner is dead. Cannot be dropped. Notes: Number 2 was not obtainable in single player until A Farewell to Arms. If obtained on any other gungeoneers, it will travel with them into the past. This item isn't required to unlock Finished Gun.

entries.englishNotes: Corsair is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires slow moving bullets that accelerate and bounce around the room. These bullets have a slight homing effect, curving towards enemies. Upon reaching the end of their lifespan, these bullets explode- creating a large red X at the position of the explosion. Notes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the bullets did not curve. Corsair's bullets cannot be caught by Gunjurers. "Corsair" is a common name for a pirate or a privateer operating on the high seas, especially ones operating along the southern coast of the Mediterranean in the 16th–18th centuri...

"海盗船" is a common name for a pirate or a privateer operating on the high seas, especially ones operating along the southern coast of the Mediterranean in the 16th–18th centuri...

entries.englishNotes: Charge Shot is a gun which fires a large laser that pierces enemies and bounces off of walls twice. The laser deals double damage after bouncing. Notes: Barrage Shot - If the player also has Jetpack, charge time is reduced by 25%, reload time is increased by 50%, and shot size is increased. Prior to the A Farewell to Arms update, Charge Shot's magazine size was 1 and its max ammo was 50. Trivia: This weapon is a reference to the game Charge Shot. Charge Shot's glowing green light turns red and blinks when it is out of ammo. If the Charge Shot's clip is refilled with an ammo pack while empty, it will continue to blink red as if it were still out of ammo until fired again.
entries.chineseNotes: 蓄力枪 is a gun which fires a large laser that pierces enemies and bounces off of walls twice. The laser deals double damage after bouncing. Notes: Barrage Shot - If the player also has Jetpack, charge time is reduced by 25%, reload time is increased by 50%, and shot size is increased. Prior to the A Farewell to Arms update, 蓄力枪's magazine size was 1 and its max ammo was 50. Trivia: This weapon is a reference to the game 蓄力枪. 蓄力枪's glowing green light turns red and blinks when it is out of ammo. If the 蓄力枪's clip is refilled with an ammo pack while empty, it will continue to blink red as if it were still out of ammo until fired again.

entries.englishNotes: Zilla Shotgun is a gun that fires a shotgun blast of bullets. It can be charged to fire the entire magazine at once, which will cause it to fire piercing, bouncing bullets. Notes: The Zilla Shotgun is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Zilla Shotgun had 100 maximum ammo. Zilla Shotgun can still fire the charged shot if it has only one shot left in the magazine. This will, however, still consume 4 ammo.
entries.chineseNotes: 齐拉霰弹枪 is a gun that fires a 常规霰弹枪 blast of bullets. It can be charged to fire the entire magazine at once, which will cause it to fire piercing, bouncing bullets. Notes: The 齐拉霰弹枪 is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. Prior to the 空投补给 Update, 齐拉霰弹枪 had 100 maximum ammo. 齐拉霰弹枪 can still fire the charged shot if it has only one shot left in the magazine. This will, however, still consume 4 ammo.

entries.englishNotes: The Emperor is a gun that fires a burst of four big green bullets connected by electricity, identical to the effect of Shock Rounds. Notes: Starburst Fire - If the player also has Laser Rifle, firing either The Emperor or Laser Rifle once will cause it to rapidly fire its entire magazine. You can cancel the effect by reloading or dodge-rolling while firing. Trivia: Unused: The Star War - (CustomSynergyType.THE_STAR_WAR) If the player has Void Marshal, it causes an unknown effect. This gun may be a reference to Emperor Palpatine from Star Wars. This is further reinforced by the name of the above unused synergy, and the fact that the Void Marshal is also a reference to Star Wars.
entries.chineseNotes: 帝王 is a gun that fires a burst of four big green bullets connected by electricity, identical to the effect of 电击炮. Notes: Starburst Fire - If the player also has 激光步枪, firing either 帝王 or 激光步枪 once will cause it to rapidly fire its entire magazine. You can cancel the effect by reloading or dodge-rolling while firing. Trivia: Unused: The Star War - (CustomSynergyType.THE_STAR_WAR) If the player has 虚空元帅, it causes an unknown effect. This gun may be a reference to Emperor Palpatine from Star Wars. This is further reinforced by the name of the above unused synergy, and the fact that the 虚空元帅 is also a reference to Star Wars.

entries.englishNotes: Science Cannon is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a laser beam with a 0.6s charge-up. If this laser beam is focused on the same enemy for over 0.5s, it has a 60%~ chance per second to apply each of the following status effects; Charm (Dur: 6s)
entries.chineseNotes: 科技加农枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a laser beam with a 0.6s charge-up. If this laser beam is focused on the same enemy for over 0.5s, it has a 60%~ chance per second to apply each of the following status effects; Charm (Dur: 6s)

entries.englishNotes: Lil' Bomber is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Charges up to fire bouncing, exploding bombs. Like most explosive weapons, this explosion is capable of destroying some enemy bullets. These bombs are uniquely capable of blasting open secret rooms. Deals 30% extra damage to bosses. Notes: Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal stack, allowing Lil' Bomber to fire three bombs at once if the player has both Bomb and Ice Bomb. The King Bomber synergy can provide up to 420 per ammo pickup, or up to 840 with Loot Bag. With both Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal, assuming all three projectiles hit, this number can be up to 1260 per ammo pickup, or 2520 with Loot Bag.

Like most explosive weapons, this explosion is capable of destroying some enemy bullets. These bombs are uniquely capable of blasting open secret rooms. Deals 30% extra damage to bosses. Notes: Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal stack, allowing 里尔炸弹枪 to fire three bombs at once if the player has both 炸弹 and 冰炸弹. The King Bomber synergy can provide up to 420 per ammo pickup, or up to 840 with 战利品. With both Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal, assuming all three projectiles hit, this number can be up to 1260 per ammo pickup, or 2520 with 战利品.

entries.englishNotes: Mutation is a gun that fires a slightly homing continuous beam with heavy recoil, leaving a trail of red liquid. Mutation also turns enemies red, though this is a purely cosmetic effect. Notes: The synergy between the Mutation and Bionic Leg/Shock Rounds may be a reference to Tetsuo from the 1982 manga series Akira. "Didn't Need Two Anyway" refers to the look of the weapon in-game, which envelops the player's whole arm. This visual effect is also shared with Robot's Right Hand, Robot's Left Hand, Heroine, Flame Hand and Megahand.
entries.chineseNotes: 变异手臂 is a gun that fires a slightly homing continuous beam with heavy recoil, leaving a trail of red liquid. 变异手臂 also turns enemies red, though this is a purely cosmetic effect. Notes: The synergy between the 变异手臂 and 仿生腿/电击炮 may be a reference to Tetsuo from the 1982 manga series Akira. "Didn't Need Two Anyway" refers to the look of the weapon in-game, which envelops the player's whole arm. This visual effect is also shared with Robot's Right Hand, Robot's Left Hand, 女英雄, 火焰之手 and 空中射手.

entries.englishNotes: Wind Up Gun is a gun that fires purple lasers. The first half of the magazine pierces and deals full damage, and the second half deals 50% damage and does not pierce. Notes: Breakfast Club - If the player also has Seven-Leaf Clover, reload time is halved, fire rate is increased by 60%, damage is increased by 50%, magazine size is increased to 27, and... Wound Up - If the player also has Oiled Cylinder, the bottom half of the magazine retains full damage and piercing, and the damage and bullet size is increased by 25%. With increased magazine size, all shots except for the last ten deal full damage and pierce, and only the last ten shots deal less damage.
entries.chineseNotes: 蓄势待发之枪 is a gun that fires purple lasers. The first half of the magazine pierces and deals full damage, and the second half deals 50% damage and does not pierce. Notes: Breakfast Club - If the player also has Seven-Leaf Clover, reload time is halved, fire rate is increased by 60%, damage is increased by 50%, magazine size is increased to 27, and... Wound Up - If the player also has Oiled Cylinder, the bottom half of the magazine retains full damage and piercing, and the damage and bullet size is increased by 25%. With increased magazine size, all shots except for the last ten deal full damage and pierce, and only the last ten shots deal less damage.

entries.englishNotes: Silencer is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires giant zippers. The gun is swung forward when fired. Hitting an enemy with this close-ranged swing will stun the enemy. Trivia: This gun is a reference to the myth of pillows being used as makeshift silencers. 300 Dead Count is a pun on "Thread Count", a term often used to measure the quality of sheets. The character of Alben Smallbore mentioned in the Ammonomicon entry of this and the Flame Hand is a reference to Headmaster Albus Dumbledore from the Harry Potter series.

Trivia: This gun is a reference to the myth of pillows being used as makeshift silencers. 300 Dead Count is a pun on "Thread Count", a term often used to measure the quality of sheets. The character of Alben Smallbore mentioned in the Ammonomicon entry of this and the Flame Hand is a reference to Headmaster Albus Dumbledore from the Harry Potter series.

entries.englishNotes: Pitchfork is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Launches fireballs that set enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). ETG Each fireball can pierce through up to 4 enemies. Notes: Fallen Bullet Kin wield the Pitchfork. CMV Possible Bug The special UI icon for both the Pitchfork and Pitch Perfect in the Chinese Mobile Version of Enter the Gungeon appear blue.
entries.chineseNotes: 干草叉 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead. Effects: Launches fireballs that set enemies on Fire (Dur: 4s DPS: 4). ETG Each fireball can pierce through up to 4 enemies. Notes: Fallen Bullet Kin wield the 干草叉. CMV Possible Bug The special UI icon for both the 干草叉 and Pitch Perfect in the Chinese Mobile Version of Enter the Gungeon appear blue.

entries.englishNotes: Composite Gun is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: The Blank effect of this gun can open the entrance to secret rooms. When checking for secret rooms in the Shop, a charged bullet can be fired into the shop from an adjacent room to avoid angering Bello. The charged shot of this gun does not trigger the Blank Shrine.
entries.chineseNotes: 复合枪 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: The Blank effect of this gun can open the entrance to secret rooms. When checking for secret rooms in the Shop, a charged bullet can be fired into the shop from an adjacent room to avoid angering Bello. The charged shot of this gun does not trigger the Blank Shrine.

entries.englishNotes: Gunther is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It is alive, talks, and grows stronger with each room cleared. Effects: Gunther has 3 stages of behavior. Upon clearing a room, there is a chance to gain friendship with Gunther, indicated by him talking. First Stage: Fires piercing bullets at 6 damage. Second Stage: Besides piercing, bullets deal 9 damage and bounce twice. Notes: Similar to other guns with infinite ammo, Gunther cannot be combined with other guns using Duct Tape, be fed to the muncher, or reveal secret rooms. Gunjurers cannot absorb Gunther's bullets at stage 3. The bullets of this gun ignore the Unfriendly Fire Challenge Mode modifier.
entries.chineseNotes: 成长之枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It is alive, talks, and grows stronger with each room cleared. Effects: 成长之枪 has 3 stages of behavior. Upon clearing a room, there is a chance to gain friendship with 成长之枪, indicated by him talking. First Stage: Fires piercing bullets at 6 damage. Second Stage: Besides piercing, bullets deal 9 damage and bounce twice. Notes: Similar to other guns with infinite ammo, 成长之枪 cannot be combined with other guns using 胶带, be fed to the muncher, or reveal secret rooms. Gunjurers cannot absorb 成长之枪's bullets at stage 3. The bullets of this gun ignore the Unfriendly Fire Challenge Mode modifier.

entries.englishNotes: Mahoguny is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a single explosive pinecone along with three drifting leaf bullets. Notes: The explosions created by the pinecones can destroy enemy bullets. Mahoguny is a portmanteau of gun and mahogany.
entries.chineseNotes: 桃花心木枪 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a single explosive pinecone along with three drifting leaf bullets. Notes: The explosions created by the pinecones can destroy enemy bullets. 桃花心木枪 is a portmanteau of gun and mahogany.

entries.englishNotes: Lower Case r is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a burst of 6 letter-shaped projectiles that spell out the word BULLET. While firing, the gun will voice out the word "bullet". Notes: The Lower Case r is voiced by Doseone, the composer of Enter the Gungeons soundtrack. This gun, while obviously a surface level reference to the basic shape of the letter r, may also be a reference to early computer adventure games. The reload animation of the Lower Case r consists of a text cursor deleting the letter with a backspace, and typing an entirely new r.
entries.chineseNotes: 小写字母r is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a burst of 6 letter-shaped projectiles that spell out the word BULLET. While firing, the gun will voice out the word "bullet". Notes: The 小写字母r is voiced by Doseone, the composer of Enter the Gungeons soundtrack. This gun, while obviously a surface level reference to the basic shape of the letter r, may also be a reference to early computer adventure games. The reload animation of the 小写字母r consists of a text cursor deleting the letter with a backspace, and typing an entirely new r.

entries.englishNotes: Buzzkill is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires sawblades that can ricochet off walls 3 times, and pierce through 2 enemies each. Notes: Buzzkill is slang for someone who ruins fun (in this case, the gun's designer from the Ammonomicon entry), and the gun's name is also a portmanteau of buzzsaw and kill. The pickup text "Sawed On!" is a play on words, based on a "sawed-off shotgun." May be a reference to the Disc Gun in the game Nuclear Throne which also fires ricocheting saw blades.

entries.englishNotes: Uranium Ammolet is a passive item and an Ammolet in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be Stunned (Dur: 1s) and have a 50% chance to be Poisoned (Dur: 6s DPS: 3). Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor. Notes: The item's description is a reference to Marie Curie, a Polish physicist who conducted pioneering research on radioactivity, but died due to aplastic anemia, caused by the high le...

entries.englishNotes: Frost Ammolet is a passive item and an Ammolet in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be Stunned (Dur: 1s) and have a 50% chance to be Frozen (Amount: 100%). Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor. Notes: The synergy Don’t Worry About The Vase is a reference to The Matrix. The synergy Arctic Warfare - is most likely a reference to the A.W.P. Asiimov skin from Counter Strike.

entries.englishNotes: Fightsabre is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Automatic weapon with a consistent firerate. While reloading, the weapon is swung around and reflects nearby enemy bullets back towards their owners. Reflected bullets deal 10 damage each. Notes: The reflect timing (and animation) is longer than the audio cue would suggest. The Fightsabre can deflect the High Dragun's rocket attack. The Fightsabre cannot deflect enemy lasers.
entries.chineseNotes: 军刀 is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Automatic weapon with a consistent firerate. While reloading, the weapon is swung around and reflects nearby enemy bullets back towards their owners. Reflected bullets deal 10 damage each. entries.englishNotes: Huntsman is a gun that fires shotgun blasts of 6 bullets. Reloading swings the axe, destroying bullets and knocking back enemies in a short range. Curse is increased by 1 while this gun is held. Notes: Peculiarly, the Huntsman is a part of the FULLAUTO gun class despite not being remotely fully automatic. Because the Huntsman is not SHOTGUN type despite being a shotgun, it does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy. Trivia: The fact that the weapon increases Curse while being carried stems from the Gungeon rejecting non-bullet based weapons. Executioners wield this weapon. The Huntsman appears to be a Regular Shotgun with an axe blade attached to the underside of the barrel.

entries.englishNotes: Shotgrub is a gun that fires a spread of 5 bullets that leave small pools of poison goop on impact. Notes: Contrail - If the player has Alien Engine, its flame turns green, igniting enemies with Green Fire (Dur: 120s DPS: 4). Alien Engine also grants flight while held. Just Like The Real Thing - If the player has Sixth Chamber, Yellow Chamber, Holey Grail, or Bullet Idol, Shotgrub's bullets will act like those of the Shotgrub enemy, no longer ca... Monster Grub - If the player also has Monster Blood, Shotgrub's bullets will home in on enemies. Trivia: "No Worries" is a reference to the song Hakuna Matata, which is sung by Timon and Pumba from the movie The Lion King, who are notorious for eating grubs.

entries.englishNotes: Prime Primer is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. It can be purchased for 110 in a shop in the Gungeon Proper. Effects: One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past. Notes: This item is useless on The Cultist as it cannot be dropped and the Blacksmith will refuse to talk with the second player. As it is in a glass display case, it can't be stolen with the Grappling Hook or the Directional Pad's grappling hook ability. Surviving Bello's onslaught of bullets in an attempt to steal it will close the shop and the Primer will disappear.

entries.englishNotes: Planar Lead is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past. Notes: The item cannot be dropped, so if The Cultist picks up the item, there is no way for it to be given to the Blacksmith. A hidden (possibly bugged) text string that may appear in the Diginomocon in Exit the Gungeon describes the Planar Lead as being bestowed upon a telepathic bullet who would lead t... After giving the Planar Lead to the Blacksmith, it will appear on the Hero of Time Statue in the Breach as a helmet.

entries.englishNotes: Obsidian Shell Casing is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past. Cannot be dropped, and will not be stolen by the Resourceful Rat. Notes: This is the only bullet component that can be re-acquired after giving it to the Blacksmith. After giving the Obsidian Shell Casing to the Blacksmith, it will appear on the Hero of Time Statue in the Breach as armour.

entries.englishNotes: Arcane Gunpowder is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Cannot be used. One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past. Notes: Bug If either player in a co-op game dies and is holding the gunpowder, the Arcane Gunpowder will disappear. If the Cultist is holding the gunpowder, it’s not possible to give the gunpowder to the Blacksmith, as the gunpowder is not droppable. Cannot be stolen by the Resourceful Rat.

entries.englishNotes: Shadow Bullets is a passive item and a bullet upgrade obtainable in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Firing a weapon has a 15% chance to fire an additional projectile. Gives beam style Guns a 15% chance every second while firing to gain double damage for one second, creating random seconds of double damage. Notes: The beam damage multiplier sometimes granted by Shadow Bullets does not stack with the beam damage multipliers of Shock Rounds, Flak Bullets, Explosive Rounds, Katana Bullets, Vor... While the damage multiplier itself does not stack, the chance for the multiplier to be applied per-second does.

entries.englishNotes: Enraging Photo is a passive item that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. The Convict starts with this item in both games. Effects: Upon taking damage, all of the player's guns will be instantly reloaded, and the player will be enraged for 4 seconds, dealing double damage. Notes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Convict. This item will carry over into characters' pasts. When found as other Gungeoneers, it cannot be sold to the Sell Creep or eaten by the serpent.

entries.englishNotes: Military Training is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. The Marine starts with this item in both games. Effects: Decreases reload times by 20%. Reduces weapon spread by 17%, increasing accuracy. Decreases charge times for charged guns by 16.7%. Notes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Marine. Carries over to the pasts. This is the only item that affects guns' charge time. However, there are a number of synergies that reduce the charge time of one of the guns involved in them.

entries.englishNotes: Chromesteel Assault Rifle is an unobtainable gun in Enter the Gungeon. Notes: Hegemony soldiers in The Convict's past are equipped with this gun. The Black Stache's boss-card depicts several Hegemony Soldiers holding the rifle. Due to the way enemy AI is coded in Enter the Gungeon, companions and enemies which use weapons disconnected from their sprite hold real guns which are theoretically usable in the... However, the fact that the Chromesteel Assault Rifle has a unique description in the Ammonomicon suggests that it may have at one point been intended for player use.

entries.englishNotes: Trusty Lockpicks is an active item in Enter the Gungeon. The Pilot starts with this item. Effects: Has a 50% chance to unlock a lock or locked chest. If it fails, the lock will no longer function. The chest can still be destroyed. Can be used to unlock locks on trapdoors such as the entrance to the Oubliette. Notes: Using the lockpicks on a Mimic will not wake it up. Like other starting items, the Trusty Lockpicks will carry over to the Past. Cannot be fed to the Serpent.

Notes: Using the lockpicks on a Mimic will not wake it up. Like other starting items, the 值得信赖的开锁器 will carry over to the Past. Cannot be fed to the Serpent.

entries.englishNotes: Cat Claw is a gun in Enter the Gungeon. Effects: Fires small homing needles that stick into targets. These needles have a high homing force but low homing radius, meaning that they can completely change their direction to hit a target but can only 'see' targets within 4 tiles. After an enemy has not been struck with a new needle for 0.5 seconds, all needles currently stuck into the enemy will simultaneously explode, damaging the target and everything el... Notes: As needles only detonate once new needles stop being attached, it is easy to accidentally 'overkill' enemies. For small targets, it is typically best to pause once a small number of needles are attached to allow them to detonate.

entries.englishNotes: Not to be confused with the Prototype Railgun. Railgun is a gun that fires a fast-moving piercing bullet that bounces 8 times. Notes: Dead Cell - If the player also has Fortune's Favor, the charge time is 10% faster and its damage to bosses is increased by 30%. When this gun is charged, the beam of light coming from the end is usually stopped by walls. However, passages to secret rooms will let the light through, revealing their location. Trivia: Its appearance is near identical to the man-portable rail gun from the Metal Gear Solid franchise. The synergy with Fortune's Favor is a reference to the character Fortune from Metal Gear Solid 2, who wields the weapon.

entries.englishNotes: Compressed Air Tank is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. It also makes a brief cameo appearance in the Digital Comic. Effects: Charges to fire a shark that swims around under the floor, seeking out enemies and chomping down on them to deal a large amount of damage. Sharks leave water goop as they travel. Sharks fired into invalid places, such as directly into walls, will immediately disappear, leaving a large circular puddle of water behind. Sharks trigger a different animation depending on if they kill their target. If the shark kills its prey, it will erupt from the floor and swallow the enemy whole.

entries.englishNotes: Snakemaker is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It has a 25% chance to turn enemies into harmless Snakes. Notes: Bosses are immune to transmogrification. Unlike chickens caused by other transmogrification, snakes cannot be killed and will not block shots. Snakes can block enemies

entries.englishNotes: Bullet Bore is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires drills which home in on enemies, stun them, and explode after a short delay. Notes: This gun can hit Cannonbalrog and High Priest during attacks where not normally possible. Helix Bullets will cause the bullets to only shoot and have piercing abilities, without the explosion and stunning effect. The drills fired are able to kill the mines spawned by the Mine Flayer.
entries.chineseNotes: 钻头枪 is a gun that appears in Enter the Gungeon. It fires drills which home in on enemies, stun them, and explode after a short delay. entries.englishNotes: Trick Gun is a gun that alternates between a pistol and a shotgun upon reloading. While in pistol form, bullets can ricochet off walls up to four times. Notes: The Trick Gun can be reloaded without changing its form by switching to another gun, waiting approximately twice the amount of time it takes to reload normally, than switching bac... Fear the Old Blood - If the player also has Blood Brooch, Bloody Eye, or Rolling Eye, reload time is decreased by 33% and fire rate is increased by 20%. Hell Singing - If the player also has Silver Bullets, Trick Gun will deal an extra 50% damage to jammed enemies for a total of 487.5% damage. Trivia: This gun is a reference to the transforming trick weapons from Bloodborne.
entries.chineseNotes: 魔术枪 is a gun that alternates between a pistol and a 常规霰弹枪 upon reloading. While in pistol form, bullets can ricochet off walls up to four times. Notes: The 魔术枪 can be reloaded without changing its form by switching to another gun, waiting approximately twice the amount of time it takes to reload normally, than switching bac... Fear the Old Blood - If the player also has 鲜血胸针, 血红的眼睛, or 翻紫眼儿, reload time is decreased by 33% and fire rate is increased by 20%. Hell Singing - If the player also has 银子弹, 魔术枪 will deal an extra 50% damage to jammed enemies for a total of 487.5% damage. Trivia: This gun is a reference to the transforming trick weapons from Bloodborne.

entries.englishNotes: Heart of Ice is a passive item in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Grants a heart container. Like all heart container items, The Robot will receive 5 to 10 instead. Taking damage releases fires 8-12 projectile ice cubes in a circle around the player. These ice cubes split into 2 smaller ice cubes on impact. Notes: Despite being able to be found in , and rank chests, it will always have to be bought from a store at rank price. Although it is considered rank, it does not increase magnificence. This is the only rank item to not also give a key when obtained out of an rank chest.

Taking damage releases fires 8-12 projectile ice cubes in a circle around the player. These ice cubes split into 2 smaller ice cubes on impact. This is the only rank item to not also give a key when obtained out of an rank chest.

entries.englishNotes: Mass Shotgun is a gun in Enter the Gungeon and Exit the Gungeon. Effects: Fires a single, large, slow moving projectile with a 5 tile range. After hitting a wall or reaching the end of its exceptionally short range, this ball will split apart into 12 smaller, faster projectiles. The angle that the smaller shards fly at depends on how the initial projectile was destroyed. If the ball reached the end of its range, they will travel along the same trajectory. Notes: The Mass Shotgun is best used at a medium range, where the initial projectile will split close enough to the target to maximise the amount of pellets that hit. This gun is a reference to collapsible weapons in the Mass Effect franchise.
